Name: Mr.Wonderful
Description:
Mr. Wonderful is the result of an initiative we came up with on our couch at home back in 2011 as we snuggled under a blanket (it was February and a bit chilly). It was all started by Javi and Angi, who are graphic designers and shareholders as well as husband and wife.

Mr. Wonderful was created to be a non-boring graphic design studio sending out positive messages and cheerful phrases every day through its social networks.

The success of these messages and designs made a splash on the web and we added new designs to our product catalogue as our followers on social networks grew.

First we opened our online store in which we sold our products and handled the entire process from design to order preparation. We were soon asked by small gift shops, stationers, etc. if they could start selling our items. Then major chains also wanted to stock Mr. Wonderful products.

So we have been able to keep increasing the number of different products we sell, and our staff and warehouses have expanded. Nowadays we are growing not only in Spain but also internationally, where we increasing our presence.

Name: Taurus ~ A Sustainable Story
Description:
Taurus, established in 2007 by Entrepreneurs and FDCI designers Dhruv and Pallavi, 
Taurus began its journey with a prêt clothing line for women—blending Indian ethos with international concepts to create a truly global appeal. Over the past two decades, they have set up manufacturing units, expanded into international markets, and built their domestic brand “TAURUS” across omni-channels. 
Over time, Dhruv and Pallavi felt a growing responsibility to give back to the planet and began a conscious journey to find meaningful ways to support the environment. This led to the development of a new vertical—Sustainable Corporate product Solutions—designed to balance People, Planet, and Profit.

Brand Philosophy-
At Taurus, we believe that creation must be both beautiful and responsible. We focus primarily on sourcing and creating earth-friendly options for a sustainable future. Our vision is to promote eco-friendly solutions and a product line that cater to businesses and individuals seeking thoughtful, sustainable alternatives—combining timeless design with conscious innovation.

Name: SproutWorld
Description:
SproutWorld is the company behind the world’s only patented plantable pencils and makeup liners  With their original circular design, our award-winning products can blossom from the stub of a pencil. Simply plant our products after use to give them a second life as flowers, herbs and even trees.  

Since 2013, we’ve sold more than 50 million pencils in over 80 countries. Our business clients come from a wide range of sectors from travel, energy, education and logistics to health, medical, NGOs and fashion. 

Many businesses and customers are looking at how they can be more sustainable. Our plastic-free, minimum waste, ecofriendly products offer a fresher, greener alternative. SproutWorld's plantable products are ideal for campaigns, promotions, conferences, trade shows, corporate gifts, or in the office. We have a range of standard or customization options to suit your business needs. 

Our plantable products illustrate in a simple and visual way what’s possible when we think with a more sustainable mindset. While a pencil won’t change the world, we believe our second life products can inspire and encourage individuals and businesses to take small steps towards positive change, by adopting more sustainable and circular practices. Because if we all take action, together we can make a greater impact – and be a force for good. 

Find out more at: sproutworld.com

Name: MOYU
Description:
Did you know the paper industry is the 3rd industrial polluter responsible for 7% of yearly CO2 and 17% of all deforestation?

Last time we checked, 30 football fields of forest are cleared every minute. That’s 15 billion trees a year. Just pause and let it sink for a second. Shocking, we know!

That’s why we used stone paper to reimagine traditional notebooks into MOYUs with some serious magical powers:
‣ Exceptional durability - Rewritable up to 500 times
‣ Unparalleled eco-friendliness - No trees, water, or chemicals
‣ Environmentally sound - 100% recyclable paper

We didn’t stop there. We decided to plant one tree for every MOYU sold. It’s our way to support reforestation efforts around the world.

We believe MOYUs will inspire others to change their writing habits and actively promote the need to hack away at single-use paper and reforest the planet.

What do you say? Can you see yourself as a pioneer in the paper industry, a guardian of the forest, or a reusable paper champion of the world?

Personalize MOYUs as the ideal company gift and get in the business of reforesting the planet. After all, impact is in the numbers!

--
MOYU is a Certified B Corp
#stonepaperwarriors #wipeformore

 Serving High-Tech Companies:
We specialize in catering to high-tech companies, providing tailor-made cocktail solutions for corporate events, celebrations, and gifting programs. Our offerings, featuring signature drinks and curated sets, add a touch of sophistication to every occasion.
 Elevating Hospitality:
Spicehaus extends its expertise to the hospitality industry, collaborating with hotels and restaurants to enhance their beverage offerings. Our premium cocktails elevate the dining and drinking experience for guests, setting establishments apart with a touch of luxury.
 Global Reach:
What began in Israel has now expanded to Cyprus, Greece, and Denmark. Spicehaus has become an international name, bringing the art of mixology to diverse cultures and markets. Our global presence ensures that the world gets to savor the finest in cocktails and beverage innovation.
 B2C E-commerce:
In addition to our corporate and hospitality services, Spicehaus caters to individual consumers through our user-friendly e-commerce platform. Explore and purchase our exquisite range of cocktails and gift sets from the comfort of your home, making every celebration a memorable one.
Join us on this exciting journey of flavor, innovation, and celebration. At Spicehaus, we don't just mix drinks; we craft experiences that linger in the memory.

Name: House Of Uphaar
Description:
Hi Everyone,

We are a corporate gifting company and,
We believe in "Gifting that looks good, feels good, and does good".

At House of Uphaar, we believe gifts should be both aesthetic and intentional. The kind that are thoughtfully curated, beautifully packed, and instantly Instagram-worthy—but also filled with things that serve a real purpose. From wellness kits and work essentials to festive hampers and custom brand drops—we mix style and substance in every box.

Design matters. Details matter. Presentation matters. We obsess over the little things—textures, tones, packaging, placement—because we know how much first impressions count. 

But it’s not just about looking good. Every product we include is chosen to be useful, relevant, and aligned with your brand values. Plus, we’re big on personalization—custom notes, logos, themes, colors... we bring your brand’s story into the gift itself.

And with that mindset, we landed our first-ever bulk order with Sony—a global brand we’ve always admired. It was the kind of start that made us believe in what we’re building even more.

We also care about conscious choices. Wherever possible, we choose eco-friendly packaging and support local artisans and creators. Because meaningful gifting means being thoughtful all the way through.

Whether you're onboarding new employees, celebrating a milestone, appreciating clients, or planning a festive drop—House of Uphaar helps you do it with style, heart, and impact.

Because a great gift doesn’t just say “thank you.” It says you matter.

Name: MITHILAsmita
Description:
MITHILAsmita started in the year 2010 as a Folk Art Organization to promote Madhubani Painting & support its rural woman artists.The hybrid model at MITHILAsmita – a For Profit Arm and a Non-Profit arm together, aims to tackle various challenges of the Traditional Art Ecosystem in India, currently focusing on the ancient Mithila (Madhubani) Paintings.

The For-profit arm of MITHILAsmita is striving to create a robust Marketing Platform, to generate opportunities for thousands of rural woman artists practicing the traditional Mithila art, since ages through a combination of Folk Art Gallery, Online/Offline Stores, Art Exhibitions, Workshops and Case Studies.

The Non Profit arm of MITHILAsmita aims at creating a Social Ecosystem for the art practitioners. ‘Light for Art’ LIFA is an initiative of MITHILAsmita to light up rural homes of the artists to make night lives safer and productive for them. 261 homes are lighted up so far under this initiative, with the support of eminent Corporates & Individuals. 

MITHILAsmita was a prestigious nomination at national level change-maker contest like Mahindra ‘Spark The Rise’ and ISB ‘iDiya’.

MITHILAsmita also became one of the earliest Indian members of ‘Alliance for Artisan Enterprise’, a US Government Initiative and hosted by the Aspen Institute, USA. Case study on MITHILAsmita are available at Ivey Publishing House, Canada and MDI Gurgaon (leading B School of India).

Brand MITHILAsmita was featured at Social Media Week 2014 (hosted at Infosys) and it's initiatives have been featured by numerous media/publications including Press Trust of India, DNA, Hindustan, Navbharat Times, Dainik Jagran, The Indus Entrepreneurs (TIE) and New Global Indian.

For more information, visit www.mithilasmita.com

Through an engaging and interactive quiz, users can find the perfect gift for their loved ones based on their age, gender, and personal preferences. Experience the joy of stress-free gift shopping with Presentico - your ultimate gift guide for creating memorable moments.

Name: OfisPlus
Description:
Ofis Plus” şirkəti geniş çeşidli ofis məhsulları, avadanlıqları və mebellərinin satışını həyata keçirir. Şirkətin təqdim etdiyi yerli və xarici məhsullar keyfiyyəti və sərfəli qiymətinə görə seçilir. Şirkət Azərbaycan Respublikası ərazisi üzrə bir neçə satış dükanı ilə təmsil olunmaqla yanaşı, çoxfunksiyalı və rahat online satış platformasına malikdir. Şirkət məhsullarını ölkə ərazisi üzrə müştərilərinin ünvanlarına çatdırır. Şirkətin topdan alıcılar və koorporativ müştərilər üçün xüsusi qiymət siyasəti mövcuddur ki, bu da yerli bazarda tərəfdaşların dəstəklənməsinə xidmət edir.

Şirkət ölkə iqtisadiyyatına dəstək məqsədilə yerli məhsulların satışı ilə yanaşı aparıcı Almaniya, İngiltərə, Türkiyə, Fransa, Amerika, Çin və digər ölkələrin məşhur brendlərinin məhsullarını Azərbaycan alıcılarına çatdırır. Bundan başqa şirkətimiz hər növ reklam və poliqrafiya xidmətlərini də öz müştərilərinə təqdim edir.
Şirkətin professional komandası sayəsində müştəriləri uyğun qiymət və yüksək keyfiyyət ilə özəl xidmət əldə edirlər. Şirkət koorporativ müştərilərinə özəl promo məhsullar, müxtəlif reklam məhsulları və poliqrafiya xidmətləri üçün daim yenilənən xüsusi təkliflər təqdim edir. “Ofis Plus” şirkəti Azərbaycan bazarında qeyri-neft sektorunun inkişafına dəstək və yerli brendlərin yaradılması məqsədilə ofis mebeli və ləvazimatları sahəsində bir sıra məhsulların istehsalını əyata keçirir. Belə ki, şirkət keyfiyyəti ilə xarici məşhur istehsalçılardan heç də geridə qalmayan, original dizayna malik ofis mebelləri istehsal edir.

Müştərilərimiz ofislərinə uyğun mebelləri online satış veb saytımız və ya xüsusi sifariş ilə əldə edə bilirlər. Şirkətimiz təbiətin qorunması məqsədilə müxtəli innovativ texnologiyaların tətbiqini həyata keçirir. Belə ki, müxtəlif ölçülü şirkətlər üçün kağız və yazı ləvazimatlarına qənaət məqsədilə şirkətimiz tərəfindən electron sənəd dövriyyəsi proqram təminatı hazırlanmışdır.

Name: Shop Classy
Description:
Shop Classy is a one-stop solution for companies looking to purchase a variety of corporate gifts, welcome kits, and company t-shirts. They offer a wide range of items that are customizable to fit your company's needs and branding.

One of the most popular items that Shop Classy offers is corporate gifts. These gifts can be customized with your company's logo or message and can be given to clients, partners, or employees as a way to show appreciation and strengthen relationships. Some of the most popular corporate gifts offered by Shop Classy include customized pens, notebooks, and other stationery items, tech gadgets such as USB drives or wireless chargers, gift baskets or boxes with gourmet food or drinks, branded apparel such as t-shirts or hats, and desk accessories like mouse pads or phone stands.

Another popular offering from Shop Classy is welcome kits. These kits are a great way to welcome new employees to your company and provide them with the tools they need to succeed. Some items that are commonly included in welcome kits include the company handbook or manual, stationery and office supplies, branded company merchandise such as t-shirts or mugs, personalized notes or welcome letters, and snacks or drinks.

Finally, Shop Classy also offers a variety of company t-shirts. These t-shirts can be customized with your company's logo or branding and can be given to employees or used for promotional purposes. When designing company t-shirts, it's important to choose a high-quality fabric that is comfortable to wear and to offer different sizes and styles to accommodate a range of body types and personal preferences.

Overall, Shop Classy is a great resource for companies looking for a one-stop solution for corporate gifts, welcome kits, and company t-shirts. Their customizable offerings and dedication to customer satisfaction make them a top choice for businesses of all sizes.

Corporate gifting has a unique Purpose & We understand the purpose of gifting!

We are into gifting from the year 2010 and have been working closely with leading multinational companies of all the sectors.

The purpose of gifting with corporates is big and it encompasses almost all the segments of gifting right from customization to branding a product. At times it is simple printing on a product and at times it is a creation of a complete new product as per the requirement of the project.

Corporate Gifting is all about how a corporate is gifting to their employees, associates and prospects. The purpose is to recognize, value and be there in the good memories with them for a long period of time.

Name: Jalovi
Description:
Com uma trajetória de mais de 50 anos, a Jalovi se destaca como uma referência no setor de livraria e papelaria na região de Bauru, no coração de São Paulo.
Nossa jornada começou humilde, inicialmente produzindo e vendendo apostilas para os alunos da Faculdade de Direito. Essa dedicação inicial conquistou gradualmente a confiança dos clientes, levando à abertura da nossa primeira loja física.
Ao longo dos anos, expandimos nossa oferta para atender uma ampla gama de necessidades, crescendo para nos tornarmos uma loja maior e mais diversificada. Hoje, após décadas de trabalho árduo e dedicação, nossas lojas oferecem mais de 40 mil itens cuidadosamente selecionados. Desde livros e artigos de papelaria até produtos de informática, brinquedos e artesanatos, nosso catálogo é rico e diversificado.
Nossa missão é promover a cultura e a educação, e fazemos isso oferecendo um vasto acervo de títulos nacionais e internacionais. Nosso compromisso inabalável com a excelência e a satisfação do cliente nos impulsiona a evoluir continuamente, adaptando-nos às demandas do mercado em constante mudança.
Com muito trabalho, amor no que estava se construindo, aos poucos ganhamos credibilidade junto a nossos clientes, com isso conquistamos nossa primeira loja física.
No decorrer do tempo percebendo a grande procura por livros e materiais escolares, fomos aumentando o número de itens, se fez necessário mudarmos para uma loja maior, possibilitando atender nossos clientes e trazer cada vez mais novidades. Trabalhando com materiais de escritório e informática abrangendo novos setores transformando nossa loja mais completa.
Não importa do que você precise, estaremos aqui para lhe proporcionar uma experiência incrível e inigualável com essas e muito mais mercadorias para atender sua necessidade. Hoje somos referência com mais de 10 lojas distribuídas no estado de São Paulo (em São José do Rio Preto, Botucatu e Marilia).

Mega Office Supplies is a leading Australian-owned ecommerce retailer delivering fast, frictionless and customer-centric office, education and creative supplies nationwide. Mega Office Supplies has been recognised as an ABA100 Winner for Business Excellence [BXA] in The Australian Business Awards 2025, acknowledging our resilience, operational excellence and long-term sustainability. Whether you’re managing a corporate office, outfitting a school, supporting a creative program or working from home, Mega delivers a seamless, stress-free experience supported by genuine service and national shipping.

Desde nuestro inicio junto con nuestra empresa MARKET LAB, hemos crecido hasta contar con dos ubicaciones estratégicas en la ciudad de Lima: una en el corazón cultural de Miraflores y la otra en el dinámico distrito de Santiago de Surco. Ambos espacios están diseñados para inspirar creatividad y ofrecer una experiencia de compra inigualable.

En Paperstop, creemos que cada artículo de papelería no es solo un objeto, sino una puerta a un mundo de posibilidades creativas.

Animamos a todos a explorar nuestra amplia gama de productos siguiéndonos en redes sociales y visitando nuestras tiendas para comprobar por qué somos la papelería favorita en Lima. Esperamos recibirlos pronto y asistirlos en la búsqueda del regalo perfecto, el material artístico que necesitas o ese accesorio esencial para tu oficina o espacio de estudio!

Name: Binders Inc.
Description:
Founded in November 1981 in Charlotte, North Carolina, Binders, Inc. is a full-service custom office supply company. Our evolving product portfolio has grown over the decades from exclusively offering custom binders to adding complementary products like index tabs, certificate and degree holders, restaurant menus, document holders, easels and many other custom office products. We serve a wide range of industries like healthcare, legal, education, religious institutions and general business. We also serve as the production office for many printing companies where we produce their custom product orders and “blind ship” direct to their customer, so our printing partners can focus on what they do best – selling the next customer.

We have recently expanded our offering to add print services and an expanded product offering like turned edge books and binders, calendars and promotional items, to name a few. We maintain a low cost, state-of-the-art manufacturing facility with an emphasis on quality control and a dedication to total customer satisfaction. Unlike some competitors, we source and assemble all materials here in the USA. We purchase the raw materials and manufacture to each customer’s specification with a focus on quality in our facility. This allows us to keep our cost low and control both quality and on-time delivery. Many of our team members have over 10+ years in the custom office product industry.

Our goal is simple: Match the price of big box retail with much better quality, while providing professional support and the convenience of a seamless online shopping experience. We strive to do this while delivering office products customized to the customer’s exact specifications.

Name: Fée des cadeaux-MKA Créations
Description:
Fée des cadeaux est une société à taille humaine, elle a été créée en octobre 2021. l'activité principale est la personnalisation de jolies boites en bois avec gravure, pour tout public et toutes occasions (anniversaire, fête, départ retraite, naissance, toutes les occasions sont bonnes pour procurer de l'émotion...la vraie).  

Pour son bon développement, l'activité qui avait débutée à domicile se poursuit depuis 2022, dans un atelier de gravure au centre de Thionville (57) et est en mesure de répondre aux demandes conséquentes.
Toujours dans cette optique, la société s'est équipée de machines sophistiqués qui lui permette de faire des gravures sur verre, métal, et  sur du cuir.
Elle s'oriente également dans la broderie.

Nous avons également fier d'avoir l'autorisation de la marque  TRIXIE de personnaliser leurs produits,  gourdes, sacs et divers jouets en bois. 

D'autres partenariats de ce genre sont prévus prochainement.

Ayant eu un actif dans le domaine commercial, je souhaite proposer aux entreprises, associations, et clubs mes services de personnalisation de cadeaux du personnel, clients, fournisseurs..

Fée des cadeaux veut également contribuer à des actions solidaires malgré que la société est toute jeune.  Dès la création de la société en octobre 2021, l'action des traineaux de Noël  a permise d'animer les ventes afin d'offrir le maximum de traîneaux   à des enfants hospitalisés, le 9 décembre, 25 enfants ont reçus leurs traineaux en personnes après le passage de Fée des cadeaux à l'hôpital des enfants de Nancy (54).

Depuis le 1er octobre, la 2ème édition est lancée afin d'en offrir le maximum de traineaux. l'hôpital de destination n'est pas encore défini.
Je recherche des entreprises qui souhaitent participer à cette jolie action en commandant des traîneaux pour leurs employés, les enfants des employés.
L'action sera animée tout au long du mois d'octobre et novembre et chaque pallier atteint sera annoncé.
Pour 10 traineaux vendu UN traineau offert

Name: fairhip
Description:
Waarom toch? 
"Alles moet tegenwoordig duurzaam zijn, ecologisch verantwoord en bij voorkeur klimaatneutraal. Het klimaat warmt op, we mogen geen vlees meer eten, auto’s worden elektrisch en de wereldbevolking groeit de pan uit.” Dit is het tijdperk van doemdenkers en klimaatprofeten, of juist van klimaatontkenners en populisten. De waarheid wordt zonder blikken of blozen vermengd met ‘alternatieve feiten’ en sociale media geven een ongeremde blik op de mening van talloze hardroepers. Je bent voor of tegen, zwart of wit. Maar zoals ene meneer Boeijen ooit zong: denk niet zwart-wiiiiit! 

Een onsje minder
fairhip probeert de nuance aan te brengen. Natuurlijk moeten we voorzichtig zijn met deze wereld, het schijnt dat we er maar één hebben. En natuurlijk mag het af en toe best een onsje minder zijn. Wij realiseren ons allemaal wel dat het anders zou moeten, zou moeten kunnen. Maar hoe? En is dat niet meer iets voor de grachtengordel of mensen die graag hun eigen sokken breien? 

Beetje bij beetje
Nee dus. Een betere wereld begint bij jezelf, een duurzamere levensstijl ontstaat stapje voor stapje. En ook op je plaat gaan. 

De weg naar een betere wereld is er niet alleen voor de elite, staat niet vol met verbodsborden, er zal best wel een hobbeltje of een bobbeltje inzitten en er valt zeker ook wat op te lachen (al is het alleen al om je eigen dappere pogingen). fairhip probeert je met concrete producten, tips, adviezen en voorbeelden op weg te helpen.

Name: Green Crayon Packaging
Description:
At Green Crayon Packaging, we create and curate sustainable and bio-degradable packaging products which comes in materials like Cotton, Jute and Jutton. 
We believe, If we are in a position of power, we are obligated to society in every way. Some fine day it will help us stitch a better future. Based in Calcutta, we are naturally drawn to products which have a story to tell. We believe, behind every piece of creation, lies a story. That of a weaver, a designer, a city, a state and a country which never fails to amaze us.
Times are changing and the world is moving towards a planet, more sustainable. Awareness is increasing and people have started acknowledging climate change. It is not surprising to know if Indians care less about these issues, because we lack awareness (it is much beyond toxic fumes coming out of vehicles and stranded polar bears in north pole). That is one of the objectives we are striving for. Several efforts are made from our end to spread environmental literacy.
Talking about business, we create and curate sustainable and bio-degradable packaging products. Our team in Bengal consists of women who work only until natural day light allows them to and this journey would be incomplete without thanking our team, our weavers and our tailors. There is no point overlooking the weavers and the tailors. Captains without their teams, never make skilled sailors. We hope you have a pleasant experience on our website and blog posts.

Name: REVA WAVES
Description:
Reva Waves is a social enterprise based in Vadodara, Gujarat, committed to empowering women through Self-Help Groups (SHGs) and promoting sustainable, eco-friendly living. Founded to support the economic independence of women in unorganized sectors, Reva collaborates with SHGs to create a range of environmentally conscious products, including natural fertilizers, handmade soaps, and reusable tote bags.

Our mission is to bridge the gap between grassroots artisans and the larger marketplace, ensuring that the skills and hard work of SHG members translate into lasting financial independence. By providing training, resources, and market connections, Reva Waves helps SHGs enhance their product quality and scale their operations, contributing to both local community development and global environmental goals.

Registered under MSME, Reva Products prioritizes transparency, quality, and sustainability in every step of our production process. Through partnerships with experts in market dynamics, product design, and sales, we’re able to offer unique, high-quality products that reflect the dedication and skill of the women behind them.

At Reva Waves, we believe in the power of collaboration to drive social change and environmental stewardship. Join us in our journey to empower women, support local communities, and promote sustainable practices for a better, greener future.

- des jeux qui transportent dans des univers inattendus, 
- une papeterie qui raconte des histoires,
- des textiles qui enlacent de douceur...

L'humour est également au rendez-vous : les étagères abritent des trésors comiques et des petits détails qui révèlent une touche d'espièglerie. C'est un endroit où l'on peut être sérieux dans sa quête de cadeaux parfaits tout en profitant d'un moment de détente et de légèreté.

Fabienne vous y accueille, prête à partager des conseils précieux et à faire naître des sourires sincères. 

Chez De Jolies Choses, chaque cadeau a une histoire à raconter, chaque cadeau est une occasion de transmettre de l'amour, de la joie et de l'émotion. C'est un lieu où les sourires s'échangent, où les cœurs se réchauffent et où les souvenirs se tissent, un endroit où l'on repart non seulement avec un objet, mais aussi avec un bout de bonheur.

History/
We began cultural and artistic activities at a sake brewery; in 2009, closed food and art events began at the guest house of a Kyoto sake brewery; in 2011, events were held throughout the year with funding from the Asahi Beer Arts Foundation; In 2015, our company was incorporated and began working with clients such as travel agencies and hotel groups. 

My personal premise is that I was born into a family that has been involved in the construction and Shinto rituals of the Ise Shrine for generations since the time of the Samurai. Name: Kedmy Games
Description:
אנחנו בקדמי מאמינים בכוחו של משחק לחבר בין אנשים, ליצור דינמיקה חיובית ולחזק את הקשרים האישיים. המשחקים שלנו נועדו לא רק למטרת שעשוע – אלא גם לעורר שיחה, להגביר את ההקשבה ולפתח את כישורי ההתבוננות והאמפתיה כלפי האחר.

המשחקים שלנו נוצרו ע"י ד"ר יוסי קדמי ובתו, שני קדמי צוקרמן. יוסי קדמי הוא המייסד והמוביל של המרכז ללימודי NLP והיפנוזה עצמית, הינו דמות יוצאת דופן במרחב ההתפתחות וההעצמה האישית בישראל.

בעולם העסקים המודרני, שבו הרבה זמן עבודה מתבצע בצורה דיגיטלית ועצמאית, יש חשיבות רבה בשמירה על קשרים אנושיים. החזון שלנו הוא להציע כלים שיאפשרו לעובדים שלכם להתקרב וליצור חוויה משותפת מכילה ומחוברת.

המשחקים מיועדים כמתנות לעובדים כך שיוכלו לשחק בכל מסגרת חברתית או משפחתית או בתור פעילויות מחלקתיות, גיבוש או סתם ארוחת צהריים – באמצעות המשחקים, אנו רוצים להחזיר את היכולת לתקשר בצורה אותנטית ופתוחה, ולהגביר את ההבנה והקבלה בין אנשים.

Name: Cartopel S.R.L

Nuestra misión es satisfacer a nuestros clientes a través de la calidad de nuestros productos, máxima eficiencia en la entrega y precios competitivos. Permanentemente agregamos a nuestro amplio surtido todas las novedades que se ofrecen en el mercado internacional.

Disponemos continuidad y permanentemente contamos con existencia del 90 % o más de nuestros artículos.

Agradecemos a nuestros clientes y amigos la confianza que nos dispensan, y tengan la seguridad que continuaremos ofreciendo calidad, eficiente servicios y precios competitivos.  #cartopel

Each collection is thoughtfully crafted to celebrate the scents, textures, and moods inspired by India’s diverse landscapes—from the sacred ghats of Varanasi to the serene backwaters of Kerala, the royal courts of Rajasthan to the aromatic spice markets of Madurai.

We combine age-old craftsmanship with modern luxury, using premium, eco-friendly materials—natural soy wax, hand-poured precision, and ethically sourced fragrance oils. Our aesthetic blends timeless Indian motifs with minimalist elegance, appealing to discerning customers around the world.

Whether you're gifting a piece of India or enhancing your own living space, Arika is where heritage meets refinement.

 Crafted with purpose. Lit with pride.

Name: KULA
Description:
At KULA, we’re not about your average, forgettable gifts. We’re here to deliver something more—thoughtful, personal, and packed with joy. Whether it’s a box of gooey brownies to celebrate a hardworking team, a heartfelt thank-you for a colleague who always goes the extra mile, or a way to welcome someone new to the company, KULA is all about recognizing and celebrating the people who matter most.

The idea for KULA came to life because we wanted to create something beyond a generic gift box—a way to connect people, show appreciation, and make someone smile when it matters most. Inspired by moments in our own lives—whether it was cheering up a friend in the hospital or recognizing someone who’d gone above and beyond—we realized how small acts of kindness can make a big impact.

In the workplace, as in life, those little moments of appreciation go a long way. That’s why every KULA box is handmade with care, using locally sourced ingredients (as much as we can—sorry, maple syrup, you’re not Swiss!) and beautifully packaged without all the unnecessary fluff. Whether for your team, clients, or colleagues, KULA gifts are designed to strengthen connections and show you care in a truly meaningful way.

So if you’re looking for corporate gifts that are more than just “stuff”—something that says, “We value you, and we care”—you’re in the right place.

 Small acts. Big joy. That’s KULA.

Name: Giftpure
Description:
Giftpure.in is an Indian e-commerce platform that specializes in providing a wide range of curated, personalized corporate gifts for various occasions. The website focuses on delivering thoughtful, high-quality gift options, making it a go-to destination for those seeking unique presents for their loved ones or business associates. Whether for birthdays, anniversaries, festivals, or corporate gifting, Giftpure ensures each gift stands out with a personal touch.

Product Offerings
Giftpure offers a various variety of products, including personalized gifts (mugs, photo frames), luxury hampers, home décor items (candles, wall art, planters), and special occasion gifts. The platform also provides digital gift cards, making it easier for customers to give flexible gifts. Corporate gifting solutions are available as well, with customized gifts for employees, clients, and partners.

User Experience
Giftpure.in's website is designed for ease of use, offering a smooth shopping experience with simple navigation, filtering options, and multiple payment methods. Customers can enjoy secure checkout, real-time order tracking, and delivery updates. Gift wrapping and personalized messages are also available, ensuring that gifts are both beautiful and thoughtful.

Delivery & Packaging
Giftpure is known for its premium packaging and timely delivery services. Same-day delivery is available for select items, enhancing the convenience for last-minute shoppers.

Customer Satisfaction
With a strong focus on customer service, Giftpure offers support via email, phone. Their easy return and exchange policies ensure a seamless experience for customers. Through its attention to detail, quality products, and efficient delivery, Giftpure has established itself as a trusted brand in the online gifting space.

Name: WiggleButt Greetings LLC
Description:
Hi, I'm Carolyn, the artist behind everything WiggleButt Greetings. My whole life I've been creating art and crafting, and I am so happy to bring my corgi inspired work to you!  

The inspiration for WiggleButt Greetings came into my life in August 2020. I decided to get a Pembroke corgi pup who would become my work from home companion, adventure buddy, and constant joy. Her name is Calliope (kuh-lahy-uh-pee) after my favorite Grey’s Anatomy character Calliope Torres, the Greek mythology muse of epic poetry, and the musical instrument that can be heard for miles around. Calliope can certainly be heard for miles around, such a big voice in a small little body!

As any new Corgi mom, I take tons of pictures of the typical day, from at home silliness to our road trip vacations to backpacking camping trips. I found myself craving a creative outlet when editing the photos and started to take some courses in Photoshop, InDesign, and Illustrator. I also was starting to have an itch to try something entrepreneurship-wise, and my first instinct was to draw upon Calliope as inspiration. I created my first greeting card and I just took off and have been loving the fun exciting experience ever since!

I hope that my greeting cards, photography, or other gift goodies find a place in your home and brings you joy!

Name: PLACE OF AROMA
Description:
Welcome to Place of Aroma, where the art of candle-making meets the soul of wellness. I am Carol Edmond, the heart and spirit behind this unique venture. My journey began with a passion for creating something more than just candles; I wanted to forge experiences that ignite the senses and soothe the soul.

As a lover of artisanal crafts and a believer in the power of aromatherapy, I founded Place of Aroma to bring a touch of tranquility and bespoke elegance to everyday spaces. Our candles are not just products; they are handcrafted stories - each scent, a chapter; every flame, a dance of light and shadow.

With a background in Health and Wellness, I infuse a blend of creativity, expertise, and a deep understanding of wellness into every aspect of Place of Aroma. Our candles are crafted with the finest materials, ensuring quality and sustainability in every wick and wax.

But Place of Aroma is more than just a candle company. We are a mobile haven of creativity and relaxation, offering wellness and team-building workshops that cater to both individuals and corporate clients. These workshops are designed to not only teach the art of candle-making but also to foster a sense of community, mindfulness, and shared experience.

In our second year of business, we are embarking on a journey to deepen our connections with our clients, whether it’s through our custom private label candles or our engaging workshops. We aim to light up countless spaces with our creations and bring moments of peace and reflection in the hustle and bustle of everyday life.

My vision for Place of Aroma is to continue to grow as a beacon of creativity and wellness. By nurturing partnerships and continuously exploring new avenues for our artisanal offerings, we aspire to be a name synonymous with quality, innovation, and serenity.

Join us in this journey of discovery and indulgence, where every scent tells a story and every candle flickers with the promise of tranquility.

Prvu poslovnicu otvorili smo 1995. u Splitu, a u tri desetljeća poslovanja pohvaliti se možemo s 5 papirnica na području Splitsko – dalmatinske županije, trgovinom specijaliziranom za umjetnički materijal, kontinuiranim unaprijeđenjem poslovanja u skladu s aktualnim trendovima na tržištu te brojnim zadovoljnim partnerima i klijentima.

Kvalitetnim proizvodima olakšavamo svakodnevno poslovanje i školske izazove, a cilj nam je postati prvi izbor pri kupovini uredskog i školskog materijala na razini Republike Hrvatske.

Name: BOSS Business Supplies Charity
Description:
The BOSS Business Supplies Charity was established to financially assist people and their families who have previously or currently work within the business supplies industry, who may have fallen on hard times, or are unable to work due to disability and ill health.

Anyone who has ever worked in the industry for at least two years in whatever capacity, be it for a retailer, dealer, wholesaler or vendor, is eligible to apply to the Charity for financial assistance.

The Charity has helped many people through the years from helping to pay for new windows, school uniforms for children, mobility items, plus regular housekeeping costs, amongst many others.

The Charity is managed by a group of Trustees who meet twice a year, and who also help to raise funds.

On this page you will find details of how to apply for assistance if you or someone you know requires it.

We will also be keeping up to date with what fundraising events are happening and when, and details of how to get involved.

The BOSS Charity is proud to have the BOSS Federation as its Honorary Patron, and to enjoy the support of our Corporate Patrons: Avery, BIC, Brother UK Ltd, CTS Wholesale, Fellowes Brands, OPI,  Pukka Pad, Reckitt Pro Solutions, Ryman, SC Johnson Professional, Uni Mitsubishi Pencil Company, and Viking. 

Our Individual Patrons are Gareth Farrell, Steve Haworth, Steve Hilleard and Phil Jones MBE, Gordon Christiansen

If you require any further information, please feel free to contact us at info@BOSSCharity.org  on 01924 203 338.

Thank You!

Name: buero.de Gruppe
Description:
Während unsere Domain buero.de zu den ersten Internetadressen zählte, die in Deutschland registriert wurde, ist unser Unternehmen nicht nur jung geblieben, sondern tatsächlich jung. So wurde beispielsweise der 26.08. als Gründungstag gewählt. Es wäre im Jahr 2021 der 66. Geburtstag unseres Ideengebers – oder wie man Neudeutsch so schön sagen würde Mastermind – Udo D. Schön gewesen. Er gehörte mit der Registrierung der Domain www.buero.de zu den Pionieren des Internets. 

Weit vor anderen Unternehmen erkannte er die Chance, die sich perspektivisch im Onlinehandel bieten würde. Sein unternehmerisches Vermächtnis führt die Familie Schön – Gesellschafter und Geschäftsführer der Vermögensverwaltung Schön & Co – fort und wird dabei von einem erfahrenen Team und hoher Fachkunde im Aufsichtsrat der buero.de Handel AG unterstützt.

Ganz nach unserem Unternehmensleitsatz "Büro denkt man so" verstehen wir uns als Komplettanbieter für alles, was Ihren geschäftlichen, unternehmerischen oder behördlichen Erfolg im Büro ausmacht. Mit dieser Expertise sehen wir uns auch als ein optimaler Partner für alle Bürofragen in Ihrem persönlichen Umfeld. Dies reicht von dem Schulbedarf für Ihre Kinder über den privaten Schreibtisch bis hin zu vollständigen Home-Office-Lösungen mit digitalisierten Strukturen für Ihre bisherigen Ordner. Und auch unser Geschenkefinder bietet Ihnen ausgewählte Präsente angefangen mit Spielen und bunten Sachen für die Kita-Kinder bis hin zu modischen Rucksäcken und hochwertigen Stiften.

Dieses umfassende Leistungsangebot mit ca. 60.000 Artikeln im Schulbedarf, Büroartikel, Schulmaterialien, Bürobedarf, Schulsachen, Büromöbel, IT und Netzwerk macht uns unternehmerisch erfolgreich. Unternehmenserfolg ist aber kein Selbstzweck. Daher finden Sie bei uns immer Aktionen, mit denen wir benachteiligte Kinder und Jugendliche unterstützen. Ein wichtiger Partner ist hierbei für uns die gemeinnützige Schön & Co Kinderstiftung. Ähnlich wie buero.de ist dies ein großer Erfolg

Name: Vault Feval
Description:
VAULT FEVAL 
"Seasonal Spirit. Unforgettable Moments."

About Us
Vault Feval is a dynamic, festival-focused brand that thrives on the energy, creativity, and connection found only during the festival season. Operating exclusively during high-impact cultural and music festivals, we specialize in delivering unique, immersive products and experiences designed to elevate the spirit of celebration.

What We Do
From limited-edition merchandise to experiential pop-ups and curated festival essentials, Vault Feval captures the essence of each season with products that are as vibrant, bold, and fleeting as the moments we live for. We partner with top festivals and local creatives to bring fans high-quality offerings that resonate with the mood and magic of the moment.

Why Festival-Only?
Our seasonal-only model allows us to:

Keep offerings fresh, relevant, and limited-edition.

Build exclusive hype and demand around each appearance.

Focus on sustainable, small-batch production that reduces waste.

Immerse ourselves fully in the culture and community of each festival we join.

Brand Values

Creativity: We thrive on bold designs and one-of-a-kind experiences.

Connection: We’re about people—music lovers, artists, creators, and free spirits.

Sustainability: Mindful production, local sourcing, and waste-conscious operations.

Authenticity: Real products. Real vibes. Real festival moments.

Our Audience
Our community is made up of passionate festivalgoers, trendsetters, and culturally curious individuals who seek more than just a product — they want a memory, a story, and a piece of the festival to take home.

Vision
To be the most loved and anticipated seasonal brand in the festival circuit, leaving a lasting impact long after the music stops.

Name: Lifestyle Office & Home Furniture
Description:
Lifestyle Office Furniture was established in May 2005 by our director, Alan James with the sole aim of providing all types of office furniture and stationery with a quality service at affordable prices. We wanted to take the experience gained within the industry and implement the best parts of what had been learnt over numerous years within the sales environment. 

Now, 16+ years on the company is going from strength to strength - we have kept our core values and are very proud that it is still a family run business based in North Devon but now supplying our new and existing client base both locally and UK wide.

In 2017 the decision was made to offer my son, Steven a job within the business to not only work on the office furniture side but to help build a separate part to the business in terms of household furniture, mattresses and electrical items to break into the home supply market. 

This has been an amazing instant success - we now have our own sign-written vehicles and deliver anything ourselves so you can get to meet us face to face and are not just a faceless internet based company!

OFFICE FURNITURE - If you require anything from an additional office chair to a complete office move or refit, an extra filing cabinet to space planning CAD drawings, we can help! Call us 01271 624450. We offer a delivery and installation service with all our products.

Name: PerfectGift.com
Description:
PerfectGift.com is the first gifting platform focused on the gifting experience between two people.  The culmination of over 20 years in the gift card industry, PerfectGift.com reinvented traditional “gift cards” offering fast, flexible, and fully customizable digital & physical solutions serving millions of consumers and 10% of Fortune 500 businesses. 

Since its inception in 1994, the gift card industry’s only progress has been a digital card option.  PerfectGift.com has revolutionized the model with a proprietary platform that empowers users to create personalized gifting experiences like never before.  And most importantly… more secure for recipients and fraud free. 
 
From customizable physical and digital Visa gift cards to hundreds of merchant options, PerfectGift.com provides recipients with unparalleled choice and personalization. For those who prefer ultimate flexibility, PerfectGift+ allows recipients to instantly choose their perfect gift… merchant cards, VISA cards, or a cash transfer.

For businesses, PerfectGift.com provides the most sought-after incentive and recognition solutions on a flexible, robust, secure platform.  PerfectGift.com is the only source of instant digital and same-day physical shipments of fully custom Visa & Mastercard, and every major retail gift card.  PerfectGift.com’s competitive pricing and the industry’s only 365-day personal service makes rewarding employees, thanking clients, or celebrating milestones extraordinary.

PerfectGift is a subsidiary of Wolfe.com. As an e-commerce trail blazer since 1995, Wolfe and its leadership team have provided companies with over $1 billion in corporate gift card rewards and incentives. 
 
As an industry leader, PerfectGift is a participating member of the Incentive Gift Card Council (IGCC), Incentive Marketing Association (IMA), the Retail Gift Card Association (RGCA) and Gift Card Network.

Name: Empório Cultural
Description:
Com uma trajetória de mais de 50 anos, a Empório Cultural se destaca como uma referência no setor de livraria e papelaria na região de Bauru, no coração de São Paulo.
Nossa jornada começou humilde, inicialmente produzindo e vendendo apostilas para os alunos da Faculdade de Direito. Essa dedicação inicial conquistou gradualmente a confiança dos clientes, levando à abertura da nossa primeira loja física.
Ao longo dos anos, expandimos nossa oferta para atender uma ampla gama de necessidades, crescendo para nos tornarmos uma loja maior e mais diversificada. Hoje, após décadas de trabalho árduo e dedicação, nossas lojas oferecem mais de 40 mil itens cuidadosamente selecionados. Desde livros e artigos de papelaria até produtos de informática, brinquedos e artesanatos, nosso catálogo é rico e diversificado.
Nossa missão é promover a cultura e a educação, e fazemos isso oferecendo um vasto acervo de títulos nacionais e internacionais. Nosso compromisso inabalável com a excelência e a satisfação do cliente nos impulsiona a evoluir continuamente, adaptando-nos às demandas do mercado em constante mudança.
Com muito trabalho, amor no que estava se construindo, aos poucos ganhamos credibilidade junto a nossos clientes, com isso conquistamos nossa primeira loja física.
No decorrer do tempo percebendo a grande procura por livros e materiais escolares, fomos aumentando o número de itens, se fez necessário mudarmos para uma loja maior, possibilitando atender nossos clientes e trazer cada vez mais novidades. Trabalhando com materiais de escritório e informática abrangendo novos setores transformando nossa loja mais completa.
Não importa do que você precise, estaremos aqui para lhe proporcionar uma experiência incrível e inigualável com essas e muito mais mercadorias para atender sua necessidade. Hoje somos referência com mais de 10 lojas distribuídas no estado de São Paulo (em São José do Rio Preto, Botucatu e Marilia).

Name: Conceptstore
Description:
Dal 1986 siamo punto di riferimento per Bolzano e tutto il nord Italia nel settore delle forniture all'ingrosso di cancelleria e arredo ufficio con il brand Conter Forniture.
 
Nel 2014 apre Conter Store, il punto vendita di Bolzano con un'esposizione di oltre 1300mq su 3 piani dedicata al materiale per scuola e ufficio, decorazione e belle arti, hobby creativi, oggettistica, e articoli da regalo. 
Il negozio offre anche un ampio spazio per laboratori, corsi e workshop per adulti e bambini.

Dal 2024 la gestione si rinnova e nasce il brand Ithesia Store, che conserva la location storica del negozio e coniuga la qualità e l'affidabilità del marchio Conter alla ricerca di prodotti innovativi, sostenibili e sempre attenti alle esigenze di consumatori privati, aziende e comunità.

Dal 2026 Ithesia Store evolve e diventa Conceptstore.
Un cambiamento che nasce da una visione più ampia e da un percorso costruito nel tempo, come un punto di riferimento unico per ufficio, scuola, creatività e regalistica, dove ogni proposta è frutto di una scelta consapevole.

È la nostra nuova direzione, pensata per offrire soluzioni concrete e dare valore a ciò che accompagna il lavoro e la quotidianità di persone, professionisti e aziende.

Name: givelove.lt
Description:
Meilės korporacija

Daugiametė patirtis mus išmokė neieškoti vienadienės naudos ir pirmenybę teikti ilgalaikių santykių su klientais kūrimui. Nežadame to, ko negalime padaryti. Tačiau siekiame gerokai praplėsti Jūsų vaizduotę ir galimybių ribas. Pradedant idėjų generavimu, kūrybiniais sprendimais, produkcijos atranka, baigiant ženklinimu, originaliu pakavimu ir savalaikiu užsakymų pristatymu. Viskas tam, kad meilės versle būtų daugiau.

Didžiausias GiveLove įkvėpimo šaltinis esate Jūs, mūsų klientai. Didžiuojamės turėdami galimybę jau daugelį metų dirbti su IT, logistikos, žemės ūkio, prekybos ir kt. sektorių lyderiais.

Ilgametė draugystė su inovatyviai mąstančiomis bendrovėmis leidžia dar geriau pažinti ir perprasti kiekvienos organizacijos vidinę kultūrą bei pasiūlyti unikalius verslo drabužių bei verslo dovanų sprendimus. Jūsų verslo rezultatai bei sektorinė lyderystė yra puikus įrodymas, jog „korporatyvinė meilė“ egzistuoja. Veikia. Ir atsiperka su kaupu.

Daugiau meilės Jūsų versle.

Description:
Dal 1986 ci occupiamo di gadget, oggettistica da regalo, abbigliamento professionale e antinfortunistica.

La nostra storia inizia più di 30 anni fa da Giacomo Baldini, uno dei primi, in Italia ad intuire le nuove frontiere che la società dell’informazione avrebbe aperto alla comunicazione aziendale.

Conclusa la sua attività professionale di elicotterista, ufficiale della Guardia di Finanza, nel 1985, raggiunta l’età pensionabile, decide di mettere alla prova le sue attitudini alla vendita, unendole, già allora a quei principi che oggi contraddistinguono sul mercato globale le cosiddette “aziende etiche”: onestà, lealtà, correttezza professionale e buona fede nei rapporti coi propri partner e fornitori.

La Baldo Promotion spicca sul mercato per la sua ricca e fantasiosa commercializzazione e produzione di gadget di ogni tipo e valore: bandiere, penne, agende, calendari, cappellini, t-shirt, borse, portachiavi, caramelle, bandane, sciarpe, cravatte, foulard, distintivi, crest, palloncini, calcolatrici, orologi da polso e da parete, ma anche abbigliamento da lavoro e antinfortunistica. Tutti gli articoli trattati sono certificati e garantiti.

Nel corso degli anni ha investito sul l’online con 4 e-commerce:

ingrosso-oggettistica.it

baldofarma.it

Description:
De Pluim is een cadeaukaart, maar dan een tikkeltje anders. Bij ons draait het om genieten. Ontspanning na inspanning, noemen we dat. Want iedereen heeft toch recht op een beetje ontspanning? Met de Pluim geef je een cadeau waarmee iemand optimaal kan genieten van zijn of haar vrije tijd. 
 
Groot assortiment
Hoe fijn is het om collega’s of werknemers een cadeau te geven wat diegene écht graag wil hebben of doen? Een cadeau waar je iemand gegarandeerd blij mee maakt? Met de Pluim kan dat! De ontvanger kiest namelijk zelf wat hij of zij wil. En met honderden landelijke attracties, lokale uitjes, evenementen of leuke dingen voor thuis, valt de Pluim altijd in de smaak. Van lekker uiteten tot een ontspannende massage en van een dagje dierentuin tot een verzorgende douchegel van Rituals. 
 
Persoonlijk cadeau
Met de Pluim ervaar je het gemak van een cadeaukaart, maar niet het onpersoonlijke. Je kan hem namelijk naar eigen wens samenstellen. Kies een favoriete omslag, voeg jouw logo of foto toe en schrijf een persoonlijke boodschap voor de ontvanger. Zo geef je een keuzecadeau net dat beetje extra!

Name: Grillé
Description:
On a remis les mots fléchés au goût du jour !

À force de secouer nos cahiers de mots fléchés pleins de sable, on a eu envie de secouer un peu les grilles elles-mêmes !

Nous c’est Louise et Dior, et on s’est mis en tête de mettre notre propre cahier de mots fléchés, Grillé, dans tous les sacs de plage cet été.

On a gardé les références vieillottes qu’on adore, et glissé celles qu’on vit aujourd’hui. On y a mis des bouts d’histoire, des morceaux de chansons, des souvenirs de fête, des choses qu’on mange, d’autres qu’on ressent, et sûrement des mots dont tu ignorais l’existence.

On l’a imaginé pour celles et ceux qui veulent s’évader autrement, loin des écrans - et garder les mains occupées, les esprits légers, les cœurs un peu plus proches.

Name: Purple and Pure
Description:
Welcome to Purple and Pure. We design and customize sustainable, eco-friendly, plantable seed gifts that positively impact the environment. Each of our stylishly designed personal and corporate gifts are carefully sourced and made with durable and biodegradable materials to reduce single-use plastic waste. Our plantable seed gifts are created with environmental sustainability in mind and, when planted in soil, sprout beautiful flowers, vegetables and herbs. Not only are all our products environmentally conscious, but they are also ethically produced by underprivileged women in India who receive fair wages and opportunities for personal growth. Purple and Pure is committed to promoting sustainability and social responsibility while creating a healthier world for people and the planet.

We also offer a range of grocery bags, tote bags, and multipurpose pouches made with organic cotton, perfect for shopping. All our products are GOTS certified organic cotton. GOTS is a textile production certification that limits the use of toxic bleaches, dyes, and other chemical inputs during the production process of textiles. It assures consumers that textiles are truly organic, non-toxic, and made in a way that respects poor farmers and the Earth.

The name 'Purple & Pure' reflects our aspiration to work magic in preserving the purity and beauty of our planet Earth.

 Social Enterprise Certified by RaiSE 
 Featured in Honeycombers, ZaoBao
 Successfully saved 900kg of plastic usage and prevented the cutting of 9-10 trees
 Recycled 360kg of paper waste and 960kg of cotton waste 

Fulfill your company's social and sustainable gifting goals with Purple & Pure—reach out to us via email hello@purpleandpure.com to make a positive impact today! Together, we can create a more just and equitable society for all.

Name: NRDLIFE Analiz Sistemleri ve Promosyon Ürünleri
Description:
NRDLIFE ailesi olarak biz; sizlere ve değer verdiğiniz kişilere en az sizler kadar önem veriyoruz. Bu nedenle başka bir yerde bulamayacağınız kadar özel, ilginç, sizi ve karşınızdaki kişiyi tatmin edecek hediyeleri sunmaktan büyük mutluluk duyuyoruz.

Duygularınızı eşsiz bir şekilde ifade etmek, sevdiğiniz kişilere unutamayacakları bir an yaşatmak için yıldönümü, doğum günü gibi özel günlerin yanı sıra sevgilinize, annenize, babanıza, arkadaşlarınıza, evinize ve kendinize alabileceğiniz ilginç, anlamlı ve “kişiye özel” seçenekler ile yüzlerce hediyeyi sizlerle buluşturuyoruz. Siz siparişinizi veriyorsunuz; biz de siz müşterilerimize özel olarak hazırlıyor, özenle paketliyoruz.

Hızlı teslimat ve yüzde yüz güvenli alışveriş ayrıcalığı ile farklı olabilme hazzı ve zaman kaybı olmadan doğru ürünü bulma mutluluğu vazgeçilmeziniz olacak. Nrdlife.net Online hediye ihtiyacınızı en hızlı ve uygun koşullar ile size sunmak üzere tasarlanmıştır. Her türlü hediye fikirlerinizi hayata geçirebileceğiniz özgün ve yenilikçi seçenekler ile özel gün ve kutlamalarınızı sizin için en keyifli hale getirmeyi hedefler.

Nrdlife.net olarak amacımız ; En kaliteli ürünleri internet kullanıcısına sunmak ve hediye arayışıyla geçirilen zamanı en aza indirgemektir. İnternetten yapılan satışlarımız ve kurumsal hediye projelerimiz sayesinde, hediye seçimlerinizi mümkün olduğu kadar kolaylaştırmak ve zevkli hale getirmek en önemli ilkemizdir.

Name: Moonbeam Magic
Description:
Moonbeam Magic was born from a simple yet deeply personal belief — that gifts should feel like a hug, not a formality.

What began as an intention to make gifting more thoughtful has evolved into a curation-led gifting studio, built for people who believe that what you give should reflect how you feel. At Moonbeam Magic, every gift is designed around three things that matter most: your budget, your intention, and the message you want your gift to carry. We don’t believe in random assortments or one-size-fits-all hampers. We believe in meaningful curation — gifts that feel personal, considered, and quietly powerful.

Here, you don’t shop from a catalogue.
You share a feeling. A purpose. A moment that matters.

From there, we translate your story into a beautifully curated gifting experience. Each piece is hand-picked with care, chosen for both meaning and usefulness, and brought together through refined packaging and thoughtful details. Every element — from textures and tones to notes and finishing touches — is intentional, because we know that the smallest details often leave the strongest impressions.

Moonbeam Magic exists for those who see gifting as more than a transaction. For people who want their gifts to speak for them — to express gratitude, love, pride, comfort, or celebration in ways that feel sincere and lasting. Our work is rooted in empathy, taste, and understanding — ensuring that every gift makes the recipient feel seen, valued, and genuinely appreciated.

Whether it’s a quiet gesture or a milestone moment, we approach every curation with the same care and respect it deserves. Because we believe that the right gift doesn’t just arrive beautifully — it lingers in memory.

At Moonbeam Magic, gifting isn’t about buying something.

It’s about leaving something behind.

Because in our world, gifting isn’t a purchase —
it’s a signature.

Name: Badisch Kischd - die Geschenkbox aus Baden
Description:
Regionales Schenken kann mit uns so einfach sein!

Mit unserer Badisch Kischd bieten wir genau hierfür die passende Lösung. Eine schick designte Geschenkbox gefüllt mit wunderbaren regionalen Köstlichkeiten aus Baden. 

Alle Leckereien in den Kischden (Kisten) beziehen wir direkt bei kleineren Lieferanten, zumeist Familienbetrieben, die mit Leidenschaft und in Tradition ihre Produkte herstellen. 

Wir pflegen mit unseren Lieferanten partnerschaftliche Beziehungen und sind stolz, ein besonderes Netzwerk mit exzellenten Manufakturen aufgebaut zu haben. Das ist unser Garant für Qualität. 
So wird nicht nur der Empfang der Badisch Kischd für Überraschung sorgen, sondern auch der Genuss jedes einzelnen Produkts selbst. Ja, solch herrliche Köstlichkeiten hat unser sonnenverwöhntes Baden zu bieten. 

Wir freuen uns Ihnen beim Beschenken Ihrer Mitarbeiter/Kund:innen unterstützen zu können – gerne auch mit persönlicher Grußkarte. Ob zu Weihnachten, zu Jubiläen, zum Onboarding - die Badisch Kischd ist für jeden Anlass eine gelungenes Geschenk. 

Viel Spaß beim Schenken,
Stefan & Michael

Name: ReBlock Notebooks
Description:
Unser Herz schlägt für Papier und bereits 2006, als der Gründer von ReBlock, Tali Tormoche, noch Redakteur bei einer Zeitung war, hat dieser festgestellt, dass zu viel davon weggeworfen wird. 

Es wurde dadurch schon damals und wird heute noch immer jede Menge Müll produziert. Außerdem erfordert Papier einen hohen Energieaufwand im Recycling Prozess, wenn es wenigstens artgerecht im Papiercontainer entsorgt wird. 

Aber nicht mit uns. Denn wiederverwenden lautet die Devise. Daher führen wir  eine neue Nutzungsebene ein und verlängern den Lebenszyklus des Papiers. 

Die Idee ist also, Blätter die noch eine leere, beschreibbare Seite haben, vor dem Papierkorb zu retten und schicke Notizbücher daraus zu machen.

Kopien, Ausdrucke und handbeschriebene Zettel, die keiner mehr benötigt, werden von Schulen, Kinos, Restaurants, Architekturbüros, Agenturen, Industriebetrieben, Studenti:innen und Privatpersonen für uns gesammelt – an dieser Stelle ein großes DANKE an unsere Sammelpartner.  

Diese Blätter erleben ihren zweiten Frühling, denn wir verhelfen den leeren B-Seiten zu ihrem großen Auftritt in einem ReBlock – dem wohl nachhaltigsten Notizblock der Welt. 

Auch alten Büchern, die sonst weggeworfen werden, hauchen wir neues Leben ein. Von uns bekommen sie ein ReBlock-Herz und die Gelegenheit als Hardcover-Notizbuch zu glänzen.   

Alle Modelle werden in Handarbeit hergestellt. Das heißt wir sortieren und mischen Blätter verschiedenster Herkunft, damit jedes Notizbuch abwechslungsreiche Geschichten erzählen kann. Darüberhinaus begutachten und kontrollieren wir jedes einzelne Blatt manuell, um dem Datenschutz Genüge zu tun. Die Endfertigung erfolgt schließlich bei lokalen Buchbinder:innen in Graz und Graz Umgebung. 

Et voilà – jeder ReBlock ist ein Unikat, aber vor allem ein Quell der Inspiration. Die rechten Seiten sind zum Schreiben da und die linken laden zum Schmökern ein. 

Jedes Blatt verdient eine zweite Chance.

De ce să alegi Autograf?
 Poți să vezi și să testezi în magazinele noastre, inclusiv online, o selecție de produse de papetărie de o calitate ireproșabilă, la prețuri mai prietenoase decât te aștepți!

 Zero timp pierdut. Zero bătăi de cap. Nu știi de ce ai nevoie pentru școală? Te ajutăm noi! În magazinele Autograf și pe autograf.ro găsești absolut tot ce ai nevoie și știi de la început care este necesarul orientativ de rechizite pentru fiecare an școlar, inclusiv pentru grădiniță!

 În caz de nevoie, suntem gata să-ți oferim asistență pentru a alege produsele care ți se potrivesc cel mai bine, atât în magazinele fizice, cât și online!

 Peste 8 000 produse din magazinul nostru online sunt disponibile pentru livrare în 24 de ore! Convinge-te singur și comandă online!

 Beneficiezi de transport GRATUIT pentru comenzile mai mari de 100 de lei pentru București și 250 lei pentru restul țării.

 Ai garanția calității. Doar produse de la branduri cunoscute, care fac ceea ce promit!

 Cumperi fără niciun risc. Poți returna gratuit produsul în decurs de 14 zile calendaristice.

 Te bucuri de cel mai bun raport calitate-preț și de oferte speciale la sute de produse și online, și în magazine.

Here’s why leading businesses and individuals choose us:
One-Stop Solution – From the first need of life to the last, we provide a complete range of materials, office supplies, and corporate products.

Customer-Centric Approach – Our focus is not just on trading, but on building long-term partnerships by offering the right product at the right time.
Value Creation – Guided by our tagline “Connecting Markets, Creating Value”, we bridge gaps between suppliers and buyers while ensuring maximum benefit for all stakeholders.
Trust & Commitment – With transparent practices and dedicated service, we stand as a trusted partner for businesses and individuals alike.de
At Takshvi Tradelink, we don’t just supply products – we deliver trust, quality, and value.
Our Vision
To be the most trusted and comprehensive trading partner, connecting markets with quality products and creating lasting value for every customer. We aspire to simplify access to essentials and specialized solutions, while building long-term relationships and contributing to the success of businesses and individuals.
Our Mission

Through our strong manufacturer network, customer-first approach, and transparent practices, we strive to ensure the right product reaches the right place at the right time, creating sustainable growth and value for all stakeholders.

Name: ScorpionGifts.com
Description:
A quick brief,

After 12+ years of expertise in the gifting domain in India, Scorpion Gifts set its footprints in the USA from 2024.

Scorpion Gifts - A Corporate Gifting Company

What do we do?

1. We digitize Promotional Products to provide solutions for the "thankless and time-consuming" job of marketers from Sourcing, branding, and delivery to clients' doorsteps or directly to their tradeshows. (Eg. Swag Kits, Awards, T-Shirts, Key Chains, Gift Sets, etc.,).
2. We aspire to become a one-shop stop for the promotional products industry.

How do we do?

1. We have collaborated 2400+ manufacturers & consolidators across USA to bring 1 Million+ Promotional Product options through our website www.scorpiongifts.com

2. Exclusive website for Promotional Products, providing comprehensive options from 50 Cents to $100+ to suit varied budgets.

What is the benefit or How are we different?

1. No App to download, No Registrations required, No Catalogues or images sent on E-Mail. All products with tabular pricing and virtual samples are available on the website.
2. If you feel our website is overwhelming, you can opt for our FREE Concierge Services, by just filling up a form on the website with your requirements and we can make custom collections and provide you with links saving you a lot of turnaround time. 
3. All our services are through the Cloud and Client Specific Collections are made to each client, from Product collections, and quotes to approvals, at a single place for easy reference  & decision-making. 

Key Offerings:

Apparel (T-shirts, Polos, Jackets)
Tech Products (USB Drives, Power Banks, Bluetooth Speakers)
Drinkware (Water Bottles, Tumblers, Mugs)
Office Supplies and Bags (Backpacks, Tote Bags)
Tradeshow Giveaways & Corporate Swag Kits

We offer tailor-made promotional products to boost brand awareness for various industries, including non-profit organizations, marketing agencies, and event management teams

Contact us- mohan@scorpiongifts.com

Description:
We design, manufacture and sell everyday items that features God’s Word.We seek to create exciting and beautiful designs because we have found that following Christ is an exciting and beautiful way to live. Our products are handmade with love.  We pray that you are blessed by them.  

Praus - (prah-ooce') The Greek word for meek. A grace of the soul that accepts God's way as best and His dealings as good and so is obedient to Him. It is a military term to describe the resolute focus and discipline of a powerful war horse, trained to obey every command of its rider, no matter how great the confusion of battle. Praus was one of the defining qualities of Christ and His life. May this be true of us also.

Name: United Workplace Supplies
Description:
From construction and financial services to industrial operations and beyond, United Workplace Supplies helps UK organisations simplify their procurement and consolidate essential workplace products through one trusted partner.

We supply everything you need to run your workplaces — from Office Essentials, Facilities Supplies, and Workplace Furniture to Workwear, Safety & PPE, Branded & Promotional items, and Technology.

  Vantage is a proprietary cost-control solution offering a free, no-obligation review of your indirect spend.

Our proprietary process identifies opportunities to reduce unnecessary costs, consolidate vendors, and streamline procurement processes. By reducing your supplier base, United Workplace Supplies simplifies operations and unlocks significant savings. At the same time, those benefits boost your profitability. With no hidden fees, we handle the rest—delivering everything you need seamlessly and cost-effectively. Experience total cost control with Vantage.

  Secure 24/7 access. Full control. Real-time visibility.

With personalised dashboards, budget controls, and real-time data, UnitedHub simplifies ordering across every product category – from PPE and office tech to facilities, catering, and beyond.

It’s procurement, done properly: efficient, accountable, and tailored to your business.

Wij bieden scherpe prijzen maar zijn niet de allergoedkoopste. De beste service, het breedste gamma, professionele kennis en persoonlijke ontzorging, daar staan wij elke ochtend voor op!
Onder hetzelfde dak zit onze buurtwinkel Cyaan & Co waar je alles kan vinden voor gemak en plezier (oa pers, boeken en strips, speelgoed, gifts, feestartikelen, wenskaarten, droogkuis, pakjesdiensten, ...)
We bieden verder nog een aantal nevendiensten aan:
* printen van nummerplaten
* vervangen van horlogebatterijen
* financiële diensten van Bpost, Western Union en Nickel
* pakjesdiensten van Bpost Postpunt, Mondial Relay en DHL Express
* kwaliteitssigaren (in de humidor)

Kom naar onze winkel en laat je helpen door ons team of check onze webshops online.

Het idee achter Cyaan & Co is om een gediversifieerd, lokaal dienstenpunt te zijn en een ankerpunt in (groot-)Wilsele. We werken rond de twee assen KANTOOR en GEMAK/PLEZIER.
Onze lokale verankering betekent dat wij zorgen voor lokale werkgelegenheid (van 18 tot 67 jaar), dat wij plaats bieden aan stagiairs van scholen en mensen in reïntegratietrajecten en dat wij de lokale verenigingen sponsoren en ondersteunen. We willen faciliteren dat mensen kunnen connecteren in onze buurtwinkel en ontzorgd/gedepanneerd worden voor producten en diensten rond kantoor, gemak en plezier.

Name: Pahaad Se
Description:
At Pahaad Se, every gift tells a story — a story of culture, craft, and the quiet strength of mountain women.
As someone who has always loved to travel, I found myself deeply moved by the places I visited — especially the mountains. In every village, I discovered something extraordinary: handcrafted soaps made with care, salt blends full of flavor and tradition, chai masala passed down through generations, and women quietly creating beauty with their hands — yet hidden from the world.
That’s when the idea sparked: why not give these makers the platform they deserve, and bring the essence of the mountains into the world of corporate gifting?
With Pahaad Se, we curate hampers that are more than just gifts — they are experiences. Each box includes Pahaadi salts, hand-blended chai masala, fragrant candles, crochet keychains, chocolates, cookies, handcrafted soaps, bamboo toothbrushes, hemp coin pouches, incense sticks, seed pouches, and coasters — all sustainably made, ethically sourced, and rooted in local culture.
We work hand-in-hand with women from Himalayan villages, supporting their crafts and helping them earn with dignity and pride. Their traditions live on through every product we offer.
Our packaging reflects our promise — eco-friendly, plastic-free, and low-waste, using corrugated kraft boxes, natural fillers, and handwritten notes to create something meaningful and memorable.
Because at Pahaad Se, we don’t just create gifts — we build connections:
	•	Between brands and people, through thoughtful, curated hampers.
	•	Between culture and commerce, by celebrating local heritage.	   
        •	Between purpose and progress, by empowering women from the hills.
Whether you’re welcoming clients, celebrating milestones, or appreciating your team — choose gifts that are mindful, impactful, and straight from the mountains.
 Pahaad Se – Eco-Luxury Hampers That Leave a Lasting Impression.

At Krisayu we recognize and celebrate the profound interconnectedness of indigenous knowledge, farming, food, crafts, and people at the grassroot level. We believe that the magic of our land lies in the unique blend of these three elements, and that they are deeply intertwined with our cultural identity. Our aim is to honor farmers, artisans and craftsmen not only custodians of nature but the greatest protectors of our rich agricultural legacy. 

Our unique range of gifting includes healthy and nutritious snacks made with millets, artisanal food products, indigenous farm crafts, Sustainable Cutlery & Crockery, Spices, Range of Tea’s, Wellness & Ayurveda products. 

Our gifts are a true representation our rich legacy and celebration of the ingenuity, creativity, and resilience of our farming, culinary, and craft communities. 

We cater to corporates, business events, institutions, and social events. 

Come, join us on a journey to discover the treasures and traditions of India's agricultural, culinary, and craft heritage with Krisayu!

Name: Miracles of Neem Karoli Baba
Description:
Neem Karoli Baba, also known as Maharaj-ji, was a revered Indian spiritual teacher and mystic, particularly known for his teachings on love, service, and compassion. Born around 1900 in Uttar Pradesh, India, he inspired thousands of followers, both in India and abroad, including notable figures like Ram Dass, Steve Jobs, and Mark Zuckerberg. Maharaj-ji was a devotee of Hanuman, the Hindu deity symbolizing selfless devotion and strength, and emphasized a simple yet profound message: "Love everyone, serve everyone, remember God."

Neem Karoli Baba’s approach was informal and down-to-earth, often sharing wisdom through stories, humor, and parables. He avoided institutionalization, leaving no formal lineage or teachings in writing, and instead led by example, showing the power of love and kindness through his actions. His legacy lives on in the work of his devotees and in several ashrams established in his honor, with the most famous one located in Kainchi Dham, Uttarakhand.

Name: Pinnacle Enterprises
Description:
1. Customized Gift Selection: You work closely with corporate clients to understand their gifting objectives and preferences. This includes identifying the purpose of the gifts (e.g., employee recognition, client appreciation, event giveaways) and helping clients choose the right gifts that align with their branding and message.

2. Branding and Personalization: Your services often include the customization and personalization of gifts. This may involve adding company logos, branding elements, or personal touches to make the gifts unique and reflective of the client's identity.

3. Product Sourcing: You source a wide variety of gift items, from traditional items like gift baskets, promotional merchandise, and luxury items to more specialized and unique options that cater to the specific tastes and interests of the recipients.

4. Quality Assurance: Ensuring the quality of the gifts is a crucial aspect of your role. You work with reputable suppliers and perform quality checks to guarantee that the gifts meet the client's standards and expectations.

5. Budget Management: You assist clients in managing their gifting budget effectively, helping them find the right balance between cost and the perceived value of the gifts.

6. Fulfillment and Delivery: Your services often extend to the logistical aspect of gift delivery. You coordinate the packaging, wrapping, and timely delivery of gifts to the intended recipients, whether they are employees, clients, or attendees of corporate events.

7. Relationship Building: Corporate gifts are often used as a tool to strengthen relationships and show appreciation. Your role is to help clients create meaningful connections with their stakeholders through thoughtful and well-chosen gifts.

8. Trend Awareness: Staying updated on the latest trends in corporate gifting is essential. This includes being aware of eco-friendly options, innovative gift ideas, and sustainability practices that align with the values of modern businesses.

Name: Rue Rangoli
Description:
Bienvenue dans l'univers du upcycling engagé où recyclage et solidarité riment avec design et esthétique !

Nos créations sont toutes issues d’une démarche associant un savant mélange de cultures, de savoir-faire et de design. Fabriquées à partir de matériaux usagés, ou naturels, reposant sur des filières durables que nous vérifions sur le terrain, nous souhaitons leur donner un retentissement économique pérenne.
Tous nos artisans/designers sont des femmes et des hommes passionnés qui mettent leur savoir-faire au service de la planète. Ils forment des artisans ou des personnes issus de milieux fragiles ou exclus pour faire émerger leur créativité,  leur permettre de vivre de leur talent et leur redonner autonomie et dignité.

Le Label Rue Rangoli
Nous allons directement à la rencontre de nos artisans en France et dans le monde qui ont une approche à la fois créative, sociale et innovante. Sans intermédiaires, nous nouons des partenariats pour les accompagner à passer d’une économie de survie à une économie solide et circulaire. Nous diffusons leurs produits, les aidons à consolider leurs filières, à imaginer de nouveaux produits ou à les adapter pour répondre aux modes de consommation actuelles.

Un impact positif et mesurable
Rue Rangoli compte aujourd’hui une douzaine de partenaires, en Europe, en Asie et en Afrique permettant à plus de 100 personnes (familles) d’en vivre. Quelques chiffres pour illustrer l’impact environnemental : 350 bouteilles de soda recyclés par jour en Afrique du Sud, 15 tonnes de plastiques en Italie, 164000 kg de bouses d’éléphants en Inde, 25000 journaux, 10 000 posters de cinéma transformés, 25 tonnes de pneus recyclés en Inde, …

Le Lifestyle Made in Rue Rangoli, upcycling, zérodéchet et épicerie fine anti-gaspi
Nous vous offrons une nouvelle expérience de consommation écologique qui vous rendra acteur du changement et qui conjugue plaisir, tendance et fierté de disposer d’un produit unique, beau, qui a une âme.

Our Mission
Our mission is simple yet profound: to be a part of everyone’s walls. Our Vision

Products
From sleek tech accessories to versatile bags, every item in our catalog is designed with two things in mind: your brand and the environment. We take pride in our award-winning designs, which have garnered recognition across the industry for their ingenuity and impact.

ESG

Name: Zuriell
Description:
Zuriell ofera un nou concept de agende din piele.

A fost construit pe baza unor valori care ne implica in comunitate. Exista o componenta sociala prin care oferim locuri de munca persoanelor care provin din medii vulnerabile, trafic uman sau abuz domestic. Asadar, Zuriell este asamblata de aceste doamne minunate care si-au recapatat increderea in sine.

Utilizarea acesteia, creaza o experienta placuta si pe termen lung. Oferind eficienta in organizare, o imagine de sine foarte buna, reusind sa atraga  atentia celor din jur intr-un mod foarte pozitiv si lasa creativitatea sa se dezlantuie foarte libera prin schitare sau o aranjare in pagina preferata.

Agenda Zuriell functioneaza pe baza de rezerve arhivabile si se poate personaliza, procedeul folosit fiind gravura laser. Exista si optiunea de Zuriell Planner, care este tocmai bun pentru a dezvolta o disciplina a unei bune organizari, impreuna cu Zuriell Planner, task-urile vor fi rezolvate mult mai rapid.

Este disponibila in doua marimi, A5 si A6.  Avand  patru tipuri de hartie: liniar, punctat, velin sau patratele, se poate alege hartia preferata.

Prin acest nou concept, dorim sa reinviem pasiunea de a scrie de mana si cel mai mult ne dorim ca implicarea noastra in comunitate sa aduca o schimbare vizibila.

Hai si tu sa fii parte din solutie. Impreuna facem diferenta!
