The name ‘The Wild Glen’ was developed with three things in mind – the location of the business being Glenealy, Co Wicklow, the mind itself being overwhelmed and a little ‘Wild’ in need of some care and rest and finally nature and earth being key to our products. ‘The Wild Glen’ seemed to capture the essence of all these elements.

The beauty of nature and its grounding properties are at the core of this small family business as is the joy of giving gifts that will capture peoples hearts.

AAll our candles are made using EcoSystem Rapeseed & Coconut (RCX) natural wax blend.  This wax is made from rapeseed oil and coconut oil and nothing else.  It is completely free from paraffin, soy, palm, beeswax and synthetic additives. Unlike traditional paraffin wax candles, our candles are non-toxic and do not release harmful chemicals when burned. In addition, they burn longer and cleaner, meaning they produce less soot and residue. Our fragrance oils which we mix with the wax are sourced locally from Bomar Aromatherapy in Kilcoole, Co. Wicklow, all of which are derived from high-quality synthetic ingredients.

Name: Giftić Pokloni
Description:
Mi smo Giftić, tim koji se bavi kreiranjem unikatnih poklon setova od isključivo domaćih srpskih proizvoda male manufakture, sa ciljem da iznenadimo i obradujemo svakog primaoca na poseban način. Naša ponuda je idealna za korporativne poklone, poslovne poklone za klijente, partnere i zaposlene, kao i za individualne poklone koji ostavljaju trajan utisak.
Svi naši setovi su pažljivo osmišljeni, sa ljubavlju upakovani i spremni da dostave osećanje pažnje i luksuza. Naš cilj je da vam uvek pružimo rešenje za brze, personalizovane poklone koji odgovaraju svakoj prilici i svakom ukusu. Takođe, naši pokloni su savršeni za preduzetnike, menadžere, direktore, poslovne saradnike i zaposlne i sve one koji žele da impresioniraju na poslovnom nivou.

Mi smo tim kreativnih ljudi, koji voli da osmišljava iznova i iznova.

Tim koji voli pozitivnu reakciju zadovoljnih klijenata. Tim koji kroz svoje poslovanje, podržava male domaće privrednike. Tim koji u svojoj galeriji ima napisano na papiru „ Only the sky is the limit „ i toga se uvek drži. 

Misija nam je da kreiramo visokokvalitetne, upečatljive poklon pakete koji će našim klijentima izmamiti osmeh. U komunikaciji sa klijentima dizajniramo i razvijamo jedinstvene, brendirane i prilagođene poklone za lične i profesionalne prilike.

Naši klijenti su iz različitih industrija, pa su nam tako sjajnu saradnju pružile određene državne institucije, filmske producentske kuće, marketinške agencije, korporacije i mnogi drugi. Ali ono u čemu najviše uživamo je stvaranje poklona za svakoga ko želi da se poveže, uteši ili čestita - na dubok poseban način.

Name: PRIME
Description:
About Prime
Established in December, 2016 in the capital city of Chhattisgarh – Raipur. PRIME focuses on selling Indian and Imported Food Products.

Concept and Aim

The concept of PRIME is to bring famous International and Quality Domestic Brands for the public both offline and online. We aimed at creating a One-Stop Store for Gourmet Food Range available for Sales and Gifting. Selling Indian and Overseas Food Brands under a single roof, we have a listing of over 5000 products and about 175 different brands currently available. Our versatility is such that we work in 5 different verticals Retail, Distribution, Corporate, Gifting and Online. Along with this we also are working towards building a stable Channel for sales across all our verticals.

Product Mix

The products that PRIME Store targets are the ones which bridge the gap between premium products and conventional food preferences. Also, one of the advancements that is being made is on Healthy and Nutritious Food Product Range. PRIME Store is aware of the latest fad for low calorie and less fattening dishes among the masses. The products promoted, marketed and sold consider the Health Inclinations. To sum it up, PRIME Store Product Range is a wholesome mixture of Nutrition, Taste, Health, Comfort and Quality.

Conclusion

With an aim to deliver the best in food products, PRIME Store is dedicated to modernise the conventional food tastes by keeping the experience of tradition and mixing it with a hint of international standards. Bringing in gourmet food to daily use is no easy task but aim to deliver the best is still the idea. The motive remains that with increasing globalisation in all sectors, Food and Beverages should not be left behind and has to be inculcated among the masses and PRIME assures to that in the coming time.

Name: Pynappel | Brievenbus cadeaus
Description:
Een origineel brievenbus cadeau voor jouw medewerkers of relaties, regelen we! Bedank jouw hardwerkende team met een verrassing op de deurmat en laat je waardering spreken. Of ga voor een uniek relatiegeschenk wat door de brievenbus past om ze te bedanken voor de fijne samenwerking. Van kleine geschenken tot een gepersonaliseerd brievenbus cadeau personeel.

Wil je het cadeau liever zelf overhandigen? Dan stellen we met liefde een cadeaupakket voor jouw medewerkers samen. Maak een keuze uit tal van kwaliteitsproducten met een duurzaam karakter. We verpakken het met liefde en verzegelen ieder cadeaupakket met stijlvol zijdevloeipapier, een droogbloem en een kaartje voor een korte persoonlijke boodschap.

Relatiegeschenk brievenbus pakketten pakken we met veel liefde in met stijlvol zijdevloeipapier, een droogbloem, schrijven er een kaartje bij met jouw persoonlijke tekst en verzegelen de geschenkverpakking als ‘Happy Mail’ of ‘Geluksmomentje’ met onze duurzame stickers. Een mooie mix van duurzaamheid, kwaliteit en gezelligheid. Een origineel brievenbus cadeau personeel waarmee je jouw hardwerkende medewerkers kunt verrassen en je waardering kunt laten spreken.

Ben je enthousiast en wil je graag jouw medewerkers verrassen? Een brievenbus cadeau als verrassing bij ze thuis of cadeaupakket om persoonlijk te overhandigen, we regelen het voor je! Geef jouw aanvraag aan ons door via onderstaand formulier of geef direct een belletje op 06-16000715.

Name: Diskô
Description:
História dos cadernos de discos

Você sabia que este sistema de DISCOS já existe há bastante tempo?!

Esse sistema já existe há algumas décadas e é também conhecido como “Disc binding”, foi originalmente concebido por Andre Tomas e Andre Martin. Em 1948, eles inventaram e patentearam o primeiro sistema de encadernação com discos.

Posteriormente, em 1948, venderam sua patente para Georges Mottart, que se tornou o único produtor na Europa desse tipo de sistema de encadernação até meados da década de 1990, quando a patente expirou.

Atualmente, diversos fabricantes em todo o mundo adotam esse sistema em seus produtos, demonstrando a durabilidade e a relevância contínua do caderno de disco na fabricação de materiais de escrita e organização.

Os discos dos cadernos DISKÔ, são fabricados por nós, sendo exclusivos da nossa marca.

Além disso, destacam-se como os mais funcionais do mercado.

Essa qualidade é refletida em 26 cores disponíveis em dois tamanhos: 24mm e 35mm.

Name: Greentop.hu
Description:
Engedje meg, hogy bemutassam Önnek cégünket, a Greentop.hu-t, amely
elkötelezetten szolgálja ki a vállalkozások irodaellátási szükségleteit Magyarország teljes területén. Több mint 15 éves tapasztalattal a hátunk mögött célunk, hogy ügyfeleink számára gyors, megbízható és minőségi szolgáltatásokat nyújtsunk az irodai ellátás terén.

Cégünk kizárólag a B2B szektor számára kínál megoldásokat, biztosítva, hogy
partnereink mindig a szükséges eszközökkel és anyagokkal rendelkezzenek a
zavartalan munkavégzés érdekében. Szolgáltatásaink közé tartozik az irodaszerek, irodagépek, tisztítószerek, konyhai eszközök és egyéb irodai felszerelések széles választéka, hagyományos és környezetbarát verzióban is.

A greentop.hu-nál kiemelt figyelmet fordítunk arra, hogy ügyfeleink rendeléseit a lehető leggyorsabban teljesítsük. Országos szinten vállaljuk a másnapi munkanapra történő szállítást, biztosítva ezzel a folyamatos és zökkenőmentes ellátást.

Ügyfeleink maximális elégedettsége kiemelkedően fontos számunkra, így igény esetén akár aznapi kiszállítás is elérhető, már 3-5 órán belül Budapesten és vonzáskörzetében.

Termékeink:
Széles körű irodaszer kínálat
Irodagépek és kiegészítők
Tisztítószerek és higiéniai termékek
Munkavédelmi felszerelések
Konyhai eszközök és ellátmányok
Reklám és marketing támogató eszközök

Célunk, hogy partnereink számára ne csupán beszállítók, hanem megbízható
együttműködő partnerek legyünk, akikre bármikor számíthatnak. Büszkék vagyunk rá, hogy a legmagasabb szintű szolgáltatást nyújtjuk, és folyamatosan törekszünk arra, hogy ügyfeleink igényeit maximálisan kielégítsük.

Kérjük, látogasson el honlapunkra a www.greentop.hu weboldalra, ahol bővebb információt találhat termékeinkről és szolgáltatásainkról. Amennyiben kérdése van, vagy személyes konzultációra lenne szüksége, ne habozzon kapcsolatba lépni velünk az info@greentop.hu e-mail címen vagy a 
+36 30 590 2755 telefonszámon.

Description:
At Photolamus, we are passionate about creating unique and personalized caricatures that truly capture the essence of the person being portrayed. We are a 100% hand-drawn caricature drawing service that employs professional artists from all over the world.

Whether you're looking to surprise a loved one with a one-of-a-kind gift or simply looking to add a touch of humor to your social media profile picture, we've got you covered.

We believe that caricatures should not only be funny, but also beautifully crafted and full of life. That's why we work closely with our clients to ensure that their vision is fully realized in every caricature we create.

At Photolamus, we understand that customer satisfaction is paramount. That's why we offer a 100% satisfaction guarantee on all our caricatures. If for any reason you're not completely satisfied with your caricature, we'll work with you to make it right.

We also understand the importance of timely delivery. That's why we offer quick turnaround times without compromising on quality. We work hard to ensure that your caricature is delivered to you in a timely manner, so that you can enjoy it as soon as possible.

In short, at Photolamus, we are committed to providing our clients with the best possible caricature experience. We are passionate about what we do and take pride in our work. We believe that our personalized caricatures make for truly unique and memorable gifts, and we look forward to working with you to bring your ideas to life.

Name: Layana Life GmbH
Description:
Layana Life steht für nachhaltiges und soziales Schenken im Unternehmenskontext. Wir gestalten individuelle Geschenksets für Unternehmen, die mehr sind als nur kleine Aufmerksamkeiten: Sie transportieren Wertschätzung, stärken Beziehungen und schaffen echten Mehrwert.

Unsere Sets werden in sozialen Werkstätten in Deutschland mit viel Sorgfalt verpackt. Unternehmen können über unseren Geschenkset-Konfigurator aus einer Vielzahl an Produkten wählen – von personalisierbaren Werbeartikeln und handgeschriebenen Grußkarten bis hin zu nachhaltigen Snacks und Drinks. Ob Einzelversand oder Großbestellung – wir machen das Schenken einfach, individuell und wirkungsvoll.

Wofür wir stehen:

Nachhaltigkeit: Wir setzen auf umweltfreundliche, ausgewählte Produkte mit Herkunft und Qualität.

Soziale Verantwortung: Unsere Geschenksets entstehen in Werkstätten für Menschen mit Behinderung – mit fairen Arbeitsbedingungen und echter Teilhabe.

Individualität: Jede Geschenkidee kann auf das Unternehmen abgestimmt werden – mit Logo, Branding oder persönlicher Botschaft.

Unsere Vision:
Schenken kann mehr – es kann bewusst, sinnvoll und nachhaltig sein. Deshalb verstehen wir jedes Geschenkset als Chance, Werte zu zeigen und Verbindungen zu stärken. Für mehr Menschlichkeit im Arbeitsalltag und eine neue Art des Schenkens.

"A Unique Handmade Gift, Make Everyone Smile"

Selamat datang di Sevenrose, Gifting Platform ecommerce terpercaya di Indonesia. Kami menyediakan pilihan hampers dan produk gift yang eksklusif untuk memberikan kebahagiaan pada momen-momen berharga dalam hidup Anda.

Kunjungi toko bunga online terbaik di jakarta yang menyediakan kebutuhan rangkaian bunga dan kado yang keren dan lengkap. Di Sevenrose, kami memahami betapa pentingnya momen berharga dalam hidup Anda. Oleh karena itu, setiap produk yang kami tawarkan dibuat dengan kelembutan dan ketelitian.

Temukan kado yang penuh makna dengan sentuhan personal melalui fitur kustomisasi. Tambahkan pesan khusus atau foto yang akan memberikan kesan mendalam bagi penerima. Dengan pilihan hampers dan produk gift yang beragam, Sevenrose hadir sebagai destinasi terbaik untuk menemukan hadiah yang tak terlupakan.

Kualitas dan kepuasan pelanggan adalah prioritas utama kami. Our coloring books serve as a therapeutic outlet, aiding in stress reduction and healing. Wellness journals provide a safe space for capturing thoughts, dreams, fears, and everything in between. Name: Cartiapack
Description:
We started out as a paper company all the way back in 1983. What started out as a family business is now a multinational producer of fine stationery. From our European headquarters in Amsterdam, we now boast many collections of textile-covered notebooks boxes, envelopes, and shopping bags.

Our products originate from a simple idea: the sensation of feeling.

All our research and development is geared towards creating memorable, texture-based products that are practical in an increasingly digitised world. 

Our designs are made in-house and continually developed according to evolving printing and manufacturing technologies. Designs, patterns, or logos are also adaptable to a wealth of fabric materials including linen, leather, suede, and more. 

Our linen-based tartan products are printed with ultraviolet technology and strive for exceptional texture.

We produce using the highest quality materials from Europe. As a textile country, Turkey provides us with the best fabric around. Slovakia produces our ivory paper. 

We combine the allure and nostalgia of the past with the latest manufacturing progress. In short, our products bring together the best aspects of handcraftsmanship and advanced production technology.

It might interest you to know that we produce some of the raw materials ourselves which is a family secret. So if you want to put your own logo to grow your brand we would be happy to collaborate. 

Who said that family secrets can’t be exhilarating?

Name: bodocard
Description:
bodocard - перша компанія на ринку України, що запустила мультибрендові сертифікати в сегменті b2b як інструмент для стимулювання продажів та мотивації партнерів, клієнтів чи колег.

Бодокарта – це універсальний корпоративний подарунок з персоналізованим підходом та максимальною зручністю для усіх видів бізнесу: без додаткової операційки, без реорганізації обліку та логістики.

Наша партнерська мережа налічує 800 національних компаній та понад 5000 торговельних точок на території всієї України. Сюди належать торговельні мережі продовольчих товарів, техніки, одягу, товарів для дому, АЗС, заклади харчування тощо. Кожен отримувач може підібрати подарунок на свій смак.

Ми гарантуємо вам індивідуальний підхід та проактивність щодо втілення в життя нестандартних запитів: власне брендування холдера, будь-який номінал, безпека від шахрайства, обмеження категорій товарів тощо.

П.С. Чули про bodo.ua? Бодокарту можна використати для оплати (часткової або повної) будь-якого враження.

Name: Grenaways
Description:
Dating back to the early 1900's, Grenaways’ history is grounded in Stoke on Trent, where it has evolved into the multi-channel business supplies company it is today.
 
Now managed by the second generation of Urwins, we are a family business and proud of it.
 
Having supplied and serviced manual typewriters, office furniture, and photocopiers to local companies and public sector bodies for seventy years, in the 1980s Grenaways expanded the range to include business machines and office supplies.
 
Our purchase of commercial printers Dobson & Co in 1985 brought us in-house print-production, a facility which allows greater flexibility in meeting our clients’ needs. While other companies are bound by the prescriptive product list and timescale of the print houses to which they outsource, we can be far more adaptable and creative in our print offering.
We pride ourselves on understanding our customers’ needs and continue to broaden our range, which now includes promotional items, workwear and janitorial supplies, making us a single-source supplier to offices large and small.
 
Extensive-investment in our back-office systems has made our customer service second to none. While our account managers and sales team are always available by phone, we are happier still to discuss your requirements face to face. It might seem old-fashioned, but with our long history, we understand that some traditions are worth holding on to.

Name: Cada Dia Retail Inc.
Description:
Our Story 
Long to-do lists, packed calendars, daily routines — these are just some of the things that fuel go-getters like you and us. More often than not, we’re on the lookout for the next project because let’s be honest: getting things done can be so satisfying. 

But throughout the endless ticking of things to do, here’s something worth pondering over: When was the last time you reflected on whether what you’re doing matters? 

We can get so caught up with the hustle and bustle of life, forgetting to pause and reflect on whether the things we do build up to the life we want to live. It took a pandemic for us to appreciate the importance of slowing down. We learned to live intentionally, allowing ourselves to only say ‘yes’ to things that truly align with our soul and ’no’ to those that don’t serve us. 

Cada Dia was born out of our passion not only for planning and doing, but also for reflecting and living meaningfully. We’ve learned to become thoughtful about how we spend our time and use our energy, and we want the same thing for you too. 

Our Vision

Make every day matter. 

More than just planning ahead, our tools allow you to be intentional and thoughtful in the things you pursue. With flexibility and functionality at the core of our designs, we empower you to be in full control of designing your space and creating the life you desire. 

We are a brand that supports you not only to seize the moment, but also to be in the moment. By doing so, we can make the most out of every day. 

So, go on and make today matter.

Name: ZSM inpakservice
Description:
Wij zijn Sandra en Marian, twee zussen met een passie voor inpakken. Wat ooit begon als een creatieve hobby, is uitgegroeid tot een professionele service waarin wij bedrijven helpen om waardering te tonen aan hun medewerkers en relaties. Met ZSM Inpakservice combineren we onze liefde voor mooi verpakken met een praktische dienstverlening die organisaties tijd, zorg en inspanning bespaart.

Wij bieden twee hoofdservices:
𝙄𝙣𝙥𝙖𝙠𝙨𝙚𝙧𝙫𝙞𝙘𝙚: Wij nemen het complete inpakken van pakketten uit handen. Met zorg, creativiteit en oog voor detail zorgen we dat elk pakket een feestelijk en professioneel geheel wordt.
𝙎𝙖𝙢𝙚𝙣𝙨𝙩𝙚𝙡𝙡𝙚𝙣 𝙫𝙖𝙣 𝙠𝙚𝙧𝙨𝙩𝙥𝙖𝙠𝙠𝙚𝙩𝙩𝙚𝙣: Nog geen idee wat u wilt geven? Wij denken mee, doen voorstellen en stellen samen pakketten samen die passen bij uw bedrijf, budget en boodschap.

Onze klanten kiezen voor ons omdat wij ontzorgen. Van idee tot aflevering regelen wij alles, zodat bedrijven zich kunnen richten op hun eigen werk terwijl wij de kerstpakketten omtoveren tot iets bijzonders. Of het nu gaat om tien pakketten of honderden, wij zorgen voor een vlekkeloos proces en een resultaat dat gezien mag worden.

𝙊𝙣𝙯𝙚 𝙢𝙞𝙨𝙨𝙞𝙚 𝙞𝙨 𝙨𝙞𝙢𝙥𝙚𝙡: waardering verpakken in stijl. Wij geloven dat kleine details een groot verschil maken. Een zorgvuldig samengesteld pakket, mooi verpakt, laat zien dat er aandacht en moeite in is gestoken. En dat is precies wat een kerstpakket bijzonder maakt.

Met 	𝐙𝐒𝐌 𝐈𝐧𝐩𝐚𝐤𝐬𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐢𝐜𝐞 kiest u voor meer dan gemak: u kiest voor pakketten die feestelijk, persoonlijk en onvergetelijk zijn.

Description:
Accurate Office Supply Co. is a fourth-generation, family owned business. Founded in 1946 by Randall Krelle, we originally opened as a pen store located on West Washington Street in Chicago’s near-west loop. The business transformed to a corner retail office supply store, and in 1956 James “Popeye” Krelle Sr. purchased the business and expanded the platform to become a full contract-stationer doing business-to-business, next-day fulfillment. In 1982, James Krelle Jr. (3rd Generation) moved the company from Chicago to Lombard to better serve the growing business presence in the surrounding suburbs. In 2000, the company moved to its current headquarters in Carol Stream, Illinois.

Today, Accurate Office Supply Co. is owned and operated by brothers Joe and Louis Krelle. It is one of the largest, independently owned office products dealers in the Chicago area.

Our company’s dedication to service remains the top priority today. As the digital world continues to expand, we see a growing need in the market for personal interaction. At Accurate Office Supply, we believe that people matter, and business relationships founded on transparency, trust and honesty add exceptional value to the customer and differentiate ourselves from the competition. We invite you to try Accurate Office Supply and move your supply sourcing to the next level.

Accurate Office Supply: Where business relationships matter.

Name: Corporate Gifts Ideas
Description:
A company's gifts to its clients and employees are a way of communicating with its customers and employees. They're also a way of gaining feedback on products and services. Clients can learn more about the company they're dealing with by looking at the gifts it gives out. 

Corporate gifts are an integral part of business-related activities. Annual corporate gifts typically include toys for children, home furnishings, food, paper products and other useful items. Businesses tend to focus on specific regions or populations during their annual gift giving campaigns. 

For example, Target offers the Winter Gift Idea campaign during the months of November and December. This gives the retail chain's management team time to plan their annual gifts campaign. Management then sends out various toys, clothing, food and other gift ideas to their staff members for feedback. This helps them create meaningful gifts for their customers. In addition, it shows staff members how they can best communicate with their target demographic groups.

Corporate gifts are typically inexpensive compared to personal gifts. A toy for a child under five costs about $2-$4 in total cost. Food for a crowd of 25 costs about $4-$8 per bag. A home furnishing set consisting of three items costs about $10-$20 in total cost. 

Furthermore, these items typically wear out within 18 to 24 months of being given out- so companies must replenish their stock regularly. However, these low initial costs help the business save money in the long run. In addition, low stock replenishment costs help the business save money by reducing staff member overtime work- which reduces staff wages as well as inventory costs.

Gifts typically have a short shelf life compared to personal gifts. This is because corporate gifts are meant to be used by customers and employees over an extended period of time. Therefore, businesses tend to give out new goods instead of used goods in order to maximize brand exposure.

Name: Klafy - משחקי קלפים בהתאמה אישית
Description:
ברוכים הבאים לקלפי, הבית למשחקי קלפים בהתאמה אישית שמביאים חוויות בלתי נשכחות לכל אירוע, צוות ומשפחה.
אנו מתמחים ביצירת משחקי קלפים ייחודיים המותאמים לצרכים שלכם אם זה לחברות, משפחות, חתונות, אירועים מיוחדים, או גיבוש צוותי.

 לעסקים וארגונים:
משחקי קלפים ממותגים המשלבים לוגו, תמונות עובדים ובדיחות פנימיות שמחברים את הצוות, משדרגים את גאוות העובדים ומחזקים את ערכי המותג.

 למשפחות ואירועים:
מתנה ייחודית ומרגשת שמחברת בין קרובי משפחה וחברים, עם אפשרות להוסיף תמונות אישיות וזיכרונות מיוחדים.

 איכות ללא פשרות:
הקלפים שלנו מודפסים על נייר איכותי (Cromo 350) עם למינציה שמבטיחה עמידות לשנים רבות. כל משחק כולל שקית ממותגת שניתן להתאים אישית.

 תהליך מהיר ופשוט:
בצעו הזמנה, העלו תמונות או לוגו דרך מערכת ידידותית, ותוך ימים ספורים תקבלו את המוצר המושלם שלכם עד הבית.

בין אם אתם מחפשים מתנה לעובדים, חוויות גיבוש לצוותים, או מתנה אישית ומיוחדת למשפחה קלפי כאן כדי להגשים לכם את החזון.

 מתעניינים?
הצטרפו אלינו והפכו כל אירוע למיוחד במינו! צרו קשר עוד היום לעיצוב משחק בהתאמה אישית שמתאים בדיוק לכם.

Name: theetje
Description:
hét relatiegeschenk van 2022

schenk zielsrust aan je collega’s of relaties met theetje.

Een heilzaam, verademend en zuiverend theetje.

Met geduld en liefde handgemaakt, want dat verdient jouw collega of relatie.

theetje
lavendel • eucalyptus • roos

theesting notes

kleur
het oog wordt gegroet door een honinghouten glans, die een kruidige piramide met contrasterend rozenblad omringt.

geur
rijke, volle ontmoeting met warmte en verlegen kruiden, die zich langzaam de namen lavendel en eucalyptus laten geven.

smaakpalet
golven van eucalyptus, vermengd met rozenblaadjes op een tedere basis van Pai Mu Tan, de hoogste kwaliteit witte thee, ongeëvenaard zacht en subtiel zoet.

afdronk
bij de uitademing terugkerende lavendel, die cellen verzacht en het hart opent in zielsrust.

Name: Walter and May
Description:
Gift giving is definitely my love language! Over the years, I’ve learnt how much the personal touches mean to people. And at Walter and May, we are all about the Just Because.  There is no better reason to send a card or a gift other than to let someone know you’re thinking of them.  

Don’t get me wrong, Birthdays, new babies, promotions and weddings are all super great reasons too and we’ve got you covered for that too!  But there is something about the Just Because.  Something about sending an unexpected gift to someone, knowing the look on their face could light up the sky.  Knowing that their heart will flutter as they read the handwritten note.  

So if you love the Just Because, are on a self love journey or simply want to pass on a little love and kindness, you’re in the right place.  And i’m so glad you’re here.

Liz x

Name: Fragile
Description:
Fragile Toner Nedir?
Fragile, Türkiye'nin önde gelen muadil toner ve drum ünitesi markasıdır. 15 yılı aşkın bir süredir sektörde varlığını sürdüren markamız, yenilikçi yaklaşımı ve kaliteli ürünleriyle tanınmaktadır.

Fragile, 2023 yılında yalnızca Türkiye'de 1.000.000 adet satış hacmiyle gücünü ve başarısını kanıtlamıştır. HP, Brother, Canon, Samsung, Xerox, Epson, Kyocera, Oki, Lexmark ve daha fazlası gibi önde gelen yazıcı markaları için uyumlu muadil toner ve drum üniteleri üretme konusundaki uzmanlığı ile sektörde güvenilir bir konumda yer almaktadır.

Müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarını anlama ve onlara en kaliteli ürünleri sunma misyonuyla hareket ediyoruz. Yenilikçi teknolojileri ve sürekli iyileştirme süreçlerini benimseyerek, müşterilerimize mükemmel baskı kalitesi ve güvenilir performans sunmayı hedefliyoruz.

Fragile olarak, müşterilerimizin memnuniyetini ön planda tutarak, güvenilirlik, kalite ve uygun fiyat politikamızla sektördeki liderliğimizi sürdürmeye kararlıyız.

Description:
Carlinonline es una empresa dedicada al suministro de material de oficina, papelería en general, material escolar y otros artículos necesarios para el día a día de las empresas y particulares. Desde su fundación, nos hemos comprometido con la satisfacción de nuestros clientes, ofreciendo productos de alta calidad a precios competitivos y un servicio de atención al cliente excepcional.
En Carlinonline contamos con más de 15 años de experiencia y trayectoria en el sector de suministro de material de oficina, papelería y otros artículos necesarios para el día a día de las empresas. Ofrecemos soluciones adaptadas a las necesidades de cada cliente.

Nos enorgullece ofrecer un servicio y atención personalizada, con un amplio horario de atención para atender a nuestros clientes en todo momento. Trabajamos con las mejores marcas del mercado y ofrecemos nuestras propias marcas exclusivas para asegurarnos de ofrecer la mejor calidad de producto o servicio posible. Mantenemos una buena relación calidad-precio basada en la transparencia y honestidad que nos caracteriza.

En Carlinonline, nos esforzamos por ofrecer una atención excepcional a nuestros clientes, brindando un servicio 360º para cubrir todas las necesidades. Ofrecemos una experiencia de compra omnicanal que permite a nuestros clientes realizar sus compras a través de diferentes canales, como la web, WhatsApp, email, teléfono o en persona.

Disponemos de un amplio stock permanente con más de 33.000 referencias, lo que nos permite ofrecer cumplir con nuestros compromisos de servicio en 24/48 horas.
Nuestro servicio de envío es especialmente útil para empresas que necesitan recibir los suministros de manera rápida y confiable, sin tener que preocuparse por desplazarse o recogerlos personalmente. Entre las poblaciones de Cataluña a las que ofrecemos envío se encuentran Barcelona, Tarragona, Girona, Lleida, Sabadell, Terrassa, Mataró, Badalona, entre otras.

Name: All-Ways Present B.V.
Description:
0646626836
 sietske@allwayspresent.nl

Make the present count.

Relatiegeschenken. Voor veel ondernemers een last-minute stresspunt.
Voor mij: een kans om jouw merk te laten voelen, blijven hangen en herinnerd te worden.

Ik help bedrijven aan méér dan zomaar een bedrukt product.
Ik zorg voor klantenbinding, werkgeluk en merkherinnering met relatiegeschenken, promotionele items en merchandise die écht passen bij wie jij bent en wat je wilt uitstralen.

Want een goed relatiegeschenk is geen “dingetje met een logo”.
Het is aandacht.
Het is een boodschap.
Het is een mini-verhaal over jouw bedrijf – verpakt in iets tastbaars.

Daarom begin ik altijd bij jouw doel:
 Wie is je doelgroep?
 Wat wil je bereiken?
 Wat past bij jouw merk?
 En binnen welk budget?

Samen sparren, ideeën schrappen, nieuwe bedenken, verfijnen…totdat het cadeau niet in de la belandt, maar op het bureau. Niet wordt vergeten, maar wordt gebruikt. En jouw naam steeds opnieuw voorbij komt.

Persoonlijk werken blijft mijn basis.
Even bellen. Meedenken. Oplossingen zoeken.
Dat blijft.

Maar soms moet het sneller. Omdat de deadline ineens dichtbij is.
Omdat je nú iets nodig hebt. Omdat je zelf wilt kiezen met een beetje inspiratie.
Omdat je het soms ook gewoon zelf kan.

Daarom is er nu – naast mijn persoonlijke begeleiding ook een webshop.
Voor de snelle beslissers.
Voor de doe maar makkelijk momenten.
Voor als je gewoon even wilt rondkijken.

Kom je er niet uit?
Wil je iets op maat?
Of heb je meer nodig dan een paar klikken?

Dan ben ik er gewoon. Zoals altijd.
Mail, bel of app me gerust — ik denk met je mee.

 Extra leuk:
Bestel je via de webshop? Dan krijg je het hele jaar 2026 5% extra korting
(deze wordt na bestelling verrekend).

Dus:
 Snel als het kan
 Persoonlijk als het nodig is
 En altijd met aandacht geregeld

Neem een kijkje 
[https://allwayspresent.nl/](https://allwayspresent.nl/)
(klik op ‘webshop’ rechtsboven)

Name: Spruchreif GmbH
Description:
Herzlich willkommen bei Spruchreif – Kreative Geschenke, die verbinden! 

Bei uns dreht sich alles um die Kunst der persönlichen Geschenke aus Holz, gefertigt mit modernster Lasertechnologie. Unsere Mission ist es, Menschen miteinander zu verbinden, indem wir einzigartige Geschenke schaffen, die von Herzen kommen.

Unser kreatives Team in Deutschland steht im Mittelpunkt unserer Arbeit. Hier werden nicht nur alle unsere Produkte designt, sondern auch veredelt, um sicherzustellen, dass jedes Stück unsere hohen Qualitäts- und Individualitätsstandards erfüllt. 
Unter dem Motto "Geschenke, die verbinden" haben wir es uns zur Aufgabe gemacht, für jeden Anlass das passende Geschenk zu bieten. Sei es für das frisch verliebte Paar am Valentinstag, die geliebten Großeltern zu Weihnachten oder ein herzliches Dankeschön für die Mutter zum Muttertag - unsere Produkte sind immer etwas Besonderes.

Unsere Stärke liegt in der Einzigartigkeit unserer Produkte. Jedes einzelne ist ein Unikat, das mit Liebe und Sorgfalt gefertigt wird. Dank unserer Ideenfindung und Veredelung in Deutschland können wir auch individuelle Produktserien schnell umsetzen, von der Gestaltung bis zur Lieferung.

Unser 8-köpfiges Mitarbeiterteam ist das Herz von Spruchreif und gibt täglich alles, um immer wieder neue, innovative Geschenk- und Produktideen für Sie zu entwickeln.

Bereits heute bieten wir Ihnen ein breites Sortiment an Geschenken für verschiedene Anlässe. Doch wir ruhen uns nicht auf unseren Lorbeeren aus - unser Team arbeitet kontinuierlich daran, unser Portfolio zu erweitern und Ihnen noch mehr Auswahl zu bieten.

Bei uns finden Sie Geschenke, die nicht nur Augen zum Strahlen bringen, sondern auch Herzen berühren. 
Lassen Sie sich von unserer Leidenschaft für kreative Holzgeschenke inspirieren und entdecken Sie die Vielfalt unserer Produkte.

Vielen Dank, dass Sie uns besuchen! Wir freuen uns darauf, Sie bei der Suche nach dem perfekten Geschenk zu unterstützen.

Name: Plant Baby NZ
Description:
Plant Baby offer a monthly indoor plant subscription for both homes and offices that include care instructions for the amateur (or skilled) plant lover!  Learn, Grow and Enjoy the benefits of caring for indoor Plants.  We have 3 tiers to choose from:
- You Grow Girl! (An indoor Plant delivered every 3rd week of the month)
- Pot it Like its Hot! (An indoor Plant and ceramic cover pot)
- Feeling Ferncy! (An indoor Plant, a ceramic cover pot and gift/accessory)

*Our "babies" are well established, healthy indoor plants and we surprise you with something new, delivered every 3rd week of the month.  Sign up and cancel anytime - no contracts!  Sign up is as easy as selecting your tier and entering your details, that's it!  

We also offer corporate gifting solutions to suit your budget and requirements, simply contact us to discuss your scope.  

A little bit more about us...
Plant Baby's seed was sewn in 2020, and like many other businesses, born out of lockdown.  Sophie, the brain behind the seed, is a full time mum, product developer and owner of a very successful business that focus's on natural, earth friendly skincare.  A former florist, the time in lockdown had reignited Sophie's "green thumb", hence inspiring her to water, feed and grow Plant Baby into business.  A specially selected indoor plant, pot and accessory delivered to your door once a month.  Care instructions, tips and advice included.  

Sophie and Siobhan met in 2019 through business and hit it off right away!   Siobhan too, runs her own business but secretly (maybe not so secretly) wanted to join Sophie on her Plant Baby journey.  A mum of two boys, a puppy and a couple of goldfish (and an impressive Plant Baby collection at home), Siobhan was over the moon when Sophie decided to colaborate!  Another baby to grow! 
 
And now, we work together to make Plant lovers across New Zealand happy every month!  We are not your average subscription box - chocolate subscriptions... coffees subscription

Name: Nedvie
Description:
NEDVIE： FAMILY• LOVE • FUN
In the heart of a bustling city, NED's life revolved around planes, meetings, and endless business trips. Each return home was marked not just by the familiar embrace of his wife, Vivian, but by the heartfelt gifts meticulously prepared by his daughters, Ivy and Elaine.
Every time NED opened the door, he was greeted by the warmth of his family and the anticipation in his daughters' eyes. Ivy, with her boundless energy, and Elaine, with her graceful charm, would present him with drawings that held more than just crayon strokes on paper—they were visual narratives of the moments they longed to share with their father.
These drawings were a treasure trove of emotions, each stroke capturing the essence of family togetherness, laughter, and love. Ivy's sketches depicted energetic family picnics, while Elaine's portrayed graceful moments of dancing and shared joy. These artistic expressions became NED's most cherished possessions, more valuable than any souvenir collected during his travels.
Touched by the depth of emotion conveyed through these heartfelt creations, NED began to realize that family was the true anchor in his life. Each drawing was a testament to the moments he missed and the love that awaited him at home. As he looked at these artistic gifts, a realization dawned on him—the power of thoughtful gifts in expressing love and building connections.
Driven by this realization, NED felt an overwhelming desire to give back to his family and to families everywhere. He wanted to create a brand that celebrated the beauty of these simple yet profound moments—the brand that would later become NEDVIE.
Excitedly, NED shared his vision with Vivian, who embraced the idea with enthusiasm. Vivian insisted that the brand should not only be about products but also be meaningful and personal. She saw an opportunity to create moments of joy through personalized, print-on-demand items that allowed families to express their love and connections.

Description:

Bei uns dreht sich alles um die Herstellung individueller Geschenke, die in Deutschland mit viel Liebe und Hingabe für Dich gefertigt werden. Unser Standort in Nürnberg ist das Herz unserer Produktion, wo jedes Stück mit größter Sorgfalt und Präzision entsteht.

Unsere Mission: Unvergessliche Momente schenken
Unsere Leidenschaft für Design und Einzigartigkeit zeigt sich in jedem unserer Produkte. Jedes Geschenk, das unser Haus verlässt, ist ein Unikat – von uns selbst entworfen und mit einer persönlichen Note versehen. Wir sind überzeugt, dass Geschenke mehr als nur Gegenstände sind; sie übermitteln Botschaften der Liebe, Freundschaft und Wertschätzung.

Deine Wünsche im Mittelpunkt: Personalisierung
In unserer Nürnberger Fertigung setzen wir jede deiner individuellen Personalisierungen um. Ob personalisierte T-Shirts, maßgeschneiderte Accessoires oder besondere Dekorationsstücke – wir erschaffen Geschenke, die Geschichten erzählen und Erinnerungen bewahren. Während des Bestellprozesses erhältst du eine Produktvorschau, um sicherzustellen, dass alles nach deinen Wünschen gestaltet ist.

Alles aus einer Hand: Von der Idee bis zum Versand
Unser erfahrenes Team begleitet jeden Schritt des Herstellungsprozesses. Vom ersten Entwurf bis zur finalen Fertigung bleibt alles in unseren Händen. So garantieren wir höchste Qualität und schnelle Lieferzeiten. Auch der Versand erfolgt direkt von unserem Standort in Nürnberg, damit deine Bestellung sicher und pünktlich bei dir ankommt.

Unsere Werte: Qualität, Kreativität und Nachhaltigkeit
Bei Love & Faith stehen Qualität und Kreativität an oberster Stelle. Wir legen großen Wert auf nachhaltige Produktionsmethoden und verwenden ausschließlich hochwertige Materialien. Unser Ziel ist es, dir nicht nur einzigartige, sondern auch langlebige Produkte zu bieten.

Name: Goedkoopste-Kantoorartikelen.nl
Description:
Wij hebben groot aanbod A-merk en huismerk kantoorartikelen, tegen de scherpste prijs. In de webshop bestelt u alles wat te maken heeft met papier, zoals printpapier, enveloppen, etiketten, agenda's, formulieren en rolletjes papier. Maar ook handige schrijfblokken, collegeblokken, kladblokken en notitieblokken, mappen om in te schrijven of stijlvolle notitieboekjes. Veel schrijfpapier zowel met ruitjes als gelinieerd te bestellen. 

En wie schrijven wil heeft ook schrijfmateriaal nodig. Het spreekt bijna voor zich, maar uiteraard verkopen we pennen. We hebben balpennen (wegwerp én hervulbaar), vulpennen, gelpennen, rollerpennen en fijnschrijvers. En voor de echte traditionele schrijver zelfs ouderwetse kroontjes- en kaligrafeerpennen.

Daarnaast verkopen we ordners (zoals multomappen, vouwmappen, ringbanden en showtassen), hangmappen, archiefdozen, showtassen en opbergsystemen. En om het papier allemaal netjes te ordenen voor het in de archieven terechtkomt, verkopen we ook nietmachines, nietjes, perforators en paperclips.

Natuurlijk zijn er ook andere kantoorbenodigdheden en ook facilitaire zaken, zoals de broodnodige koffie, thee en schoonmaakartikelen. Daarnaast vindt u hier meer dan 3100 soorten toners en inkt voor uw printer en opslagmedia voor uw computer. Er is teveel om op te noemen, maar misschien moeten we nog even wijzen op ergonomische hulpmiddelen om uw werkplek aan te passen. En ook op onze selectie goedkope bureaustoelen?

Name: Casa Guilherme
Description:
QUEM SOMOS

A CASA GUILHERME é uma loja de variedades voltada para todos os públicos, oferecendo uma ampla gama de produtos que facilitam o dia a dia e agradam toda a família. Nosso mix inclui:

•	Utilidades Domésticas
•	Cosméticos e Maquiagens
•	Produtos de Higiene Pessoal
•	Brinquedos e Artigos Infantis
•	Material Escolar e de Escritório
•	Itens de Decoração
•	Presentes e muito mais!

Há mais de 50 anos no mercado, somos reconhecidos como referência em qualidade, diversidade e, principalmente, preços populares. Nossa missão é garantir que todos encontrem o que precisam por um valor justo, com atendimento acolhedor e ofertas sempre atualizadas.

Na CASA GUILHERME, tradição e variedade andam lado a lado para atender você cada vez melhor!

HISTÓRIA

A CASA GUILHERME iniciou suas atividades no início dos anos 1960, em uma pequena loja localizada na Rua Castro e Silva, no centro de Fortaleza. Naquela época, comercializava produtos de armarinho e miudezas em geral. Com sensibilidade para os desejos dos clientes e espírito empreendedor, o fundador, Sr. Guilherme Holanda Queiroz, foi ampliando e diversificando gradualmente o mix de produtos oferecidos.

Hoje, a empresa é administrada por seus filhos e conta com duas lojas de varejo e uma loja de atacado, todas situadas no Centro de Fortaleza. A Casa Guilherme mantém seu compromisso com os melhores preços e o bom atendimento, conquistando a confiança de uma ampla clientela em todo o estado do Ceará.

MISSÃO

Oferecer novidades e tendências com os melhores produtos a preços justos, promovendo bons negócios, economia e total satisfação aos nossos clientes e ao público em geral.

Name: Estação Papel
Description:
A Estação Papel é uma papelaria com alma e propósito. Nosso compromisso vai além de vender produtos: queremos inspirar escolhas mais conscientes e criar um elo entre tradição, criatividade e sustentabilidade. Localizada em Dois Córregos (SP), oferecemos uma linha diversificada de itens de papelaria e escritório, sempre com atenção à origem, qualidade e impacto ambiental.

Aqui, cada produto carrega um valor. Trabalhamos com materiais reciclados, fornecedores comprometidos com práticas ecológicas e embalagens sustentáveis. Nosso catálogo inclui desde cadernos, blocos, papéis especiais e cartões até bolsas, mochilas, pastas, brindes personalizados e muito mais — tudo com curadoria criteriosa e foco em utilidade, beleza e responsabilidade.

Somos revendedores autorizados de marcas renomadas como Faber-Castell, Pilot Pen, Cis, Tris, Chamex, Report, Compactor, entre outras, garantindo qualidade e confiança em cada item. Atendemos tanto consumidores finais quanto empresas, com atenção personalizada e agilidade no atendimento.

Estamos presentes no WhatsApp, Instagram, Mercado Livre e Amazon, ampliando nossos canais para facilitar o acesso a quem valoriza o consumo consciente. Participamos de feiras locais, apoiamos o comércio justo e temos orgulho de fortalecer nossa comunidade com educação, criatividade e sustentabilidade.

Acreditamos que cada escolha é uma semente. E nossa missão é fazer com que cada caderno, lápis ou mochila ajude a escrever uma história com mais propósito — com raízes firmes no presente e responsabilidade com o futuro.

Pesquise por “Estação Papel” no Mercado Livre e na Amazon. Você vai se surpreender com tudo que temos a oferecer.

Name: Les Trouvailles de Tolède
Description:
Les Trouvailles de Tolède  ouvrira ses portes au printemps 2025, au cœur du centre historique de Tolède. Cette boutique unique proposera une sélection originale de cadeaux, curiosités et souvenirs soigneusement choisis pour surprendre et émerveiller.

 Nos produits :
Nous mettrons en avant des objets insolites et tendances, allant des articles de papeterie raffinés aux accessoires de voyage, en passant par des affiches illustrées, des jeux de société, des cosmétiques bien-être, et bien plus encore. Chaque espace de la boutique invitera à la découverte, avec des thématiques variées : loisirs et jeux, maison et senteurs, cuisine et saveurs, artisanat local et international...

 Un lieu hors du temps
Loin des boutiques traditionnelles, notre espace alliera charme d’antan et modernité. Le mobilier et la décoration, chinés avec passion, créeront une atmosphère vintage et immersive, tout en mettant en valeur des produits actuels et originaux.

 Pourquoi Tolède ?
Ville au riche patrimoine culturel et classée à l’UNESCO, Tolède attire chaque année des millions de visiteurs en quête d’authenticité. Nous souhaitons offrir aux touristes comme aux habitants un lieu où trouver des objets uniques et inspirants, parfaits pour offrir ou se faire plaisir.

 Et après ?
Nous prévoyons également de lancer une boutique en ligne dans l’année, afin de partager nos trésors au-delà des frontières de Tolède.

 Ouverture prévue au printemps 2025 !
Suivez-nous pour ne rien manquer de l’aventure Les Trouvailles de Tolède !

Name: X-SAFALA Custom Badge company
Description:
Hello, China's industry is currently entering a saturation period. Many factories rely on their previous customers and can only make a little money every year. They don't think about how to develop customers and how to help customers open up more markets. As a result, the lack of competitive prices and product quality has led to customers slowly losing their customers and eventually closing down. What is the core reason? According to the statistics of Douyin in China, most badge and medal customization factories are currently relying on a small number of customers to cooperate, which makes them very uncomfortable. Why? Why don't they lower the price for their customers?

1: China's competition is too fierce. If the price is lowered, their factories will not have enough profit to support their production line operations and pay workers.

2-If the price is lowered for customers, their customers will think that the factory has reduced the quality, and the factory itself does not have enough profit. In addition, China's prices are rising rapidly and there are many uncertainties, which make Chinese factories dare not easily lower prices.

As mentioned at the beginning, this is why our factory received a total of more than 50 million orders from August last year to August this year, but only made a profit of 1 million.

Why do our factories dare to lower prices?

1- Xsafala completed the factory transformation the year before last, and most of the production is automated. The factory was adjusted to a medium-sized factory, which can reduce unnecessary factory and worker expenses and is not so sensitive to product profits.

2- The boss has been in this industry for more than 15 years. Simply put, he has enough funds to compete with capitalists in the market.

For example, this month Nintendo's 500,000 badges, we quoted them-each profit is only 0.03 USD. And our factory has Disney certification, BSCI certification and ISO9001 and other AAA-level quality-oriented enterprise

Name: Maude Gift & Co.
Description:
I'm guessing you found us because you're looking for something different in your personal, corporate, or custom gifting, something that will set you apart and be remembered. This is the right place! We have curated gifts ready to shop, and two gifting programs: semi-custom gifting and corporate gifting. 
 
Our semi-custom gifting program allows you to choose one of our pre-curated gifts and add your logo to it. It's as simple as that. Your logo can be incorporated with a tag or belly band on the outside, or on the inside of the box with a nice matte sticker, or on a card with a personalized message.

The Custom Gifting Program would include a meeting to discuss your goal and vision for the gift or event, including the items, packaging, color scheme, and how you want your company logo incorporated.

Next, we will brainstorm and bring our expertise in curation and design to you, allowing you to pick one of our options or change it up.

Finally, we set a delivery date, and that's it! We take care of all the ordering, packaging, and delivery for you. We can bring all the gifts to a specific location or drop ship to people across the United States.

Your budget stays the same, and you don't have to do the legwork.

Let us do our job so you can do yours.

(Semi-Custom Program requires 2-4 weeks lead time, and Custom Gifting requires 4-6 weeks lead time.)

At the ethical giftbox, we help businesses with a conscience find meaningful, sustainable corporate gifts that truly align with their values.

Description: Jaren geleden kregen we van een laboratorium de vraag of we een USB-stick in de vorm van een erlemeyer konden ontwikkelen. Ondertussen is BrandsStick al lang geen onbekende meer in de wereld van relatiegeschenken en promotieartikelen. Het geheim van ons succes? Name: Cozy Arts
Description:
Cozy Arts is a creative organization and consultancy offering services and products rooted in building bridges to connect the world to art. 

I believe that love is infinite, reciprocal and has the power to do just about anything, including eradicating one of the most isolating threats to our well-being as humans - loneliness. But in order for love to have power, we must put our hands to tasks; we must take action; we must do. 

I come from a long line of women who sewed, crafted, cooked and kept heritage crafts alive as a way of life. In today's modern world I feel I am constantly striving to retain these skills that keep me grounded so that I can bring love to my little corner of the world, and teach my daughter the beauty and strength in a woman's hands. I dream up, craft and collaborate with other artists to create products that make it easier to take action, in small, meaningful ways. In my work and my life I am constantly reminded that when we put our hands to tasks, our hearts can shine.  

In recent years, I returned to my roots of craft and began creating products that bring thoughtfulness and intentionality to the forefront of everyday life by encouraging acts of love, one craft, one letter, one task at a time. My current product offerings include gift-able handmade collages, enamel pins and a line of greeting cards that honor heritage crafts, specifically, quilts. 

Services
Individual Artist / Craftsman Advisement
Boutique Merchandising
Marketplace Curation
Event Planning + Production
Organizational Systems Creation
Organization Archiving

Consultancy

Non-profit Administration
Organizational Culture
Creative Placemaking Initiatives
Cultural Programming
Collaborative Projects

Name: Lalystories
Description:
Historias personalizadas en una lámina. 
Tu propia historia en una lámina; para que ocupe un lugar especial en tu hogar. Para dejar por escrito ese capítulo que no quieres que quede en el olvido. ¿Quieres tener tu propia historia personalizada? Escríbeme. Juntos lo haremos posible. 

Una historia personalizada es el regalo perfecto para las ocasiones más especiales. Bodas, aniversarios, bautizos, comuniones, Días de la Madre, del Padre, de los abuelos, graduaciones. Dedícaselo a quien tú quieras: tu familia, tus amigos, tu mascota... las posibilidades son tan variadas como imagines.

Dame algunos detalles de tu historia y la envuelvo en magia. 

-----
Soy **Esperanza Fuentes**, periodista de profesión; contadora de historias por vocación. Desde el año 2005 ando por los mundos de la redacción, la maquetación o la fotografía.

Colaboro en la adaptación infantil de la saga de libros [Mara Turing](https://maraturing.com/categoria/libros/||blank).

Inicio este proyecto de *Lalystories. Todos tenemos una historia* llena de ilusión y con la seguridad de que algunos de vosotros confiaréis en mí para contar vuestra historia.

Os espero.

Name: Notes On A Spiral
Description:
Imagine a world where our choices of notebooks and journals are not confined by images that don't resonate with our identity, especially as black and brown women in America. Every year, as I clear my office, I find myself discarding planners that, although functional, feel impersonal and detached from my reality.

Having spent the majority of my career in corporate America, I've routinely received the same nondescript notebooks, seemingly designed for everyone and yet no one. Yearly, I would anticipate Black History Month or Hispanic Latinx Heritage Month, hoping for planners that represented my heritage and experiences.

As I mature, both personally and as a mother, I ponder the lens through which my children will view the world. We're often encouraged to be our "authentic" selves, but how can we, when the tools available don't often reflect or champion our diverse identities?

This journey led to the birth of the DEIB Planner, rooted in the philosophy of SPIRAL:
Supporting
People in
Inclusive
Representation,
Advocacy, and
Learning

More than just an acronym, SPIRAL is a commitment. A commitment to ensure that as you plan your day, you're equipped with tools that recognize and celebrate diversity, equity, inclusion, and belonging.

My aspiration extends beyond just crafting personalized planners. It's to guide black and brown individuals on their personal and professional journies, offering a creative haven for the art of note-taking and a deep understanding of intricacies like Microsoft Excel. My vision is a world where every note we take and every plan we make champions our authentic selves.

Together, let's SPIRAL towards a future where our tools reflect who we are.

Description:
Podollyanochka створює подарунки, які не просто приносять радість, а зміцнюють зв’язки між людьми, допомагають висловити вдячність та підтримку по-справжньому.

Що ми пропонуємо?

 Бегемотик із аудіоповідомленнями – унікальний корпоративний подарунок, у якому можна зберегти слова подяки, мотивації чи натхнення від керівників, колег або партнерів. Ваш голос завжди поруч.

 NFC-наліпка з відеопосланням – персоналізоване відео-послання для співробітників чи клієнтів. Слова підтримки, подяка або тепле нагадування про важливе – тепер завжди під рукою.

Коли це важливо?

— Коли хочеться по-справжньому подякувати команді за внесок у спільну справу.

— Коли ви виводите корпоративну культуру компанії на новий рівень, де люди – це найцінніше.

— Коли корпоративний подарунок має не просто бути, а викликати щирі емоції.

Podollyanochka – це про турботу, яка відчувається.
Зміцнюйте команду, даруючи найцінніше – любов та підтримку.

Name: SRIforever
Description:
SRIforever Gifts was born out of love — literally. The name “SRI” comes from our mother’s name, Srimati Maity, and the brand’s heart-shaped logo symbolizes the love of both parents joined together forever. This deep emotional foundation is the reason why every SRIforever creation carries meaning, warmth, and a sense of timelessness.

Founded in Mechogram, Panskura, West Bengal, SRIforever began as a vision to bring premium, lasting gifts to India’s gifting culture — gifts that are not only beautiful at the moment of giving but continue to hold their charm for years. In a market dominated by fresh flowers that wither in days, we wanted to offer something different: gifts that stay as vibrant as the memories they celebrate.

We are proud to be India’s first premium preserved flower gift brand, and today, we have expanded to also include handmade dry flower (sola) craft gifts. Together, these two product lines allow us to serve a wide range of customers — from those seeking modern elegance to those who appreciate artisanal, handcrafted beauty.

Our Vision

Our vision is to redefine gifting in India by focusing on sustainability, quality, and emotion. We want to make every gift a story — something the receiver remembers not just for a day, but for years.

We believe gifts should not only delight in the moment but also be eco-friendly, long-lasting, and a reflection of personal thoughtfulness.

Our Mission

To Create Lasting Memories – By designing gifts that remain beautiful for years.

To Blend Art & Nature – By combining preserved flowers and handmade dry flower crafts in innovative designs.

To Build Trust – By maintaining consistent quality and transparent service.

To Support Sustainability – By using natural materials, ethical sourcing, and reducing wastage.

Name: Čeberol'ca
Description:
Ceberolc'ca: The Perfect Choice for Sustainable Business Gifts or Heartfelt Presents for Loved Ones.

Our natural food wraps offer unmatched versatility for a variety of uses. Wrap all kinds of food – fruits, vegetables, cheese, bread – and find it equally useful for covering bowls, glasses, and jugs, keeping your summer lemonades refreshingly cool. Ideal for picnics, it can cover bread, cold cuts, pastries, or sliced fruits, and is also perfect for storing snacks, sandwiches, and pastries on the go.

Beyond the kitchen, Ceberolc'ca excels. It's indispensable for fermenting kombucha, kefir, or sourdough, and its uses extend well beyond home settings. Employ it as a funnel for liquids or powders, use it as an icing tube, or leverage its strength for opening tight jars. Compact and adaptable, Ceberolc'ca can transform into a straw or provide a quick fix for a wobbly restaurant table.

For adventurers and outdoor enthusiasts, Ceberolc'ca is an essential companion. It's ideal for camping and holiday trips, keeping items dry or storing essentials like cards or crayons. It's travel-friendly for personal hygiene items such as toothbrushes or hard soap. During a nature walk, use it to wrap a bouquet of flowers or herbs.

Ceberolc'ca has also proven to be an effective tool for opening tight jars and can be quickly rolled up into a straw or used to stabilize a wobbly table. The possibilities with Ceberolc'ca are truly limitless, making it an invaluable addition to any lifestyle."

Name: Prime Line
Description:
Istniejąca od 2004 roku firma Prime Line zajmuje się emocjonalną i cielesną stroną interakcji między ludźmi a rzeczami, które ze zwykłych przedmiotów stają się wyjątkowymi przedmiotami osobistymi. Jest synonimem różnorodności designu, między innymi bazującego na zasadach szkoły Bauhausu, który łącząc funkcjonalność z klasyczną, elegancką formą wysokiej jakości instrumentów piśmiennych, a także wyjątkowych notesów z kamienia, daje swoim posiadaczom ten ulotny, ale jakże czarujący posmak „lifestylu”. 

Bogactwo oferty Prime Line składa się przede wszystkim z takich światowych marek, jak: Lamy, stilform, Tibaldi, k'arst, Semikolon i Troika, producentów doskonałych akcesoriów piśmienniczych i biznesowych gadżetów, których jesteśmy wyłącznym dystrybutorem w Polsce.

Słyną one z zamiłowania do designu, tradycji rzemiosła, a także precyzji wykonania. Marki łączy wysoka jakość, funkcjonalność i elegancja. Są idealnym wyborem dla każdego, kto poszukuje produktów niebanalnych i wykonanych z niezwykłą starannością.

Description:
Khởi nghiệp từ tháng 7 năm 2015, Gác-măng-giê (GMG) là thương hiệu quà tặng đặc sản Việt Nam cao cấp với một đội ngũ những người trẻ luôn cố gắng hết sức mỗi ngày để làm thật tốt điều mình đã hứa: Kể chuyện Việt Nam bằng đặc sản.

Gác-măng-giê hướng tới mục tiêu kết hợp giữa làm kinh tế với bảo tồn và quảng bá các giá trị văn hoá dân tộc, là cầu nối vững chắc đưa những sản phẩm truyền thống đặc sắc đến gần hơn với người tiêu dùng trong và ngoài nước.

Tầm nhìn này không chỉ thể hiện ở cam kết về việc thương hiệu sẽ góp sức vào quá trình thúc đẩy sự phát triển bền vững cho các làng nghề truyền thống mà còn hướng tới mục tiêu làm giàu thêm giá trị tinh thần cho người tiêu dùng, đặc biệt là những người trẻ - thế hệ đang dần xa rời với các khái niệm xưa cũ.

Name: LaiLai
Description:
{LaiLai - a Yoruba word that translates to FOREVER}
LAILAI is a small business selling hand designed cards but, these aren’t just any cards! The designs are printed on seed paper. After you gift or receive them, instead of throwing the card away, it can be planted and grow into an array of wildflowers - it's as easy as #giftshredplantgrow 

Not only is this a beautiful way to reduce the massive amount of waste we accumulate, the seeds that grow are bee friendly, promoting pollination. These are the perfect gift for your green-thumbed family and friends!

LaiLai, originally named "Buzz", began as a school business project that I co-led in the first year of Sixth form with 17 other people. I absolutely loved the experience of starting this enterprise, as it gave me a taste of what it could look like to start a successful business.

After the end of the school project, I thought it would be a waste to let go of this seed paper business. So, now in university, I have decided to continue with the project.

As a person who strives to use zero-waste alternatives for single use items, I know how difficult it can be to find zero waste products that are affordable.

So, with LaiLai, I wanted to create just that. A brand selling zero-waste alternatives for cards that also gives back to the environment without compromising on quality and aesthetics.

Since officially launching LaiLai in December of 2020, the support I have received has been absolutely incredible and I cannot wait to show you all the ideas I have for the future and, with your help, watch LaiLai grow!

Name: Making Meadows Ltd
Description:
Making Meadows was founded in 2019 by Samantha. Over the years the company has grown from a small selection of greeting cards to a large collection of stationery, gifts & most importantly writing paper. Our aim is to create beautiful, high quality products that make you smile & are also eco friendly to the world. Because that’s important to us.

Often focusing on florals & animals but not restricted to them, Samantha loves to paint & illustrate anything that is pretty & might put a smile on someones face. Samantha’s unique illustrations are often described as whimsical & full of colour.

Creating high quality products that last the test of time are important to us as a company. It is key that are products are not only pretty to look at but are functional too. Sustainability is at the heart of our business. Our paper is FSC certified, our kraft envelopes are made from recycled paper & our packaging is all plastic free. We are not perfect, but we try to be the best we can be. Everything is designed, manufactured & dispatched in the UK, from our little studio in Surrey. We like it this way, as it means we can check each & every order before it gets sent out.

If you are interested in becoming an Okey Dokey Design stockist, then head on over to our wholesale website: www.okeydokeydesignwholesale.com

Name: ECO INK
Description: Eco Ink is accelerating the world's transition into sustainable printing with eco-friendly toner cartridges. We understand that printing is a need for most and will never disappear. But we believe that if paper can be repurposed through recycling, the same can be applied to toner cartridges and all other printing supplies. Our toner cartridges are now made with 70% recycled or repurposed plastics and metals. Compared to traditional and compatible toner cartridges, ours are better, more economical and leave only a tiny carbon footprint on our world. We promise quality and usability to the end of our product's lifespan, and we back this by giving a 1-year warranty on all our eco-friendly toner cartridges.

Name: Omar Damia Paciarini
Description:
Ciao sono Omar, un Networker professionista, ti aiuto a sfruttare il tuo Carisma Naturale per sviluppare la tua attività Online di Network in modo professionale con un sistema collaudato. 

Aiuto persone ambiziose e determinate, non appagate dal proprio lavoro, a dare una svolta alla carriera professionale! Donne e uomini che ricercano un benessere economico e che si vogliono realizzare nella propria vita!

Ho studiato per anni il mercato, cercando Business etici e profittevoli, ho creato organizzazioni di centinaia di persone e ho investito migliaia di euro in corsi e formazioni di alto livello sviluppando varie competenze nel ramo della comunicazione, della vendita, dell'Online che tutt’oggi insegno e utilizzo nel campo. 

La mia Mission è quella di ispirare e aiutare quante più persone che, come te, hanno il desiderio ardente di riprendersi la propria rivincita personale e professionale! 
Guidarti verso la tua miglior versione, darti in mano tutti gli strumenti che ho acquisito in anni di studi e lavoro sul campo e avviare insieme la tua attività per ottenere il tuo successo!

Ti aiuto a costruire la tua attività di Network Marketing e ottenere risultati attraverso il tuo Carisma Naturale applicato al mio metodo.

Entriamo in contatto ora e capiamo se siamo fatti per collaborare, ti aspetto!

Name: Lifetime Stories
Description:
Ooit geprobeerd om met een groep mensen een collectief cadeau te regelen, zoals een verzameling van herinneringen en foto's? En.. is het gelukt?

Het idee is leuk, maar wat een werk. Wie neemt de leiding? Wie verzamelt alle verhalen en foto's en wie gaat het boek dan nog eens in elkaar zetten?

Dit kan een stuk eenvoudiger met Lifetime Stories. Lifetime Stories voorziet je van een link waarbij iedereen zijn verhaal en foto kan insturen. Zodra de deadline is verstreken maakt Lifetime Stories het boek op en doet het op de post.

Zo heb je zonder gedoe een uniek cadeau!

Description:
Terra & Twine is a family-run small business based in North Carolina, creating nature-inspired décor, handcrafted soaps, and botanical gifts that bring a touch of the outdoors into your everyday life. From air plant displays and succulent starters to artisanal soaps, candles, and 3D-printed plant pots, our products are designed to be both beautiful and practical.

We believe in making gifts that “grow on you”—pieces that blend creativity, sustainability, and care for the natural world. Every item is made with attention to detail, using quality materials and eco-friendly practices whenever possible.

What We Offer
	•	Air Plant & Fern Displays – Mounted, hanging, and tabletop designs that make plant care simple and stylish ￼.
	•	Succulents & Starter Plants – Cacti, aloe, spider plants, and more, each with easy-to-follow care guides ￼.
	•	Handcrafted Soaps & Candles – Botanical blends and seasonal collections that combine function with artistry ￼.
	•	Unique Resin & 3D-Printed Décor – From whimsical night lights to plant pots and magnetic Air Plant Buddies.

Our Mission
We exist to connect people with nature through thoughtful, handcrafted goods that spark joy, creativity, and connection. Whether shopping online or meeting us at local markets, our customers become part of a growing community that values artistry, sustainability, and small-business spirit.

Name: Archive901
Description:
"Archive 901" is a project born from the creative minds of two friends over a glass of wine. The project centers around the desire to create something that would not only be visually appealing but also have a positive impact on others. 

Through this project, the creators hope to inspire others to think deeply and critically about the world around them, and to use art as a means of communicating important ideas.

"Archive 901" is not just about creating beautiful pieces of art, but about making a positive impact on society through meaningful messages and inspiring conversations.

Expanding its horizons, the Archive 901 project is evolving into a platform that welcomes artists of all kinds.

It will become a collective where artists, upon joining our family, will have an additional outlet to the market.

The Archive 901 artist collective will be a space of shared knowledge and a hub for the creation of unique events in Milan, both for businesses and individuals.

Thanks to our meticulously curated artist selection, Archive 901 will transform into a space where the cross-pollination of ideas forms the bedrock of our ethos.

Name: Vyndmill & Co
Description:
With an unquenchable thirst for all things artistic and a sprinkle of creative magic, diving into a fresh venture in this realm felt like the absolute cherry on top!

My son Neel, my personal cheerleader and relentless motivator, wouldn’t let me sit still for a second—he is always there, buzzing around, nudging me to get up and do something!

So, when the bright idea of starting a business lit up, I knew the name had to be something special—something my son absolutely loves. And what gets him more excited than anything? Windmills! Every time we go on a road trip, his face lights up with pure joy. That’s the kind of excitement I want to feel about my business every day. So, Vyndmill was born—spinning with energy, creativity, and a little bit of childhood wonder! And, the logo depicts, 'I just got creative with my scribbles'. 

And here I am, designing notebooks and curating the most delightful corporate gifts—sprinkling in a little love, a lot of creativity, and a dash of fun.

With all things considered and after a whirlwind  of trial and error, our products are bursting with love and dedication! If there happens to be any tiny hiccups, we won't just shrug them off; we'll grab them like golden opportunities to sprinkle even more magic on our work!

Name: Magma poslovna darila
Description:
Smo ponudnik poslovnih daril in promocijskega materiala z brendiranjem v B2B segmentu. Z več kot 25 leti izkušenj smo si pridobili ugled kot zaupanja vreden in strokoven partner za podjetja v iskanju rešitev za promocijo njihove blagovne znamke.

Nudimo celovito ponudbo promocijskih izdelkov, ki pomagajo našim strankam izstopati v konkurenčnem poslovnem okolju. Sodelujemo z vrsto podjetij v različnih panogah, od malih in srednje velikih podjetij do mednarodnih znamk prisotnih na slovenskem trgu.

Sodelujemo z vrsto dobaviteljev in proizvajalcev v Evropi in Aziji, da zagotovimo raznolikost izdelkov. V našem regalnem skladišču na 750 kvadratnih metrih v Celju držimo na stalni zalogi najbolj prodajana poslovna darila in naše ekskluzivne uvoze kar nam omogoča kratke dobavne roke in konkurenčne cene. 

Izkušena ekipa vam nudi strokovno svetovanje in podporo pri izbiri najboljših poslovnih daril in promocijskega materiala za vaše ciljno občinstvo. Kakovostni stroji in tiskarski materiali poskrbijo za obstojen in kakovosten tisk, vezenje in gravuro. 

Letno dobavimo več kot 1.000.000 kosov poslovnih in promocijskih daril s tiskom, vezenjem in gravuro. 

Smo ponosni na dolgoročne odnose, ki smo jih vzpostavili s svojimi strankami, in na našo zavezanost k odličnosti v našem poslu kar dokazuje tudi prejem najvišje bonitetne ocene platinaste odličnosti. Če iščete zanesljivega dobavitelja poslovnih daril, ki ima potrebna znanja in kapacitete nas kontaktirajte. Skupaj bomo našli primerna poslovna darila za vaše potrebe.

Our compliance with the governing laws of each country and international security standards, ensure that your online shopping experience is safe, secure and competitively priced. Name: Gift Giving Simplified: A simple approach to gift giving!
Description:
Our mission is to provide a simple employee recognition and incentive program to enable companies to reward employees for meeting or exceeding sales initiatives, hiring incentives,  employee recognition, or for any other business occasion.  

Years of Service awards, Retirement gifts, Employee hiring incentives, Safety Recognition, On-The-Spot Recognition, Thank You, Contests and Incentives, and Holiday Gifts are all occasions that can be celebrated with a Gift Giving Simplified  gift award.

You choose how much you want to spend, and your recipients select their own gifts from brand name selections.  Gift collections range in price from $25 to $5,000.  The cost of each album is comprehensive meaning all presentation materials, shipping and customer service is provided at no extra cost.  The recipient does not know the value of their gift. They simply make their selection through our redemption portal.  The item is shipped to them postage paid. 

Studies have shown that companies with value-based recognition programs and a budget of 1% of payroll will experience a positive effect on the organization and its employees.  The main objective is to create a culture of respect, reward and recognition for employees at all levels.  Recognition is a significant part of how employees find satisfaction in their work, which not only leads to better productivity, but also contributes to employee retention. Workplace recognition motivates, provides a sense of accomplishment and makes employees feel valued for their work.

Lassen Sie uns gemeinsam Ihren Alltag verzaubern und Sie werden feststellen, dass uns und Ihnen die Ideen nicht ausgehen werden…

Damit Sie sich um Ihr Hauptgeschäft kümmern können, kümmern wir uns um Ihr Büromaterial. Wir stellen ihre Produkte individuell zusammen und liefern direkt zu ihnen ins Büro. Unser oberstes Ziel ist es, Ihre Wünsche zu erfahren und behilflich zu sein, das Passende für Sie zu finden.

What We Do Differently?
Instead of pushing catalogue items, every brief begins with understanding the brand story, the recipient, and the desired business outcome - be it loyalty, recall, or recognition. From premium onboarding and experience-led kits to festival hampers, leadership gifts, event giveaways, and recognition awards, each concept is curated to be relevant, memorable, and aligned with your culture and budget.

How We Create Impact?
At Creatic, we blend product, packaging and personalization to transform "just another gift" into a branded experience that carries your message into homes, desks, and conversations. Our gifting solutions deliver measurable outcomes with higher engagement in campaigns, stronger employee belonging, and deeper client relationships.

Our Capabilities
We provide an end-to-end solution covering concept, sourcing, customization, printing, packaging, logistics and pan-India delivery. Our wide, curated portfolio includes tech and lifestyle accessories, sustainable and eco-friendly options, apparel and merchandising, stationery, premium hampers, awards, and bespoke & branded collections.

We have fulfilled gifting requirements for over 300+ brands, earning their trust through our commitment to innovation and service excellence. 

If you are ready to elevate your corporate gifting beyond generic swag, let Creatic be your behind-the-scenes partner in crafting meaningful gifts that make your brand unforgettable, where every gift tells your story and builds lasting relationships.

Description:
زمیک ارائه دهنده راه حل های مناسب و ایده های نو برای معرفی و تقویت ارتباط کسب و کارها است. ماموریت ما ارائه هدایای منحصر به فرد و کاربردی است که دوستدار محیط زیست و قابل تجزیه و بازگشت به طبیعت باشند چرا که، هدف ما کاهش پسماندها و آلاینده های محیطزیست است. ما با دقت مجموعههای وسیع و متنوع از گزینههای دوستدار محیط زیست را انتخاب میکنیم، تا هر محصول با کیفیت، مطابق با استراتژی هر شرکت و با استفاده از مواد دوستانه به محیطزیست تولید شده باشد. تجربه دریافت هر هدیه مانند گیرنده خود منحصر به فرد است. تیم ما معتقد به ایجاد تجربههای متفاوت در هدایای سفارشی و شخصی سازی شده است. برای بستهبندی هدایا از کاغذ بازیافتی، مواد قابل تجزیه و یا قابل استفاده مجدد بکار برده میشود و حتی بستهبندی ها نیز باید با ارزشهای ما سازگار باشند.ما با همکاری با صاحبان کسبوکارهای کوچک سعی داریم در رشد اقتصادی این مجموعه ها سهیم بوده و از کارکنان و شاغلین آنها حمایت کنیم. یکی از اهداف اصلی زمیک ارتقاء و افزایش سطح آگاهی و اهمیت گسترش فرهنگ زندگی سازگار با محیط زیست است. ما اینکار را از طریق سوق دادن افراد به انتخاب گزینه ها و مواردی که دوستدار محیط زیست هستند و کمترین میزان آلاینده را تولید می کنند، انجام می دهیم.
هدف ما، همخوانی بین کاربردی بودن، زیبایی و حفظ محیط زیست است. محصولات ما با طراحیهای منحصر به فرد، نه تنها جذاب و چشمگیر هستند بلکه پیام شما را به جامعه مخاطبتان منتقل میکنند.

Name: mysoy Duftkerzen-Manufaktur
Description:
Mit Spaß an der Sache wollen wir mit unserer Marke FRECHEKERZEN  Sojawachs als echte Alternative zum herkömmlichen Paraffin (Erdöl) präsentieren. Wir legen dabei Wert auf Handarbeit und hochwertige Zutaten bei der Herstellung unserer Duftkerzen.

In einer Zeit, in der uns nachhaltiger Konsum immer wichtiger wird, achten viele von uns darauf, umweltfreundliche Alternativen für alltägliche Produkte zu finden. Duftkerzen sind dabei keine Ausnahme. Doch nicht alle Kerzen sind gleich – und besonders Sojawachskerzen bieten zahlreiche Vorteile gegenüber herkömmlichen Paraffinkerzen. Sie sind nicht nur umweltfreundlicher, sondern bieten auch Vorteile für die Gesundheit und schaffen eine nachhaltige Atmosphäre in deinem Zuhause.

Name: Kuuraii
Description:
Kuuraii was born from a question - what if nostalgia could be more than just a feeling? What if it could be delivered, unboxed, experienced?

In today’s world, cultural nostalgia is everywhere, but scattered. One store for sweets. Another for traditional sarees. A third for toys or spices. The essence was there - but the experience was fragmented.

At Kuuraii, we brought it all together.
One name. One platform. A curated celebration of memory and heritage.

We began with food - the kind that reminds you of home. But the journey quickly expanded. Today, we offer products that span generations and categories: handcrafted sarees, vintage-inspired toys, heirloom recipes, and more. Each item tells a story - of a place, a time, a tradition.

To us, Kuuraii isn’t just commerce.
It’s curation. It’s connection. It’s the preservation of a feeling we all chase: home.

We’re here to make the past part of your present - beautifully, conveniently, and authentically.

Name: Coastal Carolina Cutting Boards by The Dean Company
Description:
Coastal Carolina Cutting Boards (CCCB) by The Dean Company is a family business of woodworkers stretching back five generations.  The Dean Family began its involvement in woodworking as manufacturing of veneers and matching hardwoods.  Although we no longer manufacture veneers, The Dean Company manufactures stair treads, moldings, decking, paneling, tabletops, countertops and supply wood to the marine industry.



The cutting board business came about when owner, Tom Dean, made cutting boards for friends as Christmas gifts.  He tested sales by producing and sanding them in his driveway.  He and his then 10-year-old son would sell them on the street corner.  That proved to be a huge success, so we began production in our shop.  That was in 2015.  Today, we manufacture thousands of cutting boards every week and our numbers continue to grow.

Our staff consists of Veterans and family members of military (current and retired).  All of our products are handcrafted and we try not to make any two the same.  We take great pride in making sure our products meet your expectations and hope it shows in our work.



We own two laser engraving machines and a CNC machine.  We can laser engrave your boards with your Company logo or message, add a juice tray, cut out a shape, etc.  There are endless possibilities!  We like to think of it as Effortless Marketing!
