Name: Pullendreher
Description:
Was uns antreibt
Unsere Philosophie basiert auf Nachhaltigkeit, gesellschaftlicher Verantwortung und regionaler Produktion. Wir positionieren uns in der heutigen Zeit bewusst für diese Werte, denn die Umwelt und auch die Menschen liegen uns am Herzen. Wir wollen unseren Teil dazu beitragen.
Begleitet uns auf diesem Weg und werdet Teil unserer Geschichte.

Geschichte
Wir kennen uns schon lange, sind Kaufmann und Handwerker. Wir teilen eine Leidenschaft, das Grillen. Was uns schon immer genervt hat? Saucenflaschen jeglicher Art die wir nicht leer bekamen. Den Rest immer in die Tonne? Kommt für uns nicht in Frage. Halterungen gibt es unzählig viele, für jede Größe, aus sämtlichen Materialien. Aber was, wenn wir ständig andere Saucen, andere Flaschenformen benutzen?

Edelstahl
Hier ist die Lösung für all deine Probleme: Endlich Saucen stabil und sicher auf den Tisch stellen. Sogar den letzten Rest bekommst du damit aus der Pulle raus, denn wenn du sie brauchst, ist die Sauce da wo sie hin soll: im Flaschenhals! Dabei ist der Pullendreher ein echter Hingucker - Edelstahl aus dem Ruhrpott. Die Pins stellst du so, wie du sie brauchst - fertig. 

Wir arbeiten regional - 100% Ruhrpott. Besonders stolz sind wir auf unsere Partnerschaft mit der Werkstatt Constantin-Bewatt (Diakonie Ruhr). Dank diesen besonderen Menschen können wir euch höchste Qualität liefern und jedes einzelne Paket ist mit Liebe und Sorgfalt handverpackt.

Name: Ateliê Criativo - Anima Antica
Description:
Buongiorno, antiquers 

Me chamo Vanessa e sou a pessoa por trás do Ateliê Criativo Anima Antica!

O ateliê começou a surgir no meu imaginário enquanto eu me formava em Engenharia Mecânica, é isso mesmo rs. Mas foi só alguns meses depois de formada que eu comecei a levar ele a sério, já que não me identificava com a minha profissão de formação. E por trás dele, eu queria transmitir um universo que sempre amei, vintage, artesanal e em tons terrosos rs. 

Como boa apaixonada por antiguidades e pela atmosfera rústica da Itália, o nome não poderia fugir da temática. Decidi então chamar o ateliê de Anima Antica, que significa "alma antiga" em italiano!

E foi assim que surgiu o meu xodózim

Name: Cactus Moments
Description:
Bienvenue chez Cactus Moments, là où l’art rencontre l’innovation.

 Sur notre site web et application, chacun peut donner vie à ses idées en modifiant nos personnages et arrière-plans pour représenter sa famille ou ses amis en quelques clics. Une fois la création achevée, nous imprimons sur poster, mug et d’autres supports de qualité.

Nos trois façons de travailler :

1 En ligne : Nos clients peuvent créer leurs illustrations depuis leur domicile. En quelques clics, ils façonnent leurs illustrations, en seulement trois jours, ils les reçoivent chez eux, prêtes à être installées.

2 Événements : Nous venons avec notre application lors d'événements tels que des lancements d'entreprise, des soirées d'inauguration, des mariages, et bien d'autres. Vous avez la possibilité d'inclure ou non votre logo dans nos illustrations et de créer des illustrations sur mesure sur le thème de l'événement ou de la société.
 Nous venons équipés de tablettes et d'imprimantes, ainsi les invités peuvent créer leurs illustrations sur place en s'amusant et nous les imprimons en direct, offrant ainsi des souvenirs uniques et instantanés de votre marque.

3 Application en Magasin : Nous intégrons notre application dans les boutiques qui personnalisent des produits tels que des posters, des mugs et bien d’autres. Vous avez accès à notre application, permettant ainsi à vos clients de personnaliser en direct toutes nos illustrations. Vous recevez le fichier instantanément sur votre plateforme dédiée et pouvez l’imprimer sur le moment.

 Ensemble, créons des moments mémorables, joignez-vous à l’aventure !

Name: Salambrate.nl
Description:
Welkom bij Salambrate, waar elk geschenk een verhaal vertelt en elke verrassing een hart raakt. 

Bij Salambrate begrijpen we de zoektocht naar het perfecte geschenk dat zowel betekenis als schoonheid uitstraalt. Het is onze missie om het online vinden van gepaste, inspirerende cadeaus eenvoudig te maken voor iedereen. Met een diep begrip van de unieke waarden en tradities die onze islamitische gemeenschap koestert, bieden we een scala aan op maat gemaakte geschenkopties, perfect voor het erkennen van de inspanningen van uw medewerkers of het vieren van zakelijke mijlpalen.

Onze diensten zijn speciaal ontworpen voor zakelijke klanten die hun waardering willen tonen en hun relaties willen versterken. Of het nu gaat om een elegante cadeaubox voor een werknemer, een feestelijke ballon om een bedrijfssucces te markeren, of een attent kaartje om partnerschap te vieren, Salambrate staat klaar met een divers aanbod dat past bij elke zakelijke gelegenheid.

Ontdek onze zorgvuldig samengestelde collecties die zijn ontworpen om aan te sluiten bij de islamitische ethos, waarbij elke keuze een uiting is van respect, liefde en gemeenschapszin. Bezoek www.salambrate.nl om meer te ontdekken over hoe wij samen met u momenten van vreugde en waardering kunnen creëren binnen uw organisatie.

Laat ons uw zakelijke giftingspartner zijn en samen verrijken we de werkplek met geschenken die spreken tot het hart van uw team en zakelijke partners!

Name: PNWB Office Products
Description:
Since our start in Seattle in 1975, PNWB (Pacific Northwest Business) has been delivering the top-brand office essentials to a local and global customer base. We have quickly grown to offer a comprehensive catalog of school and office supplies, electronics and technology, furniture, cleaning and janitorial supplies, food service supplies, industrial and safety products, and more.

Competitive and Bulk Pricing:

We are dedicated to offering competitive prices to our customers. In fact, we can beat the big box retailers in most cases. Our bulk buy program is the easiest way to get the best deal. Simply stated, shipping products in bulk is more cost-effective for us, which allows us to offer significant discounts to you. Learn more about the benefits of buying in bulk.

Free and Fast Shipping:

Along with our competitive pricing structure, we offer free shipping on all orders over $50. And we ship it fast. Generally, you can expect 1-2 day delivery within the 48 contiguous Unites States. For more info on shipping and freight orders, visit our shipping policy page.

Certified Reseller for Amazon.com and Walmart:

Since credibility matters, we also want you to know PNWB is a certified reseller on Amazon and Walmart. This means we have done our due diligence to build a good relationship and become a trusted partner on these major retail platforms.  

Excellent Customer Service:

We believe in making our customer interactions as pleasing as possible. Our customers deserve to be greeted by someone who will act on their needs with a sense of urgency and importance. We have a top-notch customer service team ready to help. Contact us here.

We appreciate your business!

Name: Gifts Made Easy
Description:
It was 3 years ago when Ali, one of our founding partners and self-confessed gift shopper, was struggling to find some themed gifts, cards and wrapping for a some close relatives. 

Looking for curated gifts for lovers of animals, gardening, food and cars, along with husband Rob and a family friend the first specialist online giftshop was born, specialising in motoring gifts.

Following the success of that first venture, Gifts Made Easy was born to widen the availability of themed gifts, cards and wrapping making it easier for you to put a smile on the face of those you love and care about.

Indeed, from those early days this has always been out "why" and was recently illustrated in some wonderful feedback we received from one of our customers of our first venture:

"Not just a Landrover card for my Dad; to my Dad, who has dementia, this wasn’t just a card! This was more than that! This great card brought back fond memories to him of the days, he owned and drove his Landrover and the fantastic enjoyment it gave him and my Mum.

As you can imagine he loved it! Especially hearing the start up sounds! Please keep doing what you’re doing. It really brings a lot of happiness to peoples lives."

We very much hope you find a gift on our site to bring similar smiles and happiness to your loved one, friend, relative or colleague.

Name: Colourful Smells
Description:
Colourful Smells je slovenska blagovna znamka, specializirana za ročno izdelane veganske dišeče voske, ki vaš dom napolnijo s čudovitimi vonji in ustvarjajo prijetno vzdušje. Naša strast je ustvarjanje kakovostnih izdelkov, ki so prijazni do ljudi, živali in okolja.

Naše vrednote:

-  Naravno in vegansko: Uporabljamo rastlinski vosek in kakovostna parfumska olja, ki so v
brez parabenov, sulfatov, ftalatov in fosfatov. Naši izdelki niso testirani na živalih in ne vsebujejo živalskih sestavin.

-  Trajnostno in okolju prijazno: Skrbimo za naš planet z uporabo biorazgradljivih materialov in okolju prijazne embalaže. Stremimo k zmanjševanju okoljskega odtisa na vsakem koraku.

-  Kakovost in strokovnost: Skozi nenehno izobraževanje in raziskovanje prinašamo najboljše iz sveta dišav v vaš dom. Naš cilj je postati vodilni strokovnjaki na področju dišečih voskov.

Kaj ponujamo:

-  Širok izbor vonjev: Od svežih citrusov, pomirjujoče sivke, sladke vanilije do eksotičnih začimb – pri nas boste našli dišavo za vsak okus in priložnost.

-  Izobraževanje in nasveti: Delimo svoje znanje preko blogov, člankov in objav, da vam pomagamo izbrati prave dišave in kar najbolje izkoristiti naše izdelke.

-  Personaliziran pristop: Verjamemo v individualnost, zato vam omogočamo, da ustvarite unikatne kombinacije vonjev in prilagodite izkušnjo svojim željam.

Naša misija:

Želimo izboljšati kakovost bivanja ljudi z ustvarjanjem naravnih, kakovostnih in etičnih dišečih izdelkov, ki prinašajo sprostitev, veselje in harmonijo v vsak dom.

Pridružite se nam:

Sledite nam za posodobitve, novice in strokovne nasvete s področja dišečih voskov in aromaterapije. Skupaj lahko ustvarimo bolj dišeč, sproščen in prijazen svet.

Name: The Perfect Desk
Description:
In een tijd waarin alles digitaal lijkt te gaan, blijft hoogwaardige stationery een krachtige manier om indruk te maken en productiviteit te stimuleren. Bij The Perfect Desk geloven we dat kwalitatieve kantoorbenodigdheden niet alleen een praktische functie hebben, maar ook bijdragen aan een positieve werkervaring. Een luxe pen die soepel over het papier glijdt, een notitieboek dat uitnodigt om je gedachten te ordenen—dit zijn kleine, maar essentiële details die het verschil maken.

Kwalitatieve stationery geeft werknemers een gevoel van waardering en zorgt voor een georganiseerde werkomgeving. Het verhoogt de productiviteit en maakt dagelijkse taken aangenamer. Bovendien straalt het gebruik van premium kantoorartikelen professionaliteit uit naar klanten en bezoekers. Het zegt: "We nemen ons werk serieus en investeren in de details."

The Perfect Desk biedt een zorgvuldig samengestelde collectie van stijlvolle en duurzame kantoorartikelen die jouw bedrijf helpen om een georganiseerde en inspirerende werkomgeving te creëren. Onze producten zijn ontworpen om de werkdag niet alleen efficiënter, maar ook mooier te maken.

Name: Szumao Stationery & Gift Co., Ltd
Description: Dong Guan Szu Mao Stationery & Gift Co., Ltd., was established on August 1980 in Taiwan specializing in manufacturing various high-end customized metal pens including fountain pens, roller pens, ball pens, mechanical pencils. China Factory was established on May 1996. Szu Mao has owned many national patents of Taiwan for pen-part designs and mechanism designs, and we have passed through the ISO_9002 international quality management system certification. Company concentrate on various art and craft inheritance and innovation application, it has laser、corrosion、multi-color chromatography、transfer printing、blowing、engrave design、sculpture、laser、hand paint、machine engraving etc many decades of art technology operation capability. Constantly upholding the 'Quality centered and Customer oriented’ business philosophy, Szumao has collaborated with over 500 global partners and achieved mutually beneficial cooperation with major brands worldwide over year. In the early year, company was only a processor of ‘metal pen mechanism'. From the first pen produced to the current successful production of 3 billion pens the company has grown to be a large qualified manufacturing enterprise with 32 mature and stable production lines of precision pen-making.

The concept is simple enough, I want to do “all the things” from the conception of an idea through to making it, selling it, and even fix it when it breaks, and do my best to help folks find their flow and have some fun along the way.  I love doing "all the things" even though I am not so great at doing "all the things". I am learning a ton and will continuously make improvements so I can get as good as I can at all these things.  Thanks for joining me on this journey, I hope you enjoy the Super Flow Yo experience as much as I love making it a reality.

Name: ReRezende Design Solucões Personalizadas
Description:
A Rerezende Design nasceu no coração de Deus e chegou ao meu, logo tudo que eu nunca havia pensado ou sonhado passou a se realizar.

Me chamo Renata Rezende, sou natural do Rio de Janeiro. Esposa apaixonada e mãe de 2 meninos que são minhas maiores riquezas, minha família é meu maior alicerce e inspiração.

Com formação em administração, com especialização em Marketing pela FGV, sempre tive como hobby a criação de artes, eu desde muito nova fazia os convites de aniversário de amigas, decoração de festas, etc.

Em 2018 comecei a criar conteúdo para o Grupo de empresas que era colaboradora e isso se tornou orgânico, de forma que minha mente criativa não coube mais dentro de um espaço corporativo e munida desse dom que Deus me deu, decidi que estaria no momento de seguir com minhas próprias pernas.

E como tudo que se refere a Deus, não tem como dar errado, em 2022 dei início ao projeto de criar soluções para empresas alcançarem mais clientes, por meio de materiais gráficos, impressos ou digital.
Costumo refletir sobre o que posso fazer de diferente para acrescentar na vida das pessoas e empresas, esse é o meu propósito.

Por fim, gosto de pautar minha vida na frase de Abraham Lincoln: "O que quer que você seja, seja o melhor."

Essa sou eu,
Renata Rezende

Name: All N All Supplies, LLC
Description:
All-N-All Supplies was founded on the premise that ALL educators should have easy access to ALL of the supplies and educational resources they need for a successful classroom.

The founder of All-N-All Supplies, Reginald Braxton, has enjoyed 30 years in the education arena, meeting the needs of large urban school districts as well as rural districts throughout the nation. Mr. Braxton’s breadth of experience has afforded him the opportunity to personally interact with educators and administrators from all walks of life. This has developed into an expertise in intervention, addressing the needs of culturally and linguistically diverse learner populations. His unique specialization is in helping districts increase student outcomes. Mr. Braxton has won numerous awards for collaborating and engaging in strategic planning, aligning curriculum and resources to help close the achievement gap for hundreds of thousands of students.

Mr. Braxton has come to recognize a consistent need; teachers seek a wide array of classroom supplies and resources--often times in an expedient manner.  He has set out to fulfill that need by establishing a reliable gateway to quality supplies and educational resources.  We are proud to present today, an accessible, one-stop shop for ALL of your supply needs.  Whether it’s for your classroom or your office, we have you covered.

We pride ourselves on personal care and attention to our customers' specific needs.  We also promote equity in education and know the importance of social and emotional learning.  For that reason, we are especially responsive to the needs of those educators who instruct our Black and Brown children on a daily basis.

Your success is our success……we consider ourselves part of your team.  Enjoy the ease and convenience in the quick turnaround of our vast inventory of products, furniture, and education tools, any time you do business with All-N-All Supplies.

Description:
Căutăm mereu modalități de a-i face pe cei dragi să se simtă speciali și apreciați și ne asigurăm că fiecare cadou pe care îl livrăm este cât mai aproape de perfecțiune.

Credem că fiecare persoană ar trebui să poată oferi un cadou unic, indiferent de bugetul pe care îl are. De aceea, am creat un magazin online de unde poți cumpăra cadouri personalizate ieftine pentru orice ocazie, inclusiv zile de naștere, aniversări sau nunți.

Misiunea noastră este simplă: vrem să ajutăm oamenii să găsească cadoul perfect pentru cei dragi. Știm că uneori poate fi greu, așa că ne asigurăm că fiecare produs pe care îl avem este de calitate, accesibil și garantat pentru a oferi o experiență excepțională – chiar dacă nu știi exact ce îți dorești!

Întreaga colecție de cadouri personalizate este pregătită cu gândul la tine. Vei găsi tablouri canvas personalizate, căni, perne, caserole, brelocuri, ceasuri, bijuterii, ardezii personalizate, și multe alte cadouri care cu siguranță vor încânta pe oricine.

Ne străduim să creăm cea mai bună experiență posibilă atât pentru cei care dăruiesc cât și pentru cei care primesc, oferind cadouri accesibile, personalizate cu atenție și livrate rapid.

La Cataleya Gift prețuim profesionalismul și eficiența, motiv pentru care lucrăm doar cu furnizori care ne împărtășesc valorile și viziunea despre calitate și performanță. Punem suflet la fiecare comandă, astfel încât poți cumpăra cu încredere!

Ne face plăcere să dăm viață ideilor tale!
Succes în descoperirea și alegerea cadoului perfect!

Name: Ink & Bloom
Description:
Ink & Bloom is a family-run, female-led, luxury stationery brand founded by designer Louise Clegg. The brand was born in 2020 when Louise sought to bring a collection of aspirational designs to the luxury stationery market that would act as an expression of an individual's personal style and that people would feel proud to show off within their homes.
Inspired by the textures, tones and colours in modern day living, our signature aesthetic is abstract, artful and chic. Louise hand paints and draws most of our designs at our home studio in Manchester using a variety of painting techniques including gouache, acrylic and watercolour.

Our signature minimal aesthetic was born from a desire to create beautiful, aspirational designs that stand out from the crowd and put a smile on peoples faces. We love the satisfaction that comes with receiving a handwritten greeting from a loved one, and strive to bring joy in those precious moments.

We create with sustainability in mind. We select high quality materials to ensure our products are beautiful and well-made and use environmentally certified paper stock for all our printed products. Our packaging is 100% compostable. 

All of our paper goods are proudly printed in England and assembled by hand in our studio to ensure every product is inspected before packaging and shipping.
Luxury Stationery & Paper Goods
A family-run, female-led, luxury stationery brand creating aspirational, purposeful and chic paper goods that celebrate simplicity and expression of an individual's personal style.

Designed in house, our products are made with a conscience. Printed in the U.K. on paper from sustainable sources, completely plastic free and 100% recyclable.

Proudly made in England.

Name: GEMMEcado
Description:
GEMMEcado a lancé en fin 2024 une carte-cadeau « multi-créateurs » 100 % locale, valable directement chez des artisans et créateurs alsaciens. Une initiative nouvelle qui valorise le fait-main, l’économie locale et l’esprit cadeau, tout en offrant une alternative responsable et flexible aux cartes-cadeaux classiques. Le but étant de remettre l’artisanat au cœur de la consommation et favoriser la rencontre entre le client et l’artisan-créateur.

La mission que nous nous sommes donnée est de valoriser les créateurs, illustrateurs et artistes, encourager et favoriser une consommation éthique, raisonnée et solidaire, tout en gardant l’esprit « cadeau » !

Les trois caractéristiques clés de la carte-cadeau GEMMEcado :
•	Multi-créateurs : utilisable, en direct, chez tous les artisans-créateurs partenaires GEMMEcado.
•	Flexible : valable en une ou plusieurs fois, chez un ou plusieurs créateurs.
•	Une vitrine artistique : chaque collection de carte-cadeau proposée valorise un illustrateur ou artiste local en mettant en avant leurs illustrations sur leurs cartes-cadeaux.

GEMMEcado s'adresse :
•	Aux entreprises et collectivités désireuses d’encourager le local pour leurs cadeaux employés et clients, pour toutes les occasions de l’année et pour valoriser leurs programmes RSE.
•	Aux particuliers à la recherche d’un cadeau qui a du sens.

Basée à Strasbourg, GEMMEcado est une initiative fondée pour valoriser l’artisanat et l’illustration en Alsace. Elle met en relation le grand public et les créateurs via une belle carte-cadeau éthique, simple à offrir, et bonne pour l’économie locale.

Mūsų ilgalaikė vizija siekia tapti lydere tarp įmonių, kurios siūlo kokybiškas ir unikalias personalizuotas dovanas. Mes įsipareigojame suteikti jums ne tik produktą, bet ir neįkainojamą patirtį. Mūsų aukštos kvalifikacijos konsultantai stebi tendencijas, rūpinasi detalėmis ir asmeniškai pasirūpins, kad kiekviena dovaną, kurią pasirenkate iš mūsų asortimento, būtų pritaikyta jūsų unikalioms reikmėms.

Mes ne tik siūlome produktus – mes siūlome emocijas, prisiminimus ir džiaugsmą. Mūsų įmonės filosofija grindžiama aukščiausiu dėmesiu detalėms, kokybės standartams ir asmenišku požiūriu į kiekvieną klientą. Leiskite mums padėti jums sukurti tobulą dovaną, kuri taptų išskirtiniu gestu ir paliktų neišdildomą įspūdį. Su mumis kiekviena dovanėlė tampa simboliu, kuriuo išreikšite jūsų tikruosius jausmus ir pagarbą artimam žmogui ar partneriui.

Name: Ingravia Ltd
Description:
With a passion for the environment and a mission to reduce our impact to the planet. 
Ingravia was formed in 2018 as an Eco Friendly personalised gifts company with the simple aim of offering a plastic free alternate personalised gifts.
From the very beginning we have had a no plastic policy, which means all of our packaging is plastic free. 
With every order we plant a tree this is through our charity partner The Eden Reforestation Project. Our goal is to have 50,000 Trees planted by the end of 2022. To date we have planted 25,000 since we started the campaign in 2020. 
We create all our products using eco friendly or sustainable materials using our top of the range laser engraver.

Name: Papelaria Dinâmica
Description:
Jovens e visionários, em 1982, dois amigos que trabalharam juntos em uma mesma papelaria, resolveram colocar em ação o sonho de montar seu negócio próprio.

Assim surgiu a Papelaria Dinâmica em 24 de abril do mesmo ano. A sede ficava no centro de Goiânia, Goiás e era bem pequena. Em 04 de janeiro de 1983 houve uma alteração na razão social e alguns anos depois foi adquirido o lote para a construção da sede própria. 
Houve um grande crescimento da empresa entre 1983 e 1996 e viu-se a necessidade de ampliar os negócios.

Foi assim que surgiu a primeira filial, em 10 de junho de 1996, na Av. T-63, Setor Bueno. A saída de um dos sócios-fundadores e a admissão de um novo sócio em 1997, ocasionou uma mudança de endereço na matriz, que foi transferida para a Rua 68, esquina com a Av. Paranaíba, Setor Central.

Com o aumento da demanda de consumidores da região sul da cidade, percebeu-se a oportunidade de crescimento para a filial, que passou a ter instalações próprias, modernas, confortáveis e amplas, com 1.280m² de área, com subsolo para estacionamento e elevador, a partir de 22 de outubro de 2007. A Papelaria Dinâmica está em contínuo crescimento e conta com uma equipe de mais de 80 colaboradores dedicados e dinâmicos. Dê mais cor e dinâmica aos seus dias. Seja bem-vindo.

Name: Keep This Cracker
Description:
I started my business in 2013, drawing on 20 years experience designing and developing gifts for the retail market. With a flash of inspiration and many prototypes later, the first reusable Christmas crackers were launched. 

'Keep This Cracker' pulls like a standard disposable one but slides open without tearing. The patented construction allows you to easily replace the snap.  They come flat-packed in reusable card wallets, ready-made, just pop them into shape and fill them with your own chosen gifts. My latest invention, a low-noise ecosnap, pulls with a gentle pop. Designed for those who can't tolerate loud bangs and for pet-owners too. But for those who like their crackers with a bang, they work equally well with noisy snaps.

Not just for Christmas... these crackers are ideal for all occasions, wedding favours, speciality packaging, hospitality and corporate gifting.
Designed by Bea Thackeray, Made in the UK.

Hoe werkt het?
1. Download je gratis tekensjabloon en print het op papier. Of download een digitaal tekensjabloon en maak je tekening op een computer of tablet.

3. Kies je kleuren voor de breigarens en personaliseer je ontwerp met je naam als kunstenaar.

Op zoek naar een persoonlijk cadeau voor mama, papa, oma & opa, tante of juf? Dit unieke cadeau, door jou gemaakt, verwarmt de harten van iedereen en ze zullen je geschenk voor altijd koesteren. Of ontwerp je eigen kindersjaal voor jezelf en je beste vriend(in)!
Koester je huisdier met een unieke plaid
Bij Relooped breien we ook de foto van je huisdier in een plaid. Nu kun je knus onder een deken kruipen met een artistiek portret van je geliefde huisdier.
Duik in je verbeelding en maak je eigen ontwerp op relooped.nl

İster evde, ister kafede, isterse parkta olsun, ofisimiz bizi takip eder.

Bu anlayış, çalışma hayatımıza yeni bir soluk getirir.
Yaratıcılığımızı ve üretkenliğimizi arttırırken, iş ve özel hayat arasındaki dengeyi korumaya olanak tanır.

Name: William West Candles
Description:
Nestled in the heart of Eton, William West Candles carries forward a legacy that began in 1661. Our home, The Cockpit, is a 15th-century timber-framed marvel - the oldest building in town. While temporarily operating off-site due to renovations, our commitment to quality and tradition remains unwavering.
We've come a long way since the days of tallow candles. Today, we pride ourselves on crafting vegan-friendly soy candles and sustainable beeswax candles, each burning for over 25 hours and filling your space with irresistible scents. Our unique fragrances are inspired by Eton and Windsor, allowing you to experience the rich history of our town with every flicker.
Each William West candle is lovingly handmade, blending centuries-old techniques with modern sustainability. We honor our roots by creating stick candles using traditional methods, just as William West would have done in 1661.
But we're more than just candles. Visit The Cockpit to enjoy our homemade gin at our on-site tavern, or join our popular candle-making classes to create your own piece of Eton history.
Currently, we're leading a crucial renovation project to preserve The Cockpit for future generations. All profits from our candle sales directly support this endeavor, allowing you to own a beautiful product while contributing to the preservation of a historic landmark.
At William West Candles, we're not just crafting candles - we're keeping history alive, one flame at a time. Join us in illuminating the past and brightening the future.

Description:
Our Specialties:
 
- Promotional Items
- Corporate Merchandise
- Printing Solutions
- Hampers for Bloggers
- Thermocol 3D Replicas
- Acrylic 3D Fabrication

MAESTRIA as the name suggests is an enterprise focused on amalgamating artistry and skills. With 20+ years in India and the Middle East. We provide corporate gifting and printing solutions and curate / create innovative merchandise for your brands to give you the edge and make a statement.

OUR STORY

I listened to a multinational FMCG client, brief me on a fabric printing job with childlike innocence. She was far from practical. But then making the dream real, was my job; not hers. The intricacy of her requirement coupled with the size of the order was challenging. I clarified her requirements and understood the criticality of the task.

Now, with the team, we excitedly brainstormed the fabric quality and print. We chose the master craftsmen and mentally worked out the logistics. Often a task seems simple, but there’s so much more that goes into it plus the glitches that could arise. At MAESTRIA we handle any eventuality proactively and in fact, we thrive on it. From corporate merchandise to customized handmade niche orders. From large shipments to a handful of high precision gifts.

We at MAESTRIA ensure a seamless and smooth execution. You do not need to sweat the detail. That’s our job; to look into minutest details in design, creation, and delivery.

WHAT SETS US APART

Our expert and qualified professionals craft solutions to all problems and ensure that your ideas come to life. We believe that client satisfaction plays a pivotal role in building a lasting alliance. Client satisfaction through quality, standardization, and meeting daunting deadlines.

Name: LOTUS GIFTING STUDIO
Description:
Lotus Gifting Studio is a haven for those seeking to transform ordinary moments into extraordinary memories through the art of personalized and customized gifts. Nestled at the intersection of creativity and sentiment, this studio is a one-of-a-kind destination that crafts bespoke treasures to celebrate life's special occasions.

Vision:
Lotus Gifting Studio envisions a world where every gift tells a story, where the essence of personal connection is captured in the thoughtful details of each bespoke creation.

Mission:
Our mission is to elevate the act of gift-giving to an art form, enabling individuals to express their unique emotions through meticulously crafted, customized gifts. We strive to be the catalysts for unforgettable moments and lasting impressions.

Distinctive Features:

Tailored Elegance:
At Lotus Gifting Studio, customization is our forte. From monogrammed initials to cherished photos, we weave personal touches seamlessly into every creation, ensuring that each gift is as unique as the individual receiving it.

Diverse Selection:
Lotus Gifting Studio offers a diverse array of gift options, ranging from timeless classics to avant-garde creations. Whether you seek Personalized Combos, engraved keepsakes, or customized merchandise, our curated selection caters to a multitude of tastes and occasions.

Innovation and Technology:
Embracing the latest in technology, Lotus Gifting Studio seamlessly integrates innovation into its customization process. Cutting-edge techniques ensure precision and quality, allowing us to push the boundaries of what is possible in personalized gifting.

In the heart of Lotus Gifting Studio lies the belief that a well-chosen gift has the power to convey emotions, strengthen connections, and create lasting memories. Step into our world, where each gift is an eloquent expression of love, gratitude, and celebration.

Name: Copy Concept
Description:
Come and visit our walk around shop based in Cleckheaton, West Yorkshire where we have been popular locally for over 30 years now, specializing in printing and office stationery.

As well as general office stationery, we offer a full range of artists equipment and materials including drawing boards and draughting chairs, plan chests and work tables, paints, oils and papers.

We also offer on-site photocopying, colour laser copying, plan reproduction, drafting & reprographics, laminating and binding services, amongst others.

We now produce large format point of sale items, such as outdoor and pull up banners. All our large format media is printed using high quality pigment inks, including our increasingly popular canvas prints and our watercolour textured giclee prints.

We welcome account holders and will send you our comprehensive catalogue on request. Most goods can be delivered within 24 hours. If there is anything you need to ask us, give us a call on 01274 870219, or Contact Us and we will get back to you, thanks for visiting.

Our shop is open Monday - Friday 9am – 5pm, where there will be a member of staff available to help.

Name: That Little Corner
Description:
We all have a little corner. Maybe it's a corner in your room, house, in the city, at a cafe that you visit often or maybe it's a corner in your mind or your heart. Wherever that corner is, it's true that we all have a special corner that gives us a sense of calm, a feeling that you belong. 

When the noises around us get too loud, sometimes all we need is to find that corner where we feel safe and shut the world out. 

That Little Corner is your safe space, your chill zone. It's a world without walls where kindness comes first. Like we say, it's a little corner with big comfort. 

We thoughtfully design each and ever product with months of research and trial & error to bring to you the best, extraordinary products that are good for you and your heart and easy on your mental health.

Xoş gəldiniz!

Prime Hədiyyə olaraq, sizlərə özəl və anlamlı hədiyələr təqdim etməkdən qürur duyuruq. Online mağazamız vasitəsi ilə çox asanlıqla sevdiklərinizə özəl günlərdə və xoşbəxt anlarda  ala biləcəyiniz möhtəşəm hədiyyə məhsullarını məhsullar təqdim edirik.

Biz, hədiyyənin sadəcə bir material olmadığına inanırıq. Hər hədiyyə, bir duyğu, bir xatirə və bir bağ qurma vasitəsidir. Bu səbəbdən, hər bir məshulumuzu xüsusi diqqətlə seçir, paketləyir ve sevdiklərinizə çatdırırıq.

Müştərilərimizin gözləntilərini qarşılamaq və hətta aşmaq üçün davamlı olaraq çalışırıq. Hər bir məhsulumuzu sevgiylə seçir, keyfiyyəti ön planda tutur və müştəri məmnuniyyətini hər zaman ən üst səviyyədə tuturuq.

Missiyamız, sizlərə özəl anlarınızı daha da özəl edəcək, sevdiklərinizə unudulmaz, kreativ hədiyyə təcrübələri təqdim etməkdir. Bu səbəbdən məhsul çeşidlərimizi davamlı olaraq genişlədir, yeni trendləri izləyir və ən yaradıcı hədiyyə fikirləri həyata geçiririk.

Siz dəyərli müştərilərimizin dəstəyi ilə, hər gün böyüyür və inkişaf edirik. Bizimlə birlikdə alış veriş etdiyinizdən dolayı təşəkkür edir, ən gözəl anlarınızı və xatirlərinizi bizimlə paylaşdığınız üçün minnətdarıq.

Name: Care Cottage Crates
Description:
As sisters who spent years navigating the demands of the corporate world, we know firsthand how hard it can be to find time to show love and care. Deadlines, meetings, and endless to-do lists often leave little room for nurturing meaningful connections with the people who matter most. 

That’s why we created Care Cottage Crates—to save time for busy, caring individuals while helping them share thoughtful, intentional gifts that not only show love but also offer the recipient a much-needed moment of calm and care.

Our inspiration comes from the generations of love and care that shaped us. Our grandparents’ cottage in the northern woods was more than just a home—it was a sanctuary where love was shared in the smallest, most meaningful ways. Whether it was a comforting meal, a heartfelt note, or a warm drink by the water’s edge, they taught us that true care is found in life’s quiet, intentional moments. This legacy of thoughtfulness was paired with the entrepreneurial spirit of our mom, the founder of The Bakery Shoppe, who showed us how to merge business with love and purpose. Through her small business, she demonstrated that care and connection could extend far beyond family, reaching the hearts of her customers and community. Together, these values laid the foundation for Care Cottage Crates.

Each crate is thoughtfully curated with high-quality items from small makers, designers, and authors, ensuring every box feels like a warm embrace. Whether you’re sending a crate to brighten someone’s day, encourage a moment of rest, or treating yourself to the gift of downtime, Care Cottage Crates is here to help you make meaningful connections through simple, heartfelt gestures.

We’d love to help you share the care, while saving time.

Met onze jarenlange ervaring en focus op klanttevredenheid zorgen wij voor een probleemloze bestelervaring en snelle levering, zodat u zich kunt concentreren op wat echt belangrijk is: uw werk.

Waarom kiezen voor Clips and Paper? Naast ons enorme productaanbod, staan wij bekend om onze flexibele en klantgerichte aanpak. Heeft u specifieke wensen? Wij denken graag met u mee en bieden oplossingen op maat, zodat u altijd de juiste producten op het juiste moment in huis hebt. 

Met Clips and Paper kiest u voor gemak, snelheid en betrouwbaarheid. Ontdek vandaag nog hoe wij uw kantoor efficiënter kunnen maken en neem contact met ons op. Wij staan klaar om u te helpen!

Name: lionskarten.de
Description:
Der LIONS CLUB MÜNCHEN „ALT-SCHWABING“ wurde 1963 gegründet und feierte 2013 sein 50-jähriges Bestehen. Er ist von Anfang an nicht nur den Zielen von LIONS CLUBS INTERNATIONAL, sondern auch der besonderen kulturellen Tradition Schwabings, für die Frank Wedekind und der „Simplizissimus“ Zeichen setzten, verpflichtet. Seine ca. 40 Mitglieder setzen im Rahmen ihrer Unterstützungs-Activities nicht nur Spendengelder ein, sondern engagieren sich vor allem aktiv und persönlich durch tätige Hilfe in vielen Einzelfällen.

Einen großen Teil der finanziellen Mittel für seine Activities erarbeitet unser „Hilfswerk des Lions Club München Alt-Schwabing e.V.“ seit mehr als 35 Jahren durch den Vertrieb der LIONS-Karten und seit 2003 zusätzlich durch die Veranstaltung des jährlichen LIONS-MONOPTEROS-Laufes (siehe www.monopteroslauf.de). Das „Hilfswerk“ ist im Sinne des LC München „Alt-Schwabing“ beim Vertrieb der Karten sowie bei unseren Benefizveranstaltungen tätig und erfüllt damit die Anforderungen an die Gemeinnützigkeit. Daher erhalten Sie mit der Rechnung auch eine Zuwendungsbescheinigung.

Name: SeeTheTape
Description:
See The Tape is the world’s first sticky tape with a visible edge, designed by an eye surgeon to solve one of life’s most frustrating problems... finding the edge of the roll.

Using our patent approved Dark Core technology, the edge of the tape is always visible. It saves time, prevents waste, and brings frustration free wrapping, packing, and crafting to homes, offices, and retailers across the UK.

For retailers and suppliers, See The Tape offers a high margin, fast moving product that stands out on the shelf and tells a story customers instantly understand. It’s clever, practical, and made to perform. With strong repeat appeal, premium quality, and display ready packaging, it’s a product that sells itself.

Invented by an eye surgeon and featured on BBC’s Dragon’s Den, See The Tape combines human inspired design with precision manufacturing. Every roll represents the simplicity and smart thinking that customers look for in the products they use every day.

We’re now expanding our network of retail and wholesale partners across the UK. If you’re a distributor, stockist, or supplier looking for the next great household innovation, we’d love to connect.

Visit seethetape.co.uk
 to learn more.

Name: SatiricalStuff
Description:
Welcome to my shop — a curated collision of pop culture, politics, and passion. I’m a dad of three, born in the 1970s, raised on 1980s telly, and shaped by the rave culture and social upheavals of the 1990s. My life has been a mixtape of football chants, film quotes, underground beats, and protest slogans — and I try to reflect that in every design I create.

This store is more than just merchandise; it’s a love letter to the things that shaped me — from terrace culture to cult TV, from political satire to pulsing warehouse parties. You’ll find bold, high-quality designs inspired by Liverpool FC, iconic moments in film and TV, the raw honesty of street art, and the rebellious energy of youth movements.

I design every item with care, humour, and nostalgia — but also with an eye on quality. If I wouldn’t proudly wear it or drink from it myself, it doesn’t make the cut. Whether you're here for football nostalgia, vintage pop art, or a mug that makes a statement, I hope you find something that speaks to you. Thanks for stopping by — this is my world, on a t-shirt or a mug.

Ev & Lu began as a journey of healing and discovery, inspired by the legacies of two incredible women, Lucy and Evelyn. Though Lucy and Evelyn were lost too soon, their inspiring spirits live on in every curated gift. We honor their memories through Ev & Lu, celebrating their enduring influence and legacy.

At Ev & Lu, we are committed to the art of thoughtful gifting, believing deeply in the power of a well-chosen gift to express the inexpressible, heal the unseen, and celebrate the remarkable. Our expertly crafted gift boxes are designed for every conceivable occasion—be it birthdays, graduations, sympathy, to say thank you, Mother’s Day, Father’s Day, new babies, expressions of gratitude, corporate, housewarming celebrations, real estate closings, or just because. Each box is a unique blend of quality, creativity, and care, created not merely to delight but to forge meaningful connections.

Our collections are designed to cater to all of life’s moments, big and small. From the joy of weddings—where our gift boxes add a memorable touch to your special day—to the appreciation for wedding guests, bridesmaids, and groomsmen through personalized gifts that convey thanks and add a unique flair to your celebrations. Furthermore, our corporate gift offerings are crafted to strengthen business relationships with elegance, conveying respect and appreciation in a sophisticated manner.

Based out of Sioux Falls, South Dakota, we take pride in serving customers nationwide. No matter where your loved ones or business partners are, we ensure that our carefully curated gift boxes are delivered with care throughout the United States. At Ev & Lu, we're here to help you stay connected, no matter the distance.

Name: Memopills
Description:
Welcome to our online photo book and gift creation service. We are passionate about helping you create the perfect gift for your loved ones by transforming your cherished photos into tangible keepsakes.

Memopills is a type of photo album that is designed to help preserve and enhance memories, just like medicine helps to preserve and enhance our physical health. The name "Memopills" is a combination of "memory" and "pills" to emphasize this concept.

The album itself may have special features that make it ideal for preserving memories, such as acid-free pages to prevent deterioration, protective sleeves to prevent damage, or customizable layouts to suit individual preferences. Additionally, some Memopills may have digital components, such as augmented reality or QR codes, that can enhance the viewing experience or provide additional information about the photos.

Overall, the goal of Memopills is to help people cherish and revisit their memories for years to come, just like medicine helps us maintain and improve our physical health.

Our photo book services make it easy to convert your digital photos into a stunning memory book that you can order in hard copy and have delivered to your doorstep. With our custom design options, you can add your personal touch by customizing your photo book with a special message, title, and layout that reflect your unique relationship.

We understand that each relationship is different, and that's why we offer customized messaging options based on the nature of your relationship. You can choose from a wide range of pre-designed themes, or our designers can create a unique design that fits your specific needs.

Our easy-to-use online photo book and gift creation platform ensures that you can create a stunning gift in just a few easy steps. Whether it's a birthday gift, anniversary gift, or just a special surprise for a loved one, we are here to help you create a gift that will be cherished for years to come.

Name: Mayne Tech Solutions
Description:
Industry Overview: Corporate Gifting & Promotional Products
The corporate gifting industry is a growing sector within marketing, branding, and B2B services, helping businesses strengthen relationships with employees, clients, and partners through thoughtful gifts. It plays a crucial role in brand recognition, customer loyalty, and employee engagement.

Market Trends & Insights:
Growing Demand for Personalization – Companies prefer customized gifts with branding, names, or messages.
Sustainability Focus – Eco-friendly and reusable gifts are becoming more popular.
Tech-Driven Gifting – Smart gadgets, wireless accessories, and digital gift cards are trending.
Experiential Gifting – Businesses are moving towards non-material gifts like wellness programs, travel vouchers, and digital subscriptions.
Bulk & Subscription-Based Gifting – Companies are opting for regular gifting programs for employees and clients.
Key Segments:
Corporate & Employee Gifting – For appreciation, onboarding, and milestone celebrations.
Client & Partner Gifting – Strengthening business relationships with customized giveaways.
Promotional & Marketing Merchandise – Brand-focused products for trade shows, conferences, and events.
Luxury & Executive Gifts – Premium gifts for high-level executives and VIP clients.
Festive & Seasonal Gifting – Special gifts for holidays, Diwali, Christmas, and New Year.
Challenges & Opportunities:
 Opportunities:

Rising corporate budgets for employee appreciation.
E-commerce and online gifting platforms expanding reach.
Demand for unique and high-quality gifting solutions.
 Challenges:

Competition with low-cost mass suppliers.
Need for innovation to stand out.
Managing bulk logistics and timely deliveries.
Would you like me to tailor this overview further to your business vision?

Name: Kaarkhanah
Description:
At Kaarkhanah, we as artisans believe that true craftsmanship goes hand in hand with sustainability. We endeavor to create beautiful, high-quality products while preserving the environment and supporting our community. Here is how we do it: 

Recycling and Eco-Friendly Materials: Our Papier Mâché products are made from recycled paper, diverting waste from landfills and giving it a new, artistic life. This not only reduces environmental impact but also honors traditional Kashmiri artistry. Supporting Local Artisans: As artisans ourselves, we are dedicated to fair wages and support for local artisans. By ensuring that our artisans are paid fairly, we help sustain their craft and the cultural heritage of Kashmir. 

Financial Independence for Women: Our workshops offer women in conservative communities the space to develop artisanal skills, allowing them to earn an income. This initiative helps preserve Kashmiri crafts while promoting women's financial self-reliance.

Future Goals for Sustainable Production Practices: We are continually exploring new ways to enhance our sustainability efforts, including sourcing eco-friendly dyes and expanding our recycling programs. Our goal is to continually improve and adapt to better serve our community and the environment. 

Join Us in Making a Difference: By choosing Kaarkhanah, you are supporting not only traditional Kashmiri crafts but also a more sustainable and equitable future. Together, let’s make a positive impact on our planet and community.

Seja para kits de onboarding que encantam novos colaboradores, identidade visual para projetos que reforçam sua presença, toda parte gráfica impressa com acabamento impecável, brindes corporativos que geram conexão genuína, ou personalizados para eventos e datas sazonais que deixam uma impressão duradoura – a Glowth é sua parceira confiável.

Nossos valores são a agilidade com excelência, oferecendo entregas rápidas sem comprometer a qualidade; soluções sob medida que atendem às suas necessidades específicas com ideias autênticas; a atenção aos detalhes como diferencial, garantindo que cada brinde conte uma história; uma parceria próxima e descomplicada, atuando como consultores estratégicos que vendem soluções, não apenas produtos; e o impacto afetivo e funcional, criando brindes que não só funcionam, mas que também geram conexão emocional.

Se você é um profissional de RH e Endomarketing buscando engajar seu time, uma equipe de Marketing e Branding querendo fortalecer sua marca, um setor de Eventos e Comunicação Institucional planejando ações memoráveis, uma agência de marketing em busca de um parceiro inovador, ou um tomador de decisão que valoriza o impacto estratégico de brindes e kits personalizados – a Glowth está aqui para fazer sua marca brilhar com intenção. - Custom made with care.

Name: Snappy Pots
Description:
Snappy Pots are personalizable products designed to make you smile. 

We offer planters, pen holders, and clicker fidgets that you can "snap" different charms onto. The charms are interchangable so you can create a new look anytime you want. 

You can shop online through our website, but we also love doing custom orders for events and corporate gifts. For something quick and simple, you can select from charms and containers we already have available. 

If you want to do something even more unique, we love creating custom products -- whether that's a charm of your logo (or your client's), a custom sized planter, or a fidget to match the theme of your event. 

Our products stand out from traditional gifts and have more meaning when you select charms that reflect the recipient's interests. Rather than a one-time use product, Snappy Pots can be an ongoing experience as the recipient changes out the charms to match their mood for the day or the upcoming holiday. 

With our "word charms" you can also create an uplifiting affirmation or personal reminder that you are loved, strong, beautiful, or enough. Many of our customers use their Snappy Pot to help them with depression and add a little joy to their day. 

Whether you want a unique planter for your succulents and houseplants, or a fun gift that will be remembered, Snappy Pots are a great option.

Name: Ricn'Gus Candles
Description:
All started as a school project for my children during lock-down. We made a few candles and we started to use them in our own house. The result couldn't be better, as my son Ricardo said, "With the scent each candle releases in each room, is like having a walk thru a garden during spring time, when the flowers are opening"! So we manufactured a few more to offer to friends and family.
After some excellent reviews, we decided to transform a school project into a business. We made a more profound research, improved our knowledge about candles and the entire industry, and after some tests we realized we were ready for our first batch.
We look at our business very seriously, we are hand pouring small batches to guarantee all safety rules are kept in good measure, to protect our family and also to the families of our beloved friends/customers.
The Brand Ricn'Gus comes from our children, Ricardo and Gustavo, looking that they are the true mentors of this project.
They are very demanding and are always pushing us to make more tests with other fragrances and increase our range of products. Today Ricn'Gus is a brand of candles, melts and reed diffusers, but tomorrow, who knows...
I hope you enjoy our range of products, and please, feel free to contact us for suggestion's!

Name: Gourmet Gift Hampers Tasmania
Description:
Providing Tasmania's Finest and Most Sustainable Gourmet Gift Hampers. Supporting Tasmania’s Finest Growers, Makers & Creators. Sending Tasmanian Quality Gifts Australia Wide.

Gourmet Gift Hampers Tasmania is a vibrant new Tasmanian rural business dedicated to showcasing the finest products Tasmania. Launched with a vision to support local growers, makers, and creators, we curate premium gift hampers that highlight the exceptional quality and diversity of Tasmanian produce. Our hampers are more than just gifts; they are a celebration of the island’s rich culinary heritage and artisanal craftsmanship.

Our commitment to sourcing locally is at the core of our business. We proudly partner with over 60 small Tasmanian businesses, featuring more than 300 unique products in our hampers. From handcrafted chocolates and artisanal foods and handmade gifts to Tasmanian wines and spirits, every item is carefully selected to reflect the best of what Tasmania has to offer. This dedication not only ensures the highest quality for our customers but also supports the local economy and promotes sustainable practices.

What sets Gourmet Gift Hampers Tasmania apart is our transparency and inclusivity. Unlike many hamper businesses, we openly promote our suppliers, sharing their stories and showcasing their products. By doing so, we create a connection between our customers and the real people, families, and small businesses behind each product. This approach fosters a sense of community and appreciation for the hard work and passion that goes into every item.

Our extensive range of hampers caters to a variety of tastes and occasions, with over 100 hampers currently available and many more on the way. We also offer custom curation services to suit specific industries and individual needs, ensuring that every gift is personalised and meaningful.

To bring nature back into daily life—one pot, one tray, one family, one workplace at a time.
We aim to make greenery a lifestyle, not a luxury, and help people experience nature as a source of emotional healing, focus, joy, and stress-free living.

Name: Bear With Me Toys
Description:
Bear With Me specializes in creating memories in the form of fully customizable plush toys. From birthdays to graduations, a plush toy is a simple gesture that can commemorate an occasion. It symbolizes a great moment that one can hold on to for many years.

What’s more, they are fantastic promotional items for any business that wants to leave an impact on prospective clients and customers. Unlike coffee mugs and hats that end up shelved and unworn respectively, plush toys beg you to interact with them, and your leads are bound to keep them around the office and engage with your company more intimately.

Our customers can choose from 18 different color t-shirts and add pictures, logos, and text. They also come with accessory options. Unfortunately, many companies outsource the manufacturing process, which leads to many mistakes and cheaply made plush toys. For example, many companies will attempt to customize bears that were never meant to be customized in the first place to save money! As a result, you are left with dozens of sad plush toys in an ill-fitting shirt, and most times, you cannot even file for a return.

However, at Bear With Me, we manufacture all our plush toys at our own factories and decorate them locally. As a result, our quality is next to none, and by cutting out the middle man, we can ensure you our best possible prices and fast turn-around time all year round.

Bear With Me has 30 years of history in making customizable plush toys. We know how to capture the imagination of people with our toys. At Bear with Me, our mission is simple: to create adorably memorable plush toys with the best materials at a fraction of the cost.

Name: Unique Memento
Description:
Igniting Joy, One Delightfully Unique Gift at a Time

At UniqueMemento, we believe every celebration deserves a gift as special as the recipient. That's why we've made it our mission to revolutionize personalized gifting through creativity, craftsmanship and an uncompromising commitment to sparking delight.

From whimsical wonderful to heartfelt and sentimental, our one-of-a-kind creations transcend the ordinary. Brought to life by a passionate team of designers and artisans, each UniqueMemento treasure is a labor of love - infused with the exact personal touches that transform a simple gift into an unforgettable experience.

Birthdays, anniversaries, promotions or just showering someone with unexpected happiness, no occasion is too big or too small for our joyful magic. Because at our core, we're not just in the business of selling products - we're professional joy-sparkers and memory makers.
How do we ignite those dazzling smiles? By fusing innovative personalization techniques with a creative prowess that knows no bounds. laser engraving, 3D printing, you name it - our tech puts your vision into reality. But we haven't forgotten the timeless art of craftsmanship either, meticulously hand-finishing every piece.
The result? Unique, custom-made keepsakes that capture the spirit of your relationship in a tangible form. Gifts that instantly delight, cultivate deeper connections and become cherished heirlooms.
Of course, our joyful uniqueness doesn't end at the product. From our inspirational digital sparkshops to our unforgettable unboxing experiences, weinfuse every touchpoint of the UniqueMemento journey with our signature creativity and thoughtfulness.

So whether you're a gift-giver seeking a treasured surprise or a fellow creative searching for your next passion project, UniqueMemento welcomes you to a world where thoughtfulness reigns supreme. Join our joyful revolution of personalization - one delightfully unique creation at a time!

Name: The Swag Code
Description:
The Swag Code – Giftology Unleashed

Welcome to The Swag Code— where gifting is an art, and we’re the maestros. Our mission is simple: to help people elevate their gifting game and unlock joy with every present. Whether it’s a holiday surprise, a birthday treat, or a corporate swag strategy, we believe the right gift has the power to create connections and unforgettable moments.

Who We Are

The Swag Code isn’t an e-commerce store — we’re a content-driven platform with 5+ years of expertise in the gifting industry. Every gift idea we share is carefully researched and handpicked for quality, relevance, and creativity. Our blog and guides are designed to save you time, remove the stress of endless searching, and make the gift-hunting process fun, easy, and downright enjoyable.

Who We Serve

Personal Gift Shoppers– individuals looking for unique, meaningful gifts for friends, family, and loved ones. From holiday celebrations to anniversaries and special milestones, we make sure you never run out of inspiration.
Corporate Gift Planners – HR teams, managers, and businesses looking for employee rewards, client appreciation gifts, or office swag. We specialize in curating professional yet personal options that boost morale and leave a lasting impression.

What Makes Us Different

Exclusive focus on gifting – it’s not a seasonal add-on, it’s our core.
- Dual coverage – personal + corporate, so no occasion is left behind.
- Curated “best of” approach – only top recommendations, no overwhelming lists.
- Playful yet professional voice – blending expertise with creativity

Name: Nation of Positivity
Description:
Bij Nation of Positivity vind je kleine leuke cadeautjes. Allemaal gepersonaliseerd en bedoeld om jouw positiviteit aan iemand anders te geven.

Velen van jullie hebben de afgelopen jaren al eens een klein extraatje van mij gekregen. Ze waren altijd zelfgemaakt, gepersonaliseerd, uniek voor jou. Het was leuk om de soms wat verbaasde, maar altijd vooral heel dankbare reacties te zien, soms niet meer dan een heel oprechte glimlach. We hoeven niet allemaal een raket naar Mars te lanceren. Soms begint een beetje positiviteit gewoon bij jou en mij.

Met Nation of Positivity bied ik mijn atelier en mijn eigen werk aan in een kleine online shop; mijn bescheiden initiatief, mijn spreekwoordelijke duit in het zakje. Met liefde gemaakt om met heel veel liefde te kunnen geven. Samen zorgen we voor een beetje meer positiviteit in de wereld.

At Jirana, we believe in transforming "everyday" into an extraordinary adventure, where creativity, purpose, and environmental stewardship intertwine seamlessly. Join us today and let your stationery tell a story of inspiration and innovation.

Name: Mynestcrafts Decor Inc
Description:
I am a mother of two lovely kids with a passion for decorating homes. My partner and I are self learned designers with an engineering background who love to use our hands to create pieces of art.
Our love for nature combined with our passion for travel inspires us to bring the best designs to life.

Our inspiration is drawn from our visits and conversations with many local artisans and indigenous locals during our trips to various cities in Turkey, India, UAE, Canada and USA.

Our 6 year old made us realize that our planet is under threat from climate change and asked us to do something about it. We planned to start with small changes which will cause a ripple effect. We took it upon on ourselves to salvage urban waste wood that would normally be used as fire wood and created our first set of Christmas ornaments that we made for friends and family. These personalized gifts were an instant hit within the family and they encouraged us to start Mynestcrafts.

Our inspiration for the shop name is drawn from our love for handicrafts which will add beauty and warmth to your nest.

Nous proposons des jeux/jouets, de la naissance jusqu'aux séniors, en passant par les adolescents.

Welcome to the world of Plan Happy products, where planning transforms into an art, and each day becomes a canvas of possibilities. Name: Totocactus
Description:
Totocactus
Transform your daily routine into everyday magic 
Totocactus is a boutique stationery and lifestyle brand where dreamy botanical illustrations meet intentional, small-batch design. We believe that even the most ordinary moments — writing a grocery list, sending a thank-you card, jotting down ideas — can become little rituals of beauty and joy.

The brand was built from something deeply personal. The name brings together two parts of my journey — Toto, my pet turtle, and a cactus, the first plant I ever cared for. One taught me patience, the other resilience. Together, they became a quiet reminder: go slow, grow steady, and create with heart.

Our designs draw inspiration from nature’s quiet details — fruits, flowers, butterflies, ladybugs — and all the tiny wonders that often go unnoticed. Each illustration is hand-drawn, rooted in storytelling, and crafted to be timeless — not just for one season, but for years to come.

What We Stand For
1. Illustrated with love
Every piece begins as a hand-drawn illustration inspired by everyday nature — from fruits and flowers to butterflies and botanical details.
2. Crafted with care
We work with trusted partners to ensure quality in every step — from premium printing to fine finishing and thoughtful packaging.

3. Made for real life
Totocactus products are designed to be beautiful, functional, and lasting — intuitive pieces that become part of your everyday rituals.

Our Story
Founded in 2016, Marqland emerged from a passion for spreading joy. Our founder, Radhakrishna TS, envisioned a world where gifting was an art form—a way to connect hearts and create lasting impressions.

Delivering Thoughtful Moments, One Gift at a Time
At Marqland., we believe that every occasion deserves a touch of magic. Whether it’s celebrating milestones, expressing gratitude or fostering employee’s relationships, our curated gifts speak volumes. With attention to detail and a dash of creativity, we transform ordinary moments into extraordinary memories.

What Sets Us Apart?
Personalization: No two recipients are alike, and neither are our gifts. From merchandise to custom-made hampers, we tailor each package to reflect the recipient’s personality and preferences.
Quality Craftsmanship: We source our products from artisans and local businesses. Each item is handpicked for its quality, uniqueness and eco-friendliness.
Memorable Unboxing: The anticipation of unwrapping a gift is part of the experience. Our elegant packaging ensures that the moment is as delightful as the gift itself.
Corporate Partnerships: We collaborate with businesses to enhance employee engagement, celebrate milestones, and strengthen client relationships. 
Our corporate gifting solutions are designed to leave a lasting impression.

Name: Boxes and Books
Description:
𝗠𝗮𝗮𝘁𝘄𝗲𝗿𝗸 𝗽𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗼𝗼𝗻𝗹𝗶𝗷𝗸 𝗼𝗳 𝘇𝗮𝗸𝗲𝗹𝗶𝗷𝗸
Zoek je een originele doos of boek voor een bijzondere gelegenheid, zoals een jubileum, afscheid of huwelijk? Kom met je ideeën en samen bespreken we de mogelijkheden. Ik zorg voor een mooi resultaat.

Hoe presenteer je jouw portfolio, je afstudeerproject of hoe wordt je kunstboek aangeboden? De mogelijkheden die je hebt bedacht, bekijken we en samen bedenken we oplossingen die tot een unieke presentatie leiden.

𝗞𝗮𝗻𝘁-𝗲𝗻-𝗸𝗹𝗮𝗮𝗿 𝘁𝗲 𝗸𝗼𝗼𝗽
Kaartendozen, pennendoosjes, sierdozen, Japans gebonden boekjes, Japanse vouwdozen, notitieboekjes, allemaal kant-en-klaar om te bestellen. Neem een kijkje bij Kant-en-Klaar. Wil je het ene doosje of boekje in een andere kleur, of liever een ander dessin, neem dan contact met mij op.

𝗪𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀𝗵𝗼𝗽𝘀
Wil je zelf een boek of doos maken? Tijdens een workshop leer ik je de kneepjes van de technieken. En iedereen gaat altijd met een tevreden resultaat
naar huis.

𝗗𝗶𝘁 𝗯𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝗸, 𝗔𝗱𝗲𝗹𝗵𝗲𝗶𝗱 𝘃𝗮𝗻 𝗥𝗼𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗺
Een pietje-precies word ik door mensen in mijn omgeving genoemd. Ik werk netjes en secuur, houd van kleuren, en voor maatwerk bespreek ik met de klant de mogelijkheden. Bovendien werk ik graag met een (reëele) deadline.

𝗣𝗼𝗿𝘁𝗳𝗼𝗹𝗶𝗼
In mijn portfolio kun je zien wat ik allemaal heb gemaakt, als opdrachten en wat ik knat-en-klaar verkoop. Maar ook mijn speciale ontwerpen voor deelnames aan wedstrijden, challenges en tentoonstellingen. Mijn miniatuurboekje van de miniatuurboekbindwedstrijd is opgenomen in de collectie van het museum Huis van het Boek in Den Haag. Ik had geen prijs gewonnen, maar wel een eervolle vermelding in de catalogus.

𝗡𝗶𝗲𝘂𝘄𝘁𝗷𝗲𝘀
Lees meer over mijn belevenissen in de papierwereld bij Nieuwtjes. Daar krijgen naast mijn projecten bijvoorbeeld ook bezoeken aan (papier)tentoonstellingen aandacht.

Name: Magi
Description:
Magi è un progetto made in Italy che ha l’ambizione di arrivare nelle case di tutti regalando gioia e spensieratezza ! Da quì il nostro slogan “Fredoom to Create”, la libertà che abbiamo nel poter esprimere al meglio la nostra creatività.
Per noi di Magi, inoltre, è fondamentale essere unici in quello che facciamo, per questo collaboriamo con artisti di tutto il mondo per sviluppare periodicamente delle edizioni limitate con protagonista Kemper, la nostra mascotte. 

Riteniamo fondamentale che vi sentiate soddisfatti della vostra esperienza di acquisto, per questo ci impegniamo a:

- Lavorare intensamente per incontrare le preferenze di tutti, mantenendo il nostro stile distintivo.
-  Essere presenti per qualsiasi vostro dubbio.
-  Rispettare le tempistiche ed aggiornarvi sullo stato dell’ordine.
-  Rispettare l’ambiente con un packaging elegante fatto in materiali eco-sostenibili. 

Faremo da colonna sonora delle vostre giornate, amplificando le gioie e sostenendovi nei momenti no. Siamo convinti che grazie ai nostri prodotti creerete l’atmosfera giusta per vivere dei momenti indimenticabili !

Description:
Specializujeme se na prodej nových a použitých obalů - kartonových krabic, palet a obalových materiálů. Naším cílem je poskytovat našim zákazníkům kvalitní a cenově dostupné produkty, které budou vyhovovat jejich potřebám.

Nově zařazujeme do naší nabídky také vlastní výrobky vyráběné z kartonů. Jsme přesvědčeni, že naše výrobní procesy jsou šetrné k životnímu prostředí a snažíme se minimalizovat vliv našich aktivit na životní prostředí.

Mimo e-shop nabízíme také služby Balení na míru nebo Fulfillmentu - díky týmu expertů, softwaru, skladovacím plochám a technice dokážeme zajistit vše od A do Z s přidanou hodnotou.

Naši zákazníci se mohou spolehnout na naši rychlou a spolehlivou dodávku, profesionální přístup a individuální řešení jejich požadavků. Jsme hrdí na to, že jsme schopni uspokojit potřeby širokého spektra zákazníků v různých oborech.

Sledujeme neustále nové trendy a inovace v oblasti obalů a obalových materiálů a snažíme se poskytovat zákazníkům ty nejlepší a nejefektivnější řešení. Kontaktujte nás a rádi Vám pomůžeme s Vašimi požadavky na obaly a obalové materiály.

Name: Joëlle Bonnet illustration
Description:
Passionnée par le dessin depuis l'enfance, j'ai la chance aujourd'hui de vivre de ma passion. 

Aquarelliste, je vous accueille dans mon atelier bruxellois afin de mettre sur papier vos plus belles idées. Au travers de mes illustrations douces et colorées, je vous accompagne dans les moments importants de votre vie grâce à la création de faire-part sur mesure. 

Je développe également différentes collections de papeterie afin de transmettre des émotions et permettre l'évasion dans un doux imaginaire.

Je suis fière de développer des créations 100% belges. Les illustrations sont imaginées dans mon atelier bruxellois et les créations sont imprimées en Belgique sur du papier 100% recyclé.  De plus, lors de la vente de mes produits le suremballage est évité. 

Enfin, Il est important pour moi de m'entourer de personnes animées par les mêmes valeurs lors de la promotion et vente de mes créations afin d'optimiser au mieux les points précédents. J'ai par ailleurs la chance de pouvoir revendre mes créations auprès de partenaires et magasins soucieux de
l'environnement, de la consommation locale, équitable
et durable.

Name: Papeles con amor S.A.S
Description:
Un día ... hace ya muchos años, soñamos con tener una papelería... llena de colores y texturas, ese sueño fue perdiendo el norte  a medida que fuimos creciendo y entendiendo que la vida no es tan rosa como te la imaginas y luego... tarannnn... encuentras un hueco en el mercado y por ahí te metes sin miedo y sin ponerle mucha mente... así nace Papeles con Amor... un pedacito de nuestro corazón en cada detalle.

Con el tiempo entendimo que no vendíamos PRODUCTOS sino EXPERIENCIAS al rededor de ellos, que mas que unas flores era un TE AMO, que cuando entregamos un desayuno no es solo comida, es un "LO SIENTO" o un "TE EXTRAÑO, que unos globos significan que "ME SIENTO ORGULLOSA DE TI" .

Al final nuestro sueño se convirtió en realidad y cada día entregamos amor empacado en cajitas.

Somos lina y juli

Name: Heirloom
Description:
An Heirloom video book is a physical book with an integrated video player that plays your videos and photos with sound. 

Simply upload videos and photos from your computer, your phone or directly from Facebook or Instagram and we'll mail you a book that automatically plays your videos and photos when the cover is opened. Or you can load your video book yourself once you receive them. 

Our builder includes easy-to-use tools to help you arrange your videos and photos, select your cover (or design your own), add music (from our library or yours), create an inside message and enjoy a preview of your production. 

Our team will do all of the hard work of building your book, safely packaging your creation along with a recharging card, and shipping it to you or your loved one.

Name: Regalo Gifting

Regalo Gifting is a luxury gifting brand that offers pre-assorted gift boxes and customized gift boxes for all occasions. We believe that gifting is an art that should be perfected, and our passion is to create unforgettable gifting experiences that are as special and unique as the recipient.

Our pre-assorted gift boxes are carefully curated with high-quality, handpicked products that cater to different occasions and recipients, making it easier for you to choose the perfect gift. Our customized gift boxes are designed to help you create a one-of-a-kind gifting experience that truly reflects your unique style and the personality of the recipient. Our team of experts will work with you to create a bespoke gift box that is tailored to your specific needs and preferences.

We are committed to using only the finest and most luxurious products in all of our gift boxes, sourced from reputable and high-end brands. From the packaging to the products themselves, we strive for excellence in every detail, ensuring that our gift boxes make a lasting impression and leave a memorable impact.

At Regalo Gifting, we believe that every gift should be a reflection of the sender's thoughtfulness and care, and our mission is to help you create those unforgettable moments. Whether it's a special occasion or just a token of appreciation, our luxury gift boxes are perfect for every gifting need, and we are dedicated to making your gifting experience as seamless and delightful as possible.

Description:

At Evera, we believe that a gift is more than just a product;
 It is a message… a signature… a lasting impression.

Name: Curated by The Fifth Design
Description:
Curated by The Fifth Design specializes in transforming corporate gifting into a memorable experience that stands out. Our passion for artisanal craftsmanship and personalized service sets us apart in the corporate gifting landscape. We create bespoke, handcrafted gifts that not only impress but also elevate your brand, making every gift an opportunity to inspire lasting impressions and referrals.

Our Products and Services

We offer an exclusive range of luxury gifts, meticulously crafted to reflect the unique essence of your brand. Our products include:

Custom Chopping Boards and Cheese Boards: Made from premium camphor laurel timber and customizable with your brand's color palette and logo. These boards are more than functional; they're statement pieces that blend utility with elegance.

Branded Gift Boxes: Our beautifully packaged gift boxes come with options for laser-engraved logos and custom ribbon colors, making each gift uniquely yours. Perfect for client appreciation, employee recognition, and special corporate events.

Gourmet Gift Sets: Elevate your gifting experience with our gourmet sets, which include artisanal chocolates, fine wines, and premium cheese knives, all presented in a luxurious magnetic lid gift box.

Sustainable and Customizable Options: We prioritize sustainability, using eco-friendly materials and offering a range of customization options to perfectly align with your brand's identity and values.

Our Approach

We believe in the power of thoughtful gifting. Our process is collaborative and personalized, ensuring that each gift not only resonates with the recipient but also reflects the quality and ethos of your brand. From the initial consultation to the final delivery, we handle every detail with precision and care.

Whether you're looking to strengthen client relationships, recognise employee achievements, or create a memorable brand experience, Curated by The Fifth Design is your partner in making every gift count.

Name: Hampers Personalised
Description:
Hampers Personalised are a small business borne in lockdown and run by husband-and-wife duo Anish and Sonia. 

Our small business came about through a love for unique, personalised and most importantly, thoughtful gifts. We love everything about gifting from putting it together to seeing the reaction and joy of the person receiving it. 

This is why we created Hampers Personalised and work closely with each person to really create a memorable and unique gift.

We offer personalised gift hampers for various occasions such as birthdays, engagements, weddings, new-born baby gifts, as well as seasonal personalised gifts such as for Father’s Day, Christmas, Diwali and more. We have a wide range of products to choose from, making each order completely customisable.

You can purchase individual personalised products or we offer the ability for you to select all the items you wish and create your own hamper, ensuring it really is bespoke and allows you to stay within your budget. Alternatively, if you are someone who prefers a hands-off approach, you can provide your budget and we will put it together for you!

Description:
At Creatie, we turn ideas into treasures through a meticulous process. From conceptualization to exquisite artwork, we infuse our creations with passion and purpose. Join us as we transform imagination into reality, creating products that bring joy and delight to our cherished clients. 

About Our Brand Creatie
Introducing Creatie – the trademark registered brand based in Kolkata, owned by SUSA Enterprise. At Creatie, we are passionate about creating office and personal stationery printing and non-printing solutions that are uniquely creative.

Our team, led by a dynamic creative couple, lives and breathes creativity. We take immense pride in crafting every piece of our products, and can’t spend a day without creating something for Creatie. It’s our passion, it’s our love, and it’s what defines our existence.

From designing a new series of bookmarks or stickers to our faith-based flashcards or even a simple book label for kids, we enjoy every moment of the creative process. With every product we create, we infuse a piece of our hearts and souls, ensuring that each one is unique and one-of-a-kind.

We invite you to explore our catalogue and experience the magic of our creations. If you love what you see, let’s dive into the ocean of creativity together!

Name: sebi&zase
Description:
sebi&zase je na slovenskem trgu nova blagovna znamka izdelkov, ki temeljijo na skrbi zase & ti nudijo čudovito oporo za tvojo skrb zase. Posebnost izdelkov je, da so vsi izdelki avtorski, unikatni, kreativno oblikovani ter oblikovno & elegantno dovršeni.

Vsak izdelek nosi svoje sporočilo – zate.  Preko pisane besede, čudovitih ilustracij ter predvsem namere – da te vsak dan opomni nate & Tvojo skrb zase. In ravno zato je vsak izdelek darilo s pomenom. Kot poklon sebi ali kot darilo tvojim dragim osebam (mama, prijateljica, sodelavka …).

Zakaj sebi&zase? Ker vse prevečkrat pozabimo nase, na lastno notranje doživljanje in predvsem – da zase resnično & iskreno poskrbimo. Vse prevečkrat v ospredje postavljamo druge. Žal. Nase pa pogosto pozabimo ali pa si zase enostavno ne vzamemo časa.

Name: Quà Tặng Doanh Nghiệp CONE
Description:
Quà Tặng Có Nè tự hào là một trong những công ty chuyên cung cấp quà tặng doanh nghiệp uy tín tại Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh với sự đa dạng về mẫu mã sản phẩm và khả năng in ấn thiết kế quà tặng doanh nghiệp theo yêu cầu, cam kết mang đến giá trị cao với mức giá cạnh tranh nhất. 
Tại Cone, chúng tôi không chỉ là những người bán hàng, mà còn là những đối tác đồng hành của quý khách hàng. Chúng tôi luôn lắng nghe và hiểu rõ nhu cầu của doanh nghiệp, từ đó tư vấn và đưa ra những giải pháp phù hợp nhất. 
Đối với Cone, quà tặng doanh nghiệp không chỉ là phương tiện tri ân mà còn là cách tối ưu hóa tình cảm và mối quan hệ doanh nghiệp. Chúng tôi luôn đặt mình vào vị thế của khách hàng, hiểu rõ giá trị quan trọng của mối quan hệ giữa khách hàng, nhân viên đối với doanh nghiệp. Hãy để Cone trở thành đối tác đồng hành của bạn, đồng sáng tạo và xây dựng những món quà tặng doanh nghiệp độc đáo, tinh tế, và mang đậm bản sắc của doanh nghiệp bạn.
